**The good news:** _DC is fighting back_ — D.C. residents are rallying for statehood (and 2 more Democratic Senators!) | [JOIN THE FIGHT, Peter! CHIP IN $5 TO SUPPORT DC STATEHOOD »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62217532/402700057/-844586923?amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230423_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0MzEyMmYxLTMyZTItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ypE9NMQ2XbLrNFuFaNjeP_qAVJM33j6eK6QoAR2QjYM=)

name: Andy Roth from State Freedom Caucus Network
subject: RINOs Are Being Held Accountable
body:
Votes of "No Confidence" against liberal Republicans are happening all over the country.
| |
---|---|---
| | | [Open in app](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/rinos-are-being-held-accountable?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store) or [online](https://substack..EhNz4Ifbduw6nJ-kctvrcvqsxb5-vsjOkaTgPfJYkAM?)
---
[](https://substack..EhNz4Ifbduw6nJ-kctvrcvqsxb5-vsjOkaTgPfJYkAM?)
---
# [RINOs Are Being Held Accountable](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=116362409&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTE2MzYyNDA5LCJpYXQiOjE2ODIyOTQ2NzEsImV4cCI6MTY4NDg4NjY3MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.8swTA8qCgLF_9Vp7kU_P-sHYfm8pk1kpc6cu0lFtS7E)
### Votes of "No Confidence" against liberal Republicans are happening all over the country.
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/a167d438-1fe0-43f9-854c-fe2f5a45455f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Apr 24
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a167d438-1fe0-43f9-854c-fe2f5a45455f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..W2j96Z3oOW-Um0X9ISvlzvDfyohKYCe8FYy16xfZmPI?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

Friends,
Often times in our emails we talk about the bad news happening in the states. We focus on the terrible job RINOs are doing in charge of your state capitals. But today we have good news: More and more conservatives in red states are waking up to the fact that they're not properly being represented.
In Idaho this week, three RINO state representatives received votes of "no confidence" in their respective districts. Multiple Republican committees in the districts of liberal Republicans Rep. Lori McCann in District 6, Rep. Julie Yamamoto in District 11, and Rep. Matt Bundy in District 23 gave them votes of "no confidence". Additionally, the legislative district of RINO Rep. Kenny Wrote in District 13 voted to censure him.
Yamamoto and McCann are the top two Republicans on the House Education Committee. They are the reason Idaho did not get an ESA bill in the last session and voted against removing porn from school libraries.
After the IDFC raised hell about it, their constituents voted to hold them accountable.
For another example, several Republican committees in South Carolina counties have also voted to censure their state's House GOP leadership after they kicked the SCFC out of their caucus.
This is precisely how it should work. In the past, a RINO could claim to be conservative because nobody exposed them. But now that our state freedom caucuses are getting loud, the scales are falling off the eyes of the public.
**Montana:**
The spotlight was on the Treasure State this week as the MTFC made national headlines for their efforts to end the disgusting practice of children going through dangerous sex changes. Thanks to the efforts of the MT Freedom Caucus, the amendment passed overwhelmingly in the legislature.
As the bill passed the House, a transgender Democrat lawmaker Rep. Zooey Zephyr [told them](https://substack.com/redirect/78ba8768-5c3a-4148-9158-a46de609b1d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "The only thing I will say is if you vote yes on this bill and yes on these amendments I hope the next time there's an invocation when you bow your heads in prayer, you see the blood on your hands."
In response, the MTFC immediately called for his censure due to a lack of decorum, which the House ultaimtely approved.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d7c9649b-5e5f-4da5-ae4d-931a348d36fd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Several national news outlets, such as the Washington Post, CNN, and Associated Press covered the story. As you can imagine, their coverage was not very friendly to the MT Freedom Caucus. They humorously took issue with the fact that the caucus "misgendered" Zephyr in their statement (aka: they said a man is a man).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9736ea7e-450a-414d-a95b-3d4946360182?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**South Dakota:**
As you probably know, Anheuser-Busch decided to completely alienate their customers by making transgender social media influencer Dylan Mulvaney a brand ambassador for their company.
In response, the SDFC [called on](https://substack.com/redirect/1b7bf15c-5cf7-4c86-91e5-a9cad2e59cca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) South Dakota Gov. Kristi Norm to immediately divest in the state's holdings in the company, totaling thousands of shares of stock in the Anheuser-Busch company.
"South Dakota needs to put our money where our values are," said SDFC Vice Chair Rep. Tony Randolph. "We cannot continue to invest in a company that promotes values that are contrary to those of South Dakotans."
**Arizona:**
Gov. Katie Hobbs has officially set a record for most vetoes in a year for an Arizona Governor with 63. The AZ Freedom Caucus has been at the forefront of passing many common sense bills that would have done a lot of great things for the State of Arizona, but their new governor is singlehandedly preventing them from becoming law.
Take a look at just a few examples.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/acb6264f-fcb9-4e26-a066-0df7bf1f349c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Wyoming:**
Remember how Wyoming Speaker Albert Sommers prevented a bill to ban the transing of children from receiving a vote on the floor? Well, a couple in Wyoming is now suing their school board for transitioning their daughter to a boy behind their backs.
The WY Freedom Caucus vows to bring that bill to the floor in the next legislative session and ensure it becomes law.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d699e245-c707-4171-84b7-8da9d03017f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/df3d03a9-bff5-49b2-9403-e853716fd3f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/e74c263d-9b9b-45f4-ab3b-2e0e7bd1f682?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
State Freedom Caucus Network is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell State Freedom Caucus Network that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments.
[Pledge your support](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wb3N0IiwicCI6MTE2MzYyNDA5LCJzIjoxNDI0NjAyLCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNjgyMjk0NjcxLCJleHAiOjE2ODQ4ODY2NzEsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.2gYgQAEN-0eQX5zXXv-qpL-JAq06Rju7MtJKFyANG4M?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

Zooey Zephyr "The only thing I will say is if you vote yes on this bill and yes on these amendments I hope the next time there's an invocation when you bow your heads in prayer, you see the blood on your hands." In response, the MTFC immediately called for his censure due to a lack of decorum, which the House ultaimtely approved. | | ---|---|--- Several national news outlets, such as the Washington Post, CNN, and Associated Press covered the story. As you can imagine, their coverage was not very friendly to the MT Freedom Caucus. They humorously took issue with the fact that the caucus "misgendered" Zephyr in their statement (aka: they said a man is a man). | | ---|---|--- South Dakota: As you probably know, Anheuser-Busch decided to completely alienate their customers by making transgender social media influencer Dylan Mulvaney a brand ambassador for their company. In response, the SDFC South Dakota Gov. Kristi Norm to immediately divest in the state's holdings in the company, totaling thousands of shares of stock in the Anheuser-Busch company. "South Dakota needs to put our money where our values are," said SDFC Vice Chair Rep. Tony Randolph. "We cannot continue to invest in a company that promotes values that are contrary to those of South Dakotans." Arizona: Gov. Katie Hobbs has officially set a record for most vetoes in a year for an Arizona Governor with 63. The AZ Freedom Caucus has been at the forefront of passing many common sense bills that would have done a lot of great things for the State of Arizona, but their new governor is singlehandedly preventing them from becoming law. Take a look at just a few examples. | | ---|---|--- Wyoming: Remember how Wyoming Speaker Albert Sommers prevented a bill to ban the transing of children from receiving a vote on the floor? Well, a couple in Wyoming is now suing their school board for transitioning their daughter to a boy behind their backs. The WY Freedom Caucus vows to bring that bill to the floor in the next legislative session and ensure it becomes law. | | ---|---|--- Keep fighting, Andy Roth President State Freedom Caucus Network P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty. State Freedom Caucus Network is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell State Freedom Caucus Network that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments. | | | Read State Freedom Caucus Network in the app Listen to posts, join subscriber chats, and never miss an update from Andy Roth. (C) 2023 State Freedom Caucus Network 300 Independence Ave SE, Washington, DC 20003 ? ?

name: Sara (personal)
subject: We’re failing to adequately support our service members and their families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230423_em_sjj_milfam [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230423_em_sjj_milfam]
Friends,
Living in San Diego and representing the 51st Congressional District, I’m honored to represent the amazing service members and their families who make up our strong and vibrant military community. So many of my colleagues think about the military in terms of defense contracts, budgets, and countering threats around the world (which are important), but I get the special privilege of calling service members and their families my constituents.
So, it’s striking that when I am taking calls from our military families, they’re not upset about drag performances or what books their kids are taught in schools, as much as my Republican colleagues’ would like to say. They’re calling me because they can’t make ends meet.
Military families can’t afford necessities like safe housing, child care, and putting food on the table. We’re failing to adequately support our service members and their families and it’s downright shameful.
We need to invest in meeting the basic needs of our military service members and ensuring an improved quality of life. If you agree, please join me by adding your name to this petition demanding action right now. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/BRB7wGAWVUyYF6JmQIRxpQ2]
To put this issue in perspective, imagine for a moment what you can do with an eye-popping, $886 billion budget at your disposal?
This is the budget that our military has been operating with - one that hasn’t addressed basic needs. The stats are dire:
*
More
than
4,000
military
children
are
waiting
for
child
care
spots
at
San
Diego’s
military
child
development
centers.
*
*
The
San
Diego
Food
Bank
feeds
about
45,000
food-insecure
service
members,
veterans,
and
their
families
every
month.
*
*
The
wait
time
for
military
housing
units
can
be
up
to
24
months,
and
often
these
units
pose
health
and
safety
hazards
for
families.
The fact is that a majority of the proposed budget will fund hardware and antiquated weapon systems, all while military families struggle to make ends meet and live with dignity.
It’s time we address these issues and focus on investing in our military families. Can you help me out by signing this petition? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/BRB7wGAWVUyYF6JmQIRxpQ2]
Thanks so much.
-Sara
https://secure.ngpvan.com/BRB7wGAWVUyYF6JmQIRxpQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/BRB7wGAWVUyYF6JmQIRxpQ2]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District
P.S. If you want to read my op-ed on this topic in the San Diego Union-Tribune, you can find that here: [https://www.sandiegouniontribune.com/opinion/commentary/story/2023-04-10/opinion-biden-defense-budget-military-families-cost-of-living-recruitment-sara-jacobs-san-diego] I hope you’ll take a look!

name: Birch Gold Group
subject: China & Russia's New "Redback" Could Nuke Your 401(k)
body:
China and Russia are making moves that could radically harm the retirement plans of millions of Americans.

| | | | **China's "Redback" Could Soon Make Your IRA or 401(k) Obsolete**
---
**China's "Redback" Could Soon Make Your IRA or 401(k) Obsolete**
| | |
China and Russia are making moves that could radically harm the retirement plans of millions of Americans.

They want to REPLACE the U.S. Dollar with the "Redback", their own **gold-backed reserve currency**.

Under normal circumstances, the world would reject such a currency from these two troublesome countries.

But many predict **the Redback could actually succeed**.

Why? Because of the outlandish money printing and dollar devaluation coming from Washington. Which harms other countries’ currencies and leaves many leaders secretly hoping for an alternative.

_And if it does replace the USD, what would happen to our economy?_

Here are three things you should prepare for:
* Stocks in your retirement account could crash because people aren’t buying anything other than **_absolute necessities_**.
* The real-world value of your IRA or 401(k) could drastically decline. So when you actually USE your money, your purchasing power may be a _**fraction of what it used to be**_.
* Corrupt D.C. lobby groups and banking companies could collude to ensure the American people pay for all of _THEIR_ losses. Some have spoken of “bail-ins” as a possible solution if things get really bad. (That means **if they can take your money,_THEY WILL_**).

The good news is there is a way to defend your savings from ALL THREE of these...
---
# **Diversify Into Something _Physical_**
**Diversify Into Something _Physical_**
| | I’m talking about gold and silver. Because there is no arguing with 5,000 years of history! Precious metals have maintained savings through economic turmoil, war, and even the fall of civilizations.

And today, diversifying into gold or silver has never been easier!

For example, with a "self-directed" physical gold IRA, your IRA or 401(k) could be transferred out of stocks and into gold without fees, penalties, and taxes!

To see how it’s done, **[get Birch Gold Group’s 20-page Info Kit on Gold IRAs by clicking here.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18531%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3ot%2b%2f2ihsREf%2fM7bus%2f3jA&sysid=1)**

Inside you will discover:
* Why Gold IRAs are**surging in popularity**
* How they protect you from government greed
* The right way to set one up** _without paying taxes or penalties_**

Getting this info kit could be one of the smartest financial moves you ever make. So click the link below to get your copy now:

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07791a17-4b7c-4b3d-8834-9b28d5b8606c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Team Nina for Philly
subject: Exciting News: The Philadelphia Inquirer Endorses Dr. Nina Ahmad for Philadelphia City Council At-Large
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zCMvQ1Oqic9Xp5vhvabJblNLJsijk9EqzdglS9LFQVg=/-nMUyIhSZlzfkJfHlfruUY20PHvZuIyfHwWHZwKBPzc=)

Friend

We have some amazing news to share with you! Last week, I was endorsed by The Philadelphia Inquirer, the newspaper of note in Philadelphia and southeast Pennsylvania!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zCMvQ1Oqic9Xp5vhvabJblNLJsijk9EqzdglS9LFQVg=/-nMUyIhSZlzfkJfHlfruUY20PHvZuIyfHwWHZwKBPzc=)

**" Nina Ahmad**,_ a former deputy mayor, pragmatic progressive, and scientist, has correctly diagnosed many of the city's ills as health problems. Ahmad supports data-driven solutions and would bring empathy and transparency to local government. She's also a prominent local champion of women's rights at a time when federal judges seem intent on rolling back decades of case law on abortion and other reproductive health-care decisions. She would be the city's first South Asian councilmember. While Ahmad has run for other offices before, City Council at-large is the ideal spot for her to apply her talents._"
With less than 23 days away from the election, our campaign continues to gather steam! Your support is not only valued, it is essential to get me over the finish line to be one of Philadelphia's next City Council Member at Large!
[Please donate $25, $50, $100, $1000 or more to keep our momentum going to help Democrats continue protecting our fundamental rights, ensuring every eligible voter has their voice heard, and investing in critical programs. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/zCMvQ1Oqic9Xp5vhvabJblNLJsijk9EqzdglS9LFQVg=/RDF8W4dHQcPgwW6jsflXmRPbCX0kqS7ewvqUL63yWi8=)

Together, we can make history and create a healthier Philadelphia for a stronger and more equitable future. Thank you for your support!

In solidarity,
Dr. Nina Ahmad

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/zCMvQ1Oqic9Xp5vhvabJblNLJsijk9EqzdglS9LFQVg=/RDF8W4dHQcPgwW6jsflXmRPbCX0kqS7ewvqUL63yWi8=)

Paid for by Nina for Philly

Philadelphia PA 19118 United States

| | According to studies involving twins living in the same country, genetic differences among individuals account for 30 - 40% of their overall happiness.
Independent of the genes, the other 60-70% of happiness results from environmental influences. [World Happiness Report](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/faOUoT5CE/c?w=CQidxMDqiG5SC7klvIDH1Mu5lU-GBn_nnkqUx2PViK8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL3dvcmxkaGFwcGluZXNzLnJlcG9ydC8iLCJyIjoiM2ZhZmJkODUtY2FmZC00ZGNjLWE0OWMtMDFkZDZjODQxNzc5IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0) found that three-quarters of human happiness is driven by six factors: strong economic growth, healthy life expectancy, quality social relationships, generosity, trust, and freedom to live the life that's right for you. These factors don't materialize by chance; they are intimately related to a country's government and cultural values. In other words, the happiest people live in countries that incubate joy. Citizens feel secure, have a purpose, and enjoy lives that minimize stress and maximize contentment.
Because the U.S. isn't among the top 10 happiest places in the world, to make where we live a better place, we need to find and cultivate policies that change our environment.

* Build the middle class, help citizens thrive economically
* Relieve the financial burdens on hardworking rural families
* Improve the health of all Americans
* Invest in mental healthcare
* Invest in programs that cultivate quality social relationships
* Build policy that values compassion and generosity
* Elect people of integrity to rebuild trust in our government systems
* Provide individuals the liberty and freedom to pursue happiness

For citizens' pursuit of happiness, we must build a better Nation for us all to live in.
---

These factors don't materialize by chance; they are intimately related to a country's government and cultural values. In other words, the happiest people live in countries that incubate joy. Citizens feel secure, have a purpose, and enjoy lives that minimize stress and maximize contentment. name: The Flyover
subject: Cows Flying and Dying, a Dragon Burns, and SEAL Team Six Gets the Job Done
body:
U.S. military units (including SEAL Team Six) rescued American diplomatic staff from the U.S. embassy in Khartoum over the weekend. The operation took place amid heavy fighting, but the Pentagon said the mission was “fast and clean.”

U.S. military units (including SEAL Team Six) rescued American diplomatic staff from the U.S. embassy in Khartoum over the weekend. The operation took place amid heavy fighting, but the Pentagon said the mission was “fast and clean.”

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

# Monday, April 24, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today we're writing about the military evacuation of the U.S. embassy in Sudan, the mysterious (and not so mysterious) death of cows, and a flaming dragon at Disneyland. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? [Sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQgOGngS3WcRwQDwxdsqVrR4vCEV-Fg2WjVn37Sp0z___yfdyXe5Imz8d72jiO2pf96OcCdEG6oF2cLrEyI1vN0fgrWiIKTq8RTXA1ADiCbK0vvlafOGczs3WGi5aIgBYICWZHYKbPADPUK6cZUsnGKQIuMvoxfXV5jpVr--3ffEy5b7rFdYz9VPZN4U3h7cVyxLL_SGty-qAIHluS9h_GK8hfAAAA__-eekkZ) and never miss a thing. ## US Embassy Staff Evacuated from Sudan
U.S. military units (including SEAL Team Six) [rescued](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1uwyAUQOGnwRvW5S_YA0OlylKHdO1oXZuLTYUhMiRR3r5q585nOfq-rvMVY4p5-8SDXAtlvp2lzqC51Fyq2XTeBSJJqiMnLoNUWmtrut0tQwAMVph1FAtopUBJWI0JI6FYhOqikyAVaKlhNBpEv1gYIQyEI6BfhWEayMdWzv67xNx2CulVHnT2azm65PbWbpWpNyYnJidc1kzP2m_lNzM5feRGZ8YWS8bE5HSvnI4Fa33x2jAEXu8eM6cHrnds5Dke0fMQt73FvDE51VbOF1NT9Ey9j4O9WKuH7nT-9owpxXqxTMN2YEx_Q-0_nZ8AAAD__9W9Zas) American diplomatic staff from the U.S. embassy in Khartoum over the weekend. The [operation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LHSpCAQBOCnwQwLBxAMCC4x20svtGZlVG5RtgDX2re_8uI_7U6-7j-P6YEhhmP9jTu5uqTpnVOZhOKgOMhJN94tRECyIdf1FqRSyuhmc89OS6-stkZLbb0C8KabLQ5WGDR93wQHAqRQoMSglejapxGDWCzhINDPnWZKkA815fZvCkfdaInf9KHczmlvottqfRcmfzEYGYzXdbWZzkq53P2dpBw9gxGXHGZkMJbT48Ex71-eXvgtfEmZwnpw-uB8Yg3p4K8Nc03nzp9YaySecaXCbyi_NwODscnOv68QYyi9YUqsO4b431R_OuhfAAAA__-Ni2ZF) took place amid heavy fighting, but the Pentagon said the mission was "fast and clean." Armed conflict in the region has become increasingly violent, leading to the deaths of hundreds of innocent civilians. Thousands of [foreigners are trapped](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyhCAQQL9GOxhcQL2CIo3dpU3prO5ykiA4yMXJ32cuder3ijfv4z7fMcSQHu-4s6s-z0fJ56yMACNAz7Yl55mBdcuu60fQxpjBtptTVvtx6JcVR6AFgGjouRv1YBQaRNsGBwq0MmDUzRrVyWVQN-VHxptCWjvbGMUUai7yM4dUN_bxJ39zkWve2-i2Wo-z0W8NTA1M13XJkIgPTsSpyjXL51cDU-LrfOFcIjUwnU_CJC4sAncuYcUkasHjYBK1hBgDJrHG4H0uJBbQYLU2cqt7bIuj43opZz80Rj12DPEvpf735TcAAP__xJJkkg) in the war-torn country by closed airports and impassable roads. The U.N. has urged the warring factions to respect ceasefires that would allow civilians to reach safety; these calls have fallen on the deaf ears of army leader _Abdel Fattah al-Burhan_ and the rival RSF, headed by _Mohamed Hamdan Dagalo_. A three-day truce was violated on Friday, and each side blamed the other. As the intensity ratchets up, it seems increasingly less likely that the two sides will be willing to negotiate.
## Mystery Cattle Mutilations In Texas
Six dead cattle have [been found](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFugzAQxvGngc3oONsBDx66sKVrR-TgI7gyOLKPEN6-StWx20_6lk__r-t4dSGG7f7pVrI8p_GRUxlBCVQC5ahrb2ciJFmTbS89SqVUp-vFapQ9gkJjjOp62XppuhYM6l7eWpjmOlgElKBQgdEK2ubWgYG5J2fA-anVlQLygVNuvlPYeKE5nulJuZnSWke7MD9KJT8qHCocjuNottu00VHee4XDmxUOexF_KuElJsccSfhAXqxnYcoh7SWegunliuC03XcqItOanuSF23lJOXCgIoo7RZ4214PRXZ2tfxwhxlAuXaXgvroQf4_xf5V-AgAA__-CrWmo) in three Texas counties with disturbing, mysterious injuries and no clear cause of death. The cows have been found lying on one side with the exposed side of their face cut along the jawline, and their tongues completely removed. In each case, there is no blood spilled on the ground or any visible signs of struggle. The sheriff's office also reports that there has been no discovery of footprints or tire tracks in the areas and that predators and birds are leaving the remains alone. Two of the cattle had their anus and external reproductive organs cut out with the same surgical exactitude displayed in the jawline cuts of each cow. The Madison County sheriff's office is working with other US agencies to find the cause of this [suspicious activity](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FyhCAQgOGngQ6HW1fRgiKN3aVN6aC7KBkURzBe3j6T1Kn_4p_v4zk-XYhhX97dxrb4NB5nyqNGBaigHhtJ1jMD15Lto-2gRkTTyNU6bMxkqDM9TF3rWXumibzpyCHBTDJY0FBrBNR9g_pRTUb32nfseu1ofjQCNVMo6aw-U9jLyj5-py8-qzltMtq1lCOL-k3AIGC477vy6bXznX-7gOHKAobCL5fV7EqJrHy6dlLEjlRJ-3JxVvNV5GnpuEOMIbdGoF42F-Lfo_wH_gkAAP__HZ9YZA), as there have been reports of thousands of similar occurrences nationwide.
## Disney Dragon Bursts Into Flames
A 45-foot animatronic dragon [caught on fire](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyhCAQQL8GOxwOFj0KijR2lzalg-dybgbFYbkz_n3mUqd-r3jzvm7jLVCi7fEZVvQ15nEvmUcFUoPUZrTN7COiRtOgv3RXbQCgt83ie2O1M9BNcUZrJ2sdgrlO0DlwgNg15LXSRoEG5SyoSzv1yql4xeBUmO8XK0DhTDWX9jvTVheM6cwvLO09r03yS607C_Mh9CD0cBxHG_PP9GTakPntCD0kisj1TCj0sAZmeqGciTc85V7yLqdn4coyprAiy_TGMWw18Ep3yUs-muLn_aCUiLtegHqsgdJfQP3vxm8AAAD__xowYs4) at Disneyland and caused mild panic. The Maleficent dragon, a fire-breathing prop that takes center stage in a night-time production called _Fantasmic!_ , is supposed to be defeated by Mickey Mouse's spell. clean_body: U.S. military units (including SEAL Team Six) rescued American diplomatic staff from the U.S. embassy in Khartoum over the weekend. The operation took place amid heavy fighting, but the Pentagon said the mission was “fast and clean.” U.S. military units (including SEAL Team Six) rescued American diplomatic staff from the U.S. embassy in Khartoum over the weekend. The operation took place amid heavy fighting, but the Pentagon said the mission was “fast and clean.” | | | | | | Monday, April 24, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we're writing about the military evacuation of the U.S. embassy in Sudan, the mysterious (and not so mysterious) death of cows, and a flaming dragon at Disneyland. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to hear more news? and stay in touch. | US Embassy Staff Evacuated from Sudan U.S. military units (including SEAL Team Six) American diplomatic staff from the U.S. embassy in Khartoum over the weekend. The took place amid heavy fighting, but the Pentagon said the mission was "fast and clean." Armed conflict in the region has become increasingly violent, leading to the deaths of hundreds of innocent civilians. Thousands of in the war-torn country by closed airports and impassable roads. The U.N. has urged the warring factions to respect ceasefires that would allow civilians to reach safety; these calls have fallen on the deaf ears of army leader Abdel Fattah al-Burhan and the rival RSF, headed by Mohamed Hamdan Dagalo. A three-day truce was violated on Friday, and each side blamed the other. As the intensity ratchets up, it seems increasingly less likely that the two sides will be willing to negotiate. Mystery Cattle Mutilations In Texas Six dead cattle have in three Texas counties with disturbing, mysterious injuries and no clear cause of death. The cows have been found lying on one side with the exposed side of their face cut along the jawline, and their tongues completely removed. In each case, there is no blood spilled on the ground or any visible signs of struggle. The sheriff's office also reports that there has been no discovery of footprints or tire tracks in the areas and that predators and birds are leaving the remains alone. Two of the cattle had their anus and external reproductive organs cut out with the same surgical exactitude displayed in the jawline cuts of each cow. The Madison County sheriff's office is working with other US agencies to find the cause of this , as there have been reports of thousands of similar occurrences nationwide. Disney Dragon Bursts Into Flames A 45-foot animatronic dragon at Disneyland and caused mild panic. The Maleficent dragon, a fire-breathing prop that takes center stage in a night-time production called Fantasmic! , is supposed to be defeated by Mickey Mouse's spell. Instead, it turned into an inferno and sent tightly-packed guests scrambling to get away. "It was shocking ," a witness said. "The crowd was in a standstill. People are packed in like sardines." of the incident are making the rounds online, and Disney is apologizing for the event. ➤ A new NBC poll shows that two-thirds of Republicans are standing behind former President Donald Trump despite his current legal battles. () ➤ President Biden 's team has been scrambling to produce an announcement video for his 2024 run. He's expected to release it on Tuesday. () ➤ Longtime Trump supporter Adam Laxalt will chair pro-DeSantis PAC Never Back Down. Laxalt and DeSantis roomed together during their Navy training. () ➤ Governor Gavin Newsom has called in the national guard to try and fix the drug crisis on the streets of San Francisco. () ➤ The NFL has caught and punished five players for violating the league's gambling policy. Four of the five were Detroit Lions. () ➤ When Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney bought the historic soccer club Wrexham AFC, it was stuck in England's fifth tier. On Saturday, the two actors watched their team win 3-1 and secure promotion to the more lucrative English Football League. () ➤ Memphis Grizzlies guard Dillon Brooks was ejected from Saturday's game against the Lakers for hitting Lebron James in the groin. Brooks blamed fans and the media for making him "the villain." She created the transgender advertising campaign that ignited a firestorm of criticism and cost the company billions. () ➤ GM is recalling 40,000 trucks due to their propensity to burst into flames. () ➤ Real estate legend Sam Zell says that remote work is "bull**" and that in-office workers are far more productive. () ➤ Explorers used an autonomous submarine to find a Japanese naval ship sunk during WW2. It was torpedoed while carrying over 1,000 prisoners of war, and it was found at a depth of 13,120 feet--deeper than the Titanic. () ➤ A Swedish company has designed a personal flying machine that's essentially a large drone. It flies at 60+ mph, can land itself, and has a parachute for emergencies. () ➤ A carjacking tip is making the rounds on TikTok. Some Hyundai and Kia cars can be started using only a screwdriver and a USB cable, and thefts of the two brands are up 85% in Los Angeles. () ➤ A cow** wandered onto a highway at night, got hit by a truck, flew through the air, and landed on the hood of a minivan. The van happened to belong to a Flyover team member. No one was hurt, but the cow didn't make it. body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWe3y_iDN8

I hope you're having a great day. There's something important I
want to share with you today. For years, we've seen a growing
effort from radical activists to destroy the principles of
liberty that have made our nation the freest and most prosperous
in history. These radicals have found a willing ally in the Biden
administration's education department.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWe3y_iDN8

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

I hope
you're having a great day. There's something important I want to
share with you today.

For
years, we've seen a growing effort from radical activists to
destroy the principles of liberty that have made our nation the
freest and most prosperous in history. These radicals have found
a willing ally in the Biden administration's education
department.

And right
now-with the help of these government bureaucrats-they are
actively denigrating the U.S. Constitution in America's schools
while teaching destructive ideologies like critical race theory
and socialism.

We are at
a key point in our history. We must defend our nation's founding
documents and principles of liberty through education.

And
that's why I'm emailing you today.

Hillsdale
College recently produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our
very popular "Constitution 101" online course, and I'd like you
to have a copy.

The
course features Hillsdale's faculty-the same professors who teach
our required course on the Constitution on campus. And when you
view "Constitution 101," you'll learn about:

The
original design and purpose of the Constitution.
The
challenges it faced during the Civil War.
How
it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and
liberalism.
How
limited government under the Constitution might be revived in our
own time.

Right
now, it can be yours when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100
or more. You can take advantage of this limited-time offer using
this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61734555:We3y_iDN8:m:3:2532013465:8A60930A7FC01F865FD1326E9FB533F9:r

And when
you do, you'll not only get your own DVD box set, but you'll help
expand our national educational outreach efforts such as free
online courses, classical K-12 education curriculums, and
Imprimis-our digest of liberty.

We need
your support because we REFUSE all government funding, even
indirectly in the form of student grants or loans.

So,
please reserve your DVD box set with a gift of $100 or more using
this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61734555:We3y_iDN8:m:3:2532013465:8A60930A7FC01F865FD1326E9FB533F9:r

And
remember, as I mentioned above, supplies are limited, so be sure
to reserve your copy today.

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

body:

**"It Is Urgent That All Americans Take Action To Protect Their Retirement Savings Using This Hidden Strategy"**
| | |
Hi, this is Dr. Ron Paul.

Let me be blunt with you.

If you are nearing your retirement age...

**All of the hard-earned money you have put away for your future could now be in danger.**

Why? Because of the worst financial disaster in history is unfolding before our eyes.

Call it the "everything bubble"... call it the "death of the dollar"... call it whatever you want...

But the truth is we are seeing...
* Gas prices at record highs
* Inflation at levels not seen for 40 years

And most Americans are struggling to make ends meet.

Meanwhile, government spending and home prices have **never been higher**. Because both of them are at all-time highs.

Clearly this bubble cannot continue!

And to top this off...

We have a far-left Democrat in the White House who has **targeted retirees multiple times with INCREASED TAXES!**

The question is... do you really believe Biden won't be able to _indirectly_ get your retirement savings?

By _continuing _to print dollars and eventually driving America into hyperinflation?

If this happens, it would be **disastrous for everyone with a stock and dollar-based retirement account!**

But the good news is... _You are not powerless!_

There is one strategy that can protect your retirement savings from...
* Stock crashes

* Biden

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: YOUR SIGNATURE IS NEEDED: Arctic communities and wildlife harmed by cruise ships
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1737669?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **A STARVING polar bear searches her ice shelf for dwindling food, ice CRACKING menacingly below her giant paws. Suddenly, it COLLAPSES and PLUNGES the polar bear into the icy water below.** This heartbreaking scene is the future we’re moving towards. As **_only 900_** Southern Beaufort polar bears remain, **the Arctic is warming TWICE as fast as the rest of the world.** While this fragile ecosystem melts away, cruise corporations charge further and further north through Arctic habitats. Their titanic vessels **_SPIT_** ice-melting emissions, **_DUMP_** wastewater into the ocean, and **_SPEW_** toxic pollution that exacerbates the problem and further dooms the Arctic to destruction. The people that live here, including Indigenous communities, also suffer from corporate cruise’s greed. The noise from their massive ships can drive away fish and other ocean resources that these communities rely on. The pollution can have severe ramifications for people’s health. _**THIS HAS TO CHANGE!**_ **Until the EPA reins in corporate cruise’s reckless behavior, cruise ships in the Arctic are a CATASTROPHE WAITING TO HAPPEN! [Please, Friend, we need your immediate help to PROTECT the Arctic, its communities, and wildlife from the greed of the corporate cruise industry. Sign by 11:59pm TONIGHT!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1737670?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1737671?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Have you heard about Big Cruise’s worst offender, Carnival Corp.? It dragged **11,000 tons of TOXIC HEAVY FUEL** through **_ESSENTIAL ARCTIC HABITATS_** in just one year! If that doesn’t demonstrate how little respect these companies have for the environments that are making them rich, I don’t know what does.
The Arctic is melting fast, Friend. We’re running out of time, and cruise corporations needed to be held accountable _yesterday._ That’s why I’m reaching out to you now. I know you don’t want to see communities polluted, the Arctic melted, and wildlife starved to death. So, please, be one of the 27 more people we need from your city to sign before 11:59pm TONIGHT![ **Stop corporate cruise ships from DESTROYING the Arctic!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1737672?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1737671?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Her son survived a school shooting and now she’s running against an extremist Congressman, the NRA backed John James, who wants to let every terrorist and criminal have a gun. James won by only 1600 votes last year, and this district is one of our top opportunities to give Democrats a House Majority.
body:
Emily Busch for Michigan!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teece0852-5b56-4e39-9695-2ebfdee12c3b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[_This Horrible GOP Extremist Won By Only 1600 Votes Last Time And Must Lose!_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta3dc961b-858f-46a9-ac07-05393f4a3fda/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_The extremist Congressman--in one of our top opportunities to give Democrats a House Majority--is NRA backed John James, from Michigan’s 10th District, who wants to let every terrorist and criminal have a gun._** **_Meanwhile, an incredible Democrat has jumped in the race. Emily Busch went through hell and back on Nov. 30th, 2021, when her son was at Oxford High School as a mass shooter--a terrorist armed by GOP policy--murdered four and injured seven with a weapon he NEVER should have had._** _Her son Andrew had to run for his life, and luckily he survived. But in the long tradition of Mothers Against Drunk Driving and Moms Demand Action, she wasn't going to just go on with her life, feeling lucky. __**She wept for the four sets of parents whose kids didn't come home, and decided to do something about it.**_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc0677a5-2d6a-48c3-8798-83f666bf3a34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _We need public servants like Busch who care about their community and run not for power, but what's right. For these very same reasons, Rep. James, who won by the skin of his teeth last time, MUST become an ex-Congressman._ [**_Busch just kicked off her campaign. Will you join us in helping her gear up immediately by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to this brave, empathetic mother & congressional candidate, so we can take the House and pass the gun safety measures we so desperately need?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T24c0fb3b-3a77-4612-96e3-62cf90e8c9da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for trying to put an end to our country's gun madness._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc076623d-ae46-4ce2-aa5c-000ac89e32ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

James, who won by the skin of his teeth last time, MUST become an ex-Congressman. Thank you for trying to put an end to our country's gun madness. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | or

Friend,
Coach Tuberville here.
I'm a conservative Republican representing the great state of Alabama in the U.S. Senate.
Today, I'm reaching out because I've been told you're a conservative patriot who wants to Save America. And I need to make you aware of the Biden administration's latest attack on
our traditional values.
Last October, a few months after the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin announced that the Defense Department (DOD) would _pay service_ _members to travel out of state to receive abortions._
You read that right - Biden's DOD wants to use YOUR taxpayer money to fund abortions. This policy is rotten to the core. It's immoral. It's unlawful. And it undermines our Constitution. **[If you stand with me, please fight back with a generous contribution>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfsmi5mdrdhbigftl5hfo9j98o8gva1qnpaeriv0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpim0oj4c5h2bs)**

I'm proud to have the support of more than 20 Republican members of the U.S. House of Representatives in taking this stand.
And I'm grateful for the letter they sent, informing the GOP Senate leadership that we'll NEVER BACK DOWN in the fight to preserve life and protect the rule of law.
[I hope you'll support us in this battle by rushing an emergency contribution now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf9ftdgodtp5llbt3jrhkelke6up8ecjbmio0ii8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpim0oj4c5h2bs) Thanks in advance for your help,

| CHESTERFIELD GOP MEETING TONIGHT
---
| | |
---|---
|
Dear Friends,

Join us tonight at the Chesterfield County Republican Committee at Swift Middle School, 3700 Old Hundred Rd S, Midlothian, VA 23112. We'll be there at 6:30pm for the short meet & greet segment before the meeting, which begins at 7pm.

We also have an event this coming Thursday, April 27 . Please see the invite below.

And come visit our office this week to help with mail projects, phone calls, or door-to-door.

We look forward to seeing you this week.
For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

body:
I’m a conservative Republican representing the great state of Alabama in the U.S. Senate.

| | | **🚨 IMPORTANT 🚨**
_The Pentagon’s immoral and illegal expansion of its authority to advance the left’s extreme pro-abortion agenda is wrong._
---
[**FIGHT BACK NOW >>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18686%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CSflVW2Icl79PKJRHpSh8Q&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
Coach Tuberville here.
I’m a conservative Republican representing the great state of Alabama in the U.S. Senate.
Today, I’m reaching out because I’ve been told you’re a conservative patriot who wants to Save America. And I need to make you aware of the Biden administration’s latest attack on
our traditional values.
Last October, a few months after the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin announced that the Defense Department (DOD) would _pay service_ _members to travel out of state to receive abortions._
You read that right - Biden’s DOD wants to use YOUR taxpayer money to fund abortions. This policy is rotten to the core. It’s immoral. It’s unlawful. And it undermines our Constitution. **[If you stand with me, please fight back with a generous contribution>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18687%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UUXAzGsdy0RsrdgNrTqmSA&sysid=1)**
---
[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18688%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kvPM1qChHGyyAGYme4OJDw&sysid=1)
---
Make no mistake - I’m not just paying lip service to this issue. _I recently announced that I_ _would block ALL of Biden’s military flag officer appointments until this policy is rescinded._
I’m proud to have the support of more than 20 Republican members of the U.S. House of Representatives in taking this stand.
And I’m grateful for the letter they sent, informing the GOP Senate leadership that we’ll NEVER BACK DOWN in the fight to preserve life and protect the rule of law.
[I hope you’ll support us in this battle by rushing an emergency contribution now.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18689%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mHpOwkhX3ySiEQp6RVAzXA&sysid=1) Thanks in advance for your help,
Coach Tuberville

subject: Will you renew your membership for the 4th consecutive year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is your LAST chance.

|

**Are you there? I still haven’t heard back from you ...**

Friend,

It’s Kevin McCarthy. Because you are one of our _**TOP**_ patriots, I am giving you _**one last chance**_ to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership and confirm you are a patriot willing to fight for the future of our country. **[Will you please confirm before the deadline passes?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665161%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=91fWQIycOHXizXCnGjv07Q&sysid=1 "Will you please confirm

name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18938?t=1001&akid=3175%2E346206%2EU9gGuw ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230424-3175-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3175_346206_U9gGuw&akid=3175%2E346206%2EU9gGuw

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3175%2E346206%2EU9gGuw

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Friend, in 2022, with the odds stacked against us, Democrats made history by holding down and expanding our Senate majority. **After the conservative Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade in June, and Republicans started threatening a national abortion ban, we knew we couldn't rest for a second.**

Now, the GOP has taken back the House, and they're using their power at every level of government to attack our fundamental rights. Just earlier this month, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas overturned FDA approval of mifepristone, the most commonly used method of abortion in America.

And now, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has signed a bill to ban abortion after just six weeks – a point at which most women don't even know they are pregnant.

**Let me be perfectly clear: They will not stop until abortion is outlawed in America.**
We need to get to work today if we want to have a chance at protecting our reproductive rights and holding Republicans accountable for their blatant attacks on our fundamental freedoms.

Our membership numbers will help determine whether or not we're able to keep control of the Senate and the White House and flip the House to stop a national abortion ban. I need you to stand with me and American Bridge to defeat the Republicans who are on a warpath to ban abortion nationwide.
**[Please, friend, help me reach our goal of activating 1,000 new April Democratic Memberships by midnight. Rush $25 right now. name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgliaaa3o8rrnk599pq6u1p2lktcmh2dg3sm4j48_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpimaor6cph2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjngbah0416om2laf6n06o3evgp225pke6358ai8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpimaor6cph2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo855ovbrcamd1icpfe8ag2trqaf5q9vjqqp1gjo_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpimaor6cph2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkrlbeskoin7r3pcdba07hsgalgsbaqecogrov7o_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpimaor6cph2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt8flmtaov9j01b4pt8dhr0g10cvjvcp3mdmj8u8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpimaor6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd0s31nhq9g4rqi75u38t6hj2rd13vq3d4hc9uio_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpimaor6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z54bik8mm8uj1bue4du20ffip94utmi7p3cq3k9o_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpimaor6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4aas401prp6r8803acgm6vbslr0netqcku80hmo_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpimaor6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3a5qdt3alqb3kuakhk5n9fmjj037aq798tn45j8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpimaor6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z04ffp3o10bukb6iipq0icfp4cmqfkvrr3l09j9g_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpimaor6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6catpp2202mhtk9u5l7ajnbmnu6elgnvifqim80_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpimaor6cph2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zandslf5fd71n03atbt8gfa0aid59plqiasi8rfo_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpimaor6cph2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj3cltif877hqhg1ffk9mlsldvm9fbvtdd6eh2r8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpimaor6cph2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zido9snracfjdvcvsdo46ugl05ro3j797i7jnrs0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpimaor6cph2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za74u2vec3h9fsp4rp1h6qni9e2mhfdad497ns6o_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpimaor6cph2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

Trump Train News

body:

I need patriots I can trust, Friend.

My Senate Republican colleagues and I just left a BIG 2024 Election meeting, but we ran into a problem - we needed more up-to-date information to make better strategic decisions.

I'm entrusting YOU with completing the **[Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5545bim08h3afe1ldm8c47e0hbqlnt0dket6ue8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpim2pr6clh2bs)** because of your excellent track record of providing valuable input for the Conservative movement.

Your opinions, concerns, and interests are CRITICAL to formulating our 2024 campaign platform. We can only **WIN** in 2024 when we create an agenda __that best represents the will of the American people.__

You'll be the voice of your fellow patriots in your area, so we're counting on your quick response.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: They gave Lia Thomas the trophy all for a photo-op…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I was told that the NCAA hadn’t planned for a tie

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze424mk1b1dps2m9bbn897qubvbc8vb97ildto3g_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpim2pr2cph2bs)
---

My name is Riley Gaines. I'm a 12 time All-American swimmer with 5 SEC titles under my belt after my time at the University of Kentucky.

After college, my dream was to become a dentist. Unfortunately, my life completely changed when I was forced to share a locker room with and compete against biological male Lia Thomas at the 2022 NCAA Women's Swimming Championship.

**It gets worse:** When I tied with Lia Thomas - down the _hundredth_ of a second - I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes...

My story is not unique. Unfortunately, countless young girls and women like myself are being sidelined as biological males infiltrate and dominate our competition.

**That 's why I'm taking a stand against Democrats' attacks against women's sports.**

_The "Party of Science" doesn't believe in biological differences.
The "Party of Women" doesn't support women.
Democrats are erasing our dreams in the name of wokeness._

Fortunately, Republicans in the House have introduced a bill that would codify the protections that women have been able to count on for generations, ensuring that biological girls will have an equal playing field. Together, we're making it clear we will not stand for discrimination against girls and women in sports. But Joe Biden is threatening to do just the opposite - to cement into law the destruction of women's sports...

So, I'm humbly asking on behalf of millions of female athletes dreaming big - **[will you stand with me?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo85dd0i5cc2f68so7lbcemdeg2n77pgm3p12lqg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpim2pr2cph2bs "will you stand with me?")** If we fail, I fear this could be the end of female athletic competition as we know it...

name: Riley Gaines
subject: They gave Lia Thomas the trophy all for a photo-op…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I was told that the NCAA hadn’t planned for a tie

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665186%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eRK3uqqopeF5nTZU%2fVi58A&sysid=1)
---

My name is Riley Gaines. I’m a 12 time All-American swimmer with 5 SEC titles under my belt after my time at the University of Kentucky.

After college, my dream was to become a dentist. Unfortunately, my life completely changed when I was forced to share a locker room with and compete against biological male Lia Thomas at the 2022 NCAA Women’s Swimming Championship.

**It gets worse:** When I tied with Lia Thomas - down the _hundredth_ of a second - I was told that the NCAA hadn’t planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes...

My story is not unique. Unfortunately, countless young girls and women like myself are being sidelined as biological males infiltrate and dominate our competition.

**That’s why I’m taking a stand against Democrats’ attacks against women’s sports.**

_The “Party of Science” doesn’t believe in biological differences.
The “Party of Women” doesn’t support women.
Democrats are erasing our dreams in the name of wokeness._

Fortunately, Republicans in the House have introduced a bill that would codify the protections that women have been able to count on for generations, ensuring that biological girls will have an equal playing field. Together, we’re making it clear we will not stand for discrimination against girls and women in sports. But Joe Biden is threatening to do just the opposite - to cement into law the destruction of women’s sports...

So, I’m humbly asking on behalf of millions of female athletes dreaming big - **[will you stand with me?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665187%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N6Id6VHc9vbjV9deGcEdKQ&sysid=1 "will you stand with
me?")** If we fail, I fear this could be the end of female athletic competition as we know it...

---
| | [STAND WITH RILEY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665188%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ebcowRRqJy1GRYbHgx2uhA&sysid=1)
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
It’s Senator Rick Scott – or as some call “The Least Popular Man in Washington.”

**I’ve been given that title for 2 reasons** \- I challenged Mitch McConnell for Republican Leader and I demanded that Republicans stop caving to Democrats.
Every day in Washington, I see some Republicans caving into a one-way, woke compromise with the Democrats – _and I won’t have it_.
I didn’t run for Senate to make friends with Mitch McConnell, Chuck Schumer, or Joe Biden.
In fact, I must be doing something right if they aren’t happy with me.
[**Stand with me as I demand new, bold conservative leadership!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=c4ea5f4278e040cb92ac0b08d6a178be&_e=C5gt6L5ajLC2K3PSeb-YCVmfIRFm_e7odgwmSTJRy5rdrj7QAUv6SJw7lmO_ULcn-JGf9sXN1t6prMPk_iO2K9dZL_OWnMQUj8beOC2j_CpF9O936vyAG4N0YNhuedGx9ejv4bHcJTDelpImFcG2lz7oF0HdnudYt_gJuOj9w4EXqbYtaHdmNzcN_V9uXQ8WZU72hPM_8DmwI_bk_TiW8LPN8Y-i0XVgM5HVVoWKlu40KzFuGRDjaLfDTjPbJA9rWsSSfxAbIe8o4swR30YNK56MwDzQUxjjsI0zGwP70WbPf_YsnjxEl8-b69q7z6r5cl-Lex0TAozsXkuRCP0rMbleDyTAhrVPiFxDGwqlQRqnONjbGjvO9uygAkpOttLi)

body:
| | | Peter, I remember the feeling just before we launched a mission during my time as a Special Operations Officer in the Navy.

Your whole body would buzz, and you’d be hyper-focused on your first move. You knew there was no room for error, because America was on the line.

I may have hung up my uniform, but right now, we’re about to start a bold new mission, and I have that same feeling in my bones.

**My team is on a mission to raise $5K before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT in our mission to defeat the radical Left, and I’m counting on my most dedicated patriots to step up to the plate.**

[**Pitch in before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to meet our $5K daily deadline and UNLEASH American potential. >>>**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=ebb84b4153484691a5fb7c1492d3d6a5&_e=71ke9ZHcPu5Zb7-LzKP7kCBbZzvi3_UBnCIBlZQjg5Qth_BJBzmWt_X62gvW7UjJjtTGpY7mrPkaNje0nQBId_Wdr0Pk3DAZRq30jrcEuz6iHWPr0poSs1ivRw_LbewONMLGWEi6LUNmQNGQmfO7WOEK60kasGUU4LkapTVSLt12ox2FoxZU_OVqvOWg7C4HB5VPj7t5x6remECWGSrR64xEa6xx8flqI1J6GOZKB8HEtoRN2r6zTwl5fdBNTMx5y2uG6NUaazaCp8_7WGoNDzcZKGW41OsHb5s5yIXLrl_MjQXxY6rn0fQcPCUDuLti2IubQTAeTeRQ7K9qP-d7SsX49ERoOLNFeypxN-vr10A%3D)

Service is in our DNA, and we can’t watch America spiral from our sofas.

That’s why even though my military career is over, I won’t sit on the sidelines while the Left tries to cage American potential.

They don’t want our country to succeed, but I know in the freest nation on Earth, the sky is the limit for what we can do.

It’s time to UNLEASH America from the Left’s tyranny, but we can’t do that unless we meet our CRITICAL deadline before midnight tonight.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: Urgent Follow Up: Konnech Case Dropped and More
body:
Major legal victory | | | | | |
---
| | Hi Friend -
Last week, we shared with you that the Konnech v. True the Vote lawsuit was headed towards discovery. Today, we share with you that Konnech has indeed dropped the lawsuit, notably after last week’s email to you in which we shared [so much evidence.](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=db5c9edb6a&e=ad8cba7e98)
You know better than most, this was the very lawsuit that landed Gregg Phillips and I in federal prison – for refusing to name a source. Meanwhile, they had accused us of defamation, of hacking their servers, and pursuing them out of racist and xenophobic intent (none of which happened).
Think about the kinds of projects we take on - we don’t engage in these efforts because they are “low-risk” or because we expect the system to always favor justice. This time it has and for that we are very grateful.
True to form, there was no mainstream media coverage; however, the victory was memorialized [here](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=c17326a6ca&e=ad8cba7e98) and [here](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=d8708e9e28&e=ad8cba7e98), and in the video below, you can hear Gregg share his firsthand account on Steve Bannon’s War Room.
---
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=06e6964c31&e=ad8cba7e98)
We hope you have already received the press release giving notice that the Konnech suit was dropped, but ... maybe not. In the events of last week, True the Vote’s website was (again) targeted and taken offline. [(We’ve included the notice here once more).](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=59e7afafad&e=ad8cba7e98)
This is not a rare occurrence for us – the haters are going to hack, and the haters are many. While everything is smoothly up and running again, hacking attempts are made on our sites thousands of times each week. In fact, it’s actually one of our KPI’s, one of our signals that we are over the target – that we pose a material threat to these forces that are nothing less than evil. It was almost as soon as we started getting positive buzz about Konnech that our website was hit, proving yet again that the opposition is desperate to remove us from the battlefield.
Even as we celebrate this victory, we must also acknowledge that our fight is far from over. The Konnech lawsuit (and a half dozen more currently underway) have cost us millions of dollars in legal fees. It's clear that this form of lawfare is designed to drive organizations like ours into bankruptcy. And while the Konnech battle ends (for the moment), the collective opposition has delivered some very forceful blows. We need your help to continue fighting for election integrity and to stand up against those who try to silence us.
We will win, but not without you. [**The most important thing you can do right now is donate.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=a154dbcb06&e=ad8cba7e98)
[**Please consider supporting True the Vote today. Every contribution, big or small, makes a difference and helps us continue this critical work.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=3488293736&e=ad8cba7e98)
We can’t thank you enough for your continued support and dedication to our cause. Gregg and I stood in the gap for this Konnech fight, but you were the wind in our sails - and you allowed for this beautiful victory.
Together, we will protect the sanctity of our elections and ensure that every voice is heard and every vote is counted.
As always – stay strong, stay vigilant, and stay informed.
Ever onward -

P.S. — Lest you think that lawfare is all that takes up our days, we’re still hard at work on other platforms and plans to advance our shared mission and build community around these efforts. Join us here on both [Open.Ink](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=869ca2a3a5&e=ad8cba7e98) and [Onward.Social](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=73fcd0365d&e=ad8cba7e98) to learn more about our adventures in freedom.
P.P.S — Buen Camino! Yes, if you just checked out the Onward.Social app, I am currently walking the Camino de Santigo in Spain. Nevertheless, it’s still my top priority that you hear directly from me – hence this note today :). Please reach out to me [on the trail!](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ffcb6a967c&e=ad8cba7e98)
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ea5b70b685&e=ad8cba7e98)
| | | | |
---

You are receiving this email because you opted in for updates via the True the Vote website.

**Our mailing address is:**
True the VotePO Box 3109# 19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=bb1c7c8024) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=bb1c7c8024).
|

clean_body: | | | BREAKING NEWS: President Biden is expected to launch his 2024 campaign – and an announcement could come as soon as TOMORROW! In light of this huge update, we need to confirm our data: 12-HOUR FLASH POLL Friend: President Biden has spent his first term in office delivering HUGE victories for American families. Because of his hard work, we are fighting the climate crisis, rebuilding our infrastructure, keeping our communities safe from gun violence, empowering working families and moving our country toward a brighter, better future. But if Republicans retake the White House, they'll destroy all of this progress and push our country backward. These next couple of days are absolutely crucial to ensuring that President Biden has the momentum he needs to win reelection. Please, will you respond to our urgent flash poll before it expires in the next 12 hours? We're counting on 5,000 Democratic responses to be certain that President Biden will have the on-the-ground support that he needs to combat right-wing attacks! 12-HOUR FLASH POLL Do you approve of President Biden? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand
