name: Wisconsin Republicans
subject: Poll: Who do you want to be the official nominee?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
Help us put a strong conservative back in the White House.
| [](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=9c2b2533a1dc4902afc64d7b61e044af&_e=nCktAJ56iJ2WUpMOguM8BAkDX8ts-2QYaGKRDUVsaM-uX2ijBGvFwwg0qa4u2k8DQ2PoukSCu-wPfNqWwhhfheec7kwuDHaZ_ZUryGqJgd5SqYrkm4P-9FAuedEizQlz2nSGKMSeVByBHqsTndc4R1ETl_JepCy_CNDyak9pcRq2swm0bb_HCeMAGQ02qc80U6mPVUxLgfFczBrp2-45YTtigG7sHW6QVOTpf4SjwrVpVNoHWkil70IdYNlid-DYNYPUR3G4rtlG47dCnGMlqbX2_e8yYKVv8LzXA1Gg1lRBbmbSB2B-miNcnKaIw_K7eC22uxvZIWl0tfs_aJnGAJYt2Vh6kaD6Cspt8jBUTe4%3D)
---
Friend,
---
We are hosting the Republican convention right here in Milwaukee in July of 2024 where the FIRST presidential primary debate will be held.
---
**As the state that will decide the fate of the White House, the nation’s top battleground state, hosting this convention is vital to Republicans sharing their winning message with voters.**
---
Wisconsin will be the center of attention as Republicans fight against the Biden-Baldwin policies that have only ended in disaster for our great state.
---
_But now, as we prepare for this convention, we want to hear from you on who you want to become the official Republican nominee and represent our party in November 2024._
---
[**Please take our official poll to let us know who you want to be the Republican nominee for the 2024 Presidential Election.**](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=9c2b2533a1dc4902afc64d7b61e044af&_e=nCktAJ56iJ2WUpMOguM8BAkDX8ts-2QYaGKRDUVsaM-uX2ijBGvFwwg0qa4u2k8DQ2PoukSCu-wPfNqWwhhfheec7kwuDHaZ_ZUryGqJgd5SqYrkm4P-9FAuedEizQlz2nSGKMSeVByBHqsTndc4R1ETl_JepCy_CNDyak9pcRq2swm0bb_HCeMAGQ02qc80U6mPVUxLgfFczBrp2-45YfrciI7XLT_NxOxXTTeKPhJBdq02cBT9ZCfu69xqWiATxMv90vhUxqfAgt5uL8qC_ZcOSCXAiotuJRso50avLYwlBevAjrB288TO6WDQwviYuS_vH6mjP17LDXLZgcg4pGk1mu4iD3uG9-chDQmtysc%3D)
---

**_Official Republican Presidential Nominee Poll_** **Participant:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **Polling ID #:** 3845-129 **Status:** [Pending] [**TAKE THE POLL >>**](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=9c2b2533a1dc4902afc64d7b61e044af&_e=nCktAJ56iJ2WUpMOguM8BAkDX8ts-2QYaGKRDUVsaM-uX2ijBGvFwwg0qa4u2k8DQ2PoukSCu-wPfNqWwhhfheec7kwuDHaZ_ZUryGqJgd5SqYrkm4P-9FAuedEizQlz2nSGKMSeVByBHqsTndc4R1ETl_JepCy_CNDyak9pcRq2swm0bb_HCeMAGQ02qc80U6mPVUxLgfFczBrp2-45YWxFh3pdubWp09HbaRsa_wWNbwm8WMzRRtEHH4fyoCduzoxw5uwkrsEaKJ9MSPBOZCL2ytCFnLfV5juPplJ8GXXkluPa2llLIrcicu6bsmgeYkKZbW7CsWUCHwF0mo6mGht3EKXunWohW1QNc5dwr8M%3D)
---

We need grassroots conservatives like YOU to help us prepare a winning strategy to deliver our battleground state for Republicans.
---
_But we can’t do that if we don’t know who Wisconsinites want as their official nominee._
---
**Democrats hosted their convention in Milwaukee in 2020 because they KNOW how important Wisconsin is in deciding the future of our country.**
---
2024 is our chance to put a strong conservative in the White House to fix the destruction that Biden and the radical Left created.
---
[**So please, take our official poll to let us know who you want to be the Republican nominee for the 2024 Presidential Election.**](https://links.wisconsinrepublicanparty.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=9c2b2533a1dc4902afc64d7b61e044af&_e=nCktAJ56iJ2WUpMOguM8BAkDX8ts-2QYaGKRDUVsaM-uX2ijBGvFwwg0qa4u2k8DQ2PoukSCu-wPfNqWwhhfheec7kwuDHaZ_ZUryGqJgd5SqYrkm4P-9FAuedEizQlz2nSGKMSeVByBHqsTndc4R1ETl_JepCy_CNDyak9pcRq2swm0bb_HCeMAGQ02qc80U6mPVUxLgfFczBrp2-45YSVSCnCHLQWXbOxVyZ-xH_E-UZgBxO88fBli-HrdeWcQMoaypbEfOXsmmtuIEy3p_ypiRNTftq5S2G120g37C4j7EVWHqnS6uM2yxFf8KggSDRNqADFFak5JjYi6NqOK3CrgjM1EoHYNFFBHF4DAYnA%3D)

Thank you,

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: please read, don’t delete
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
[_**Peter, I want to pull back the curtain and level with you about what’s really going on in Congress. Please let me take a moment of your time and explain. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62227590/402764972/-1810142053?refcode=20230424_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzE1ODA0ZC1hOGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0hpWc-tPeif3RwTo1mDKiaEm5NUWLYezN2PVysJ4teE=) Our Democrats are trucking against all odds. We’re continuing to deliver for the American people, push partisan politics aside, and work on the issues that matter most. But MAGA Republicans are busy defending insurrectionists, calling for a tax increase on the middle class, and pursuing baseless investigations against us and President Biden. name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW_PCFiDbN

You are an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly. You
love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S.
Constitution says

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW_PCFiDbN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Good day,
fellow American.

You are
an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly.

You love
this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S.
Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to
stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty
that define our nation.

Your
leadership and knowledge are needed today…

Do you
believe the American education system is failing millions of
young Americans?
YES
NO

We need
more citizens like you-informed citizens-because America is at a
turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold
thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the
Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism.

The
country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore
knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We
can't let that happen!

That's
why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of
Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative-the CAMPAIGN
FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.

We are
the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and
teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal
of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable
Americans who understand:

WHAT
the Constitution says
HOW
it relates to current issues and events
WHY
the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to
liberty

If this
campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the
Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people,
that our education system failed.

These are
young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just
haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history
in school.

You are
essential to the success of this effort to make America more
knowledgeable.

That's
because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach
the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to
10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative
starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.

And we
must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer
support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student
grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you
who want what's best for the country.

So
please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on
the State of American Education today at the link below. Thank
you for reading my email!
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61734819:W_PCFiDbN:m:3:2532013465:913B3C35E7EF09A60EDEFFCC4DB359CE:r

For our
children,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iW_PCFiDbN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW_PCFiDbN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says Please see a special message from our sponsor: Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. Your leadership and knowledge are needed today… Do you believe the American education system is failing millions of young Americans? YES NO We need more citizens like you-informed citizens-because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can't let that happen! That's why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative-the CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand: WHAT the Constitution says HOW it relates to current issues and events WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable. That's because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to 10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country. subject: your response requested >>

body:
| Thanks to Trump’s far-right Supreme Court Justices like Brett Kavanaugh and Clarence Thomas, public opinion of the Court is PLUMMETING.

**_As a trusted Democrat in your city, do YOU approve of the Supreme Court?_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/SCOTUS_poll23/?source=VPP_20230424_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=7291%2E878179%2EMDZDVX) | [NO, I DON’T APPROVE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/SCOTUS_poll23/?source=VPP_20230424_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=7291%2E878179%2EMDZDVX)
---
[YES, I DO APPROVE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/SCOTUS_poll23/?source=VPP_20230424_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=7291%2E878179%2EMDZDVX)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/SCOTUS_poll23/?source=VPP_20230424_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=7291%2E878179%2EMDZDVX)
* * *
The MAGA majority on the Supreme Court is OUT OF CONTROL:

❌ They DESTROYED _Roe v. Wade_ and are on track to BAN abortion pills.
❌ They GUT the Voting Rights Act any chance they get.
❌ Clarence Thomas took lavish BRIBES from a GOP mega donor.

With upcoming cases challenging so many things like elections, student loan forgiveness, and reproductive freedom – **_we’re worried!_**
**So we need to hear from 10,000 supporters before midnight.**
[**Answer Immediately: Do you approve of the Supreme Court?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/SCOTUS_poll23/?source=VPP_20230424_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=7291%2E878179%2EMDZDVX)
[NO WAY! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/SCOTUS_poll23/?source=VPP_20230424_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=7291%2E878179%2EMDZDVX)
---
[YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/SCOTUS_poll23/?source=VPP_20230424_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=12&akid=7291%2E878179%2EMDZDVX)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/SCOTUS_poll23/?source=VPP_20230424_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=13&akid=7291%2E878179%2EMDZDVX)
Thank you,

_\- VPP_

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

I answer these questions and more on Liz Wheeler's podcast this week. You can listen to it on whatever app you use to listen to podcasts. But here's the [video version](https://substack.com/redirect/920da619-46e2-49cb-a6c9-e37dfa5adbca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on Rumble. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: Stacked against Christians
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Fellow American I gave my life to Christ when I was in fifth grade. But fifth graders today are facing a cultural, political, and social climate that is stacked against Christians. Public schools are teaching sex education to fourth graders, telling kindergarteners to choose their gender, and writing curriculum based on critical race theory. As Christians, we have a strong sense of right and wrong, good and bad, true and false. Yet, our nation's children are being shaped by an education system that vehemently disagrees with our beliefs. **_America needs Christians who have the Holy Spirit working in their lives to stand up for what they believe and let the light of truth into our schools, communities, and culture._** That's exactly why **TPUSA Faith** launched **Kingdom to the Capitol** \- a series of live worship events in **_ALL FIFTY state capitals_** to ignite the flame of REVIVAL all across our country. **As a fellow believer in Christ, I want to invite you to attend Kingdom to the Capitol when we're in your state capital.** [**But whether or not you're able to attend, I hope you'll support TPUSA Faith with your generous gift of $35, $50, $75, or $100 to enable us to bring hundreds more people to each of our FIFTY worship events.**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[Support Kingdom to the Capitol](http://trk.readactnews._B2_DI8XcSw)
---
Our educational system should illuminate the world around us, helping us to see things as they truly are... revealing what's right, good, true, and beautiful. TPUSA Faith is on a mission to empower Christians who care about our nation's children and public education to go to school boards, classrooms, and city councils to boldly ask our leaders to do what is right. Right now, we have **Kingdom to the Capitol** events scheduled in Texas, Wisconsin, Virginia, and more, and we are planning future events in additional state capitals. These important events, empowered by the Holy Spirit and made possible by your generous partnership, have the potential to bring the hope of the Gospel to every state capital in America. [**Will you please pray for the success of our REVIVAL tour and support this mission for the glory of God, for the good of our nation's children, and the future of our nation?**](http://trk.readactnews.) I believe this is a season for revival for our nation. These are desperate times in America. Whether we're talking about public education, the spread of socialism, gender ideology, or abortion, you don't have to look far to see the darkness plaguing our country when it drifts from the truth of scripture. With the generous partnership of followers of Jesus - like you - TPUSA Faith will promote these powerful worship events far and wide, fill local church buildings with worshipers, and send an army of believers back into their communities. I pray that by coming together as believers in Christ, we will renew the hope of Christians and bring much-needed revival to our nation. [**As Christians, it often feels like we are being ganged up upon, which is why it's critical that we come together in powerful worship and prayer in EVERY state capital. But we can't do that without you. Will you please make a much-needed gift right now?**](http://trk.readactnews.) Our educational system should be filled with the Spirit as it teaches our children how to discern God's will, how to live in society, and how to be wise. But you and I both know that our current public education system has strayed as far as possible from this purpose. TPUSA Faith is working to engage, equip, and empower Christians to change the trajectory of public education - and our nation - for the future of our children. **Kingdom to the Capitol** is our most ambitious and historic revival tour yet, visiting every single state capital in America with the hope of restoring American Biblical values in schools and communities across our nation. [**Whether the Lord leads you to give $35, $50, $100, or some other amount, I hope you can support our FIFTY worship events during a desperate - and dark - time for America. In order to reach EVERY state capital, and save our nation, it's critical that we have your support today.**](http://trk.readactnews.-EP5temJYjLO0yHrulScw)

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m personally asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi, friend, it’s Sen. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean all work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you.
I’m running for reelection so I can keep fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. As the only remaining statewide Democrat in Ohio, analysts at CNN say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me.
The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio – so please, I’m personally asking: Will you give $20 or more right now – split between my campaign and Serve America – to help defend this battleground seat and keep the Senate blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-sherrod]
I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American.
But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and NBC News reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”
The long and short of it is, I can’t win – and Democrats simply can’t hold onto our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots support from folks like you.
That’s why I’m asking for your support today, friend: Please, will you chip in $20 or more now – split between my campaign and Serve America – so we can win in Ohio and defend the Senate? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-sherrod]
With gratitude,
Sherrod Brown

name: 7 Directions of Service
subject: Rights of Nature Law H.B. 795 Introduced in NC General Assembly!
body:
All you need to know about H.B. 795 + Rights of Nature events this week | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/8HToISgnFTOc8o1RQ8FP12MH4E6Sf6vQJvE_ojio4Yj6cBoP2vcn6KEpSm74SwRHohHAX8g5ATnPCv71yIyljYKEL7y4fDqHaI8IztpoOKrdO9ubOgFe5BwtfSC4GGsWxt09R_KsHAXOgTAlLWzSn_mZJKg_wuhwFAdl3gXEJcmWRJ96ZTqx8yWqFEY9V3lAbaMkTOdqYdqo-XHWL3YzEUlXX2rdYfjX5BiWBaBoEjVlwI51Ah4l9f1PB18AiU3p64oqyWX2YzS4Fhw6o2i34Js1ToigErIU3ej4E9NF0VL4wjVu9-uUQdZAodwxWnlGAAA6P0R7GwELg2T5KauyZOrKpu9nK_ICL2vcRblLkK8/3vm/q-CEEtczTXy1s3SQDALZqA/h0/nNaSM2dVUEeKTrMC7IkRJK9wt99Sd6I9DjUikuhK3Do)
---
---
Rights of Nature Law H.B. 795 Introduced in NC General Assembly Last week, legislation was introduced in the North Carolina General Assembly’s House of Representatives to recognize the rights of the Haw River. The Rights of the Haw River Ecosystem Act, H.B. 795, would be the first state-level Rights of Nature law in the U.S. Rights of Nature laws elevate the status of nature from “property” to a rights-bearing entity, like a person, and recognize the rights of ecosystems–and the human and natural communities that depend on them–as having legally enforceable rights to exist, regenerate, flourish and be free from pollution. [Read the full story here.](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/8HToISgnFTOc8o1RQ8FP12MH4E6Sf6vQJvE_ojio4YiSvxska56OrPK-07GbhbExNwIHCbtAHMay5CQ3PDb22PjJlyP-ltATPMCamjIDAofBUDfEPoDRYBPjjIhabhEKpkBk8ABZt1ojfM1VtC5i1lqZeqFWNckeHYYXx9Er4IsAfAeY1oy_08ObhjEoB7F-7qkkeX28W6Hrd7kVIVat3V7U_TgewSnYW_oCTfV80c0onatOJZJFPZ88WaW_8cQlGl2nQhirY6aMXHW1F82cY-rFojXzT1CeVbD9pZEutVtDNmObI0v8pndHUGpwczssqWDnh3AEVvtDwb_Mwo3w9T1DgH6TqvElM7ckgkUBlLty8NDiyo49XznfQT1_gXwSnePfgCJL84n7H6YyFkZaqY4mO_ePz96QSujHK2-OqP__UF7tb1mCVYlZ1tvMpl5h/3vm/q-CEEtczTXy1s3SQDALZqA/h1/-qtARkTbyQXgQQjA8rp_ztwzemuhRD37-OmmKyWUmuU)
---

clean_body: All you need to know about H.B. 795 + Rights of Nature events this week | | Rights of Nature Law H.B. 795 Introduced in NC General Assembly Last week, legislation was introduced in the North Carolina General Assembly’s House of Representatives to recognize the rights of the Haw River. The Rights of the Haw River Ecosystem Act, H.B. 795, would be the first state-level Rights of Nature law in the U.S. Rights of Nature laws elevate the status of nature from “property” to a rights-bearing entity, like a person, and recognize the rights of ecosystems–and the human and natural communities that depend on them–as having legally enforceable rights to exist, regenerate, flourish and be free from pollution. | | Join us for a community information session about the Indigenous-led movement for legal Rights of Nature, and its application to protect our waterways and communities in North Carolina. ** In each session, we’ll cover: The Indigenous-led Rights of Nature Movement Rights of Nature in NC Vision and Strategy Becoming an Advocate | Bila:huk, 7 Directions of Service | | | Sent via . Friend,
Of all the great polls that have been published recently, this one might be my favorite.
_**A new poll shows that voters believe that out of all the candidates, I care about voters the most.**_
It’s the truth!
I’m not in this race for myself. I’m not in this to get rich like Biden whose family has reportedly received money from China, Russia, Ukraine, and countries in the Middle East.
_I’m in this fight for YOU. _
Honest to God, I care about our country.
| [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc2q2zAQhZ9G3tlYox9LCy9uKnILgS7aRUs3QZXGyVws2dhyTd6-OOR2-53DcD7Gp3mk4dGz7sQA7hRXBsDEGwO4yNOvb_ry8-Jqz09z7bSS-5HCFwZQHjP-r76uNJg8jQftXBV7CAZCqLDn2oCQWoGs7n2QilsLivM_Vkv0OISguFRatF7xOFTUQwuilSC5BCO6plVGWG1NZ8RguQhMtjvlJk7Zj_GjLFuamzClauzvpczrc9KZwXnFsC3Y7JQXjEfjYP4v1j7hQsHXHxPlUg9bjounlfKtDlNKVAoig3MOo-WWK4EGbcs7bJGJ81bSNWGkLTHhXr76gOu0LQGZcIGu_sWCT7OnW2bCfTp9JlMumAsTznTaMtDXPFJkwr2V9-8mfn38KE_4_IhwN3d6H7T_7aqlj_NO40ir7phsb8eCw-1fAAAA__-zbIvc)

You _deserve_ to live in a country where your rights are respected, where you don’t have to worry about illegal aliens crossing our border or murderers being released from jail, and where you have confidence in our economy, our legal system, and our future.
_**That’s why it truly makes me sick to see what Biden, Kamala, and Soros are doing to America.**_
But, do not fear... We made our country great again once before – and on January 20, 2025, we will do it once again!

clean_body: And I’m so glad the people see it! | | | Friend, Of all the great polls that have been published recently, this one might be my favorite. A new poll shows that voters believe that out of all the candidates, I care about voters the most. It’s the truth! I’m not in this race for myself. I’m not in this to get rich like Biden whose family has reportedly received money from China, Russia, Ukraine, and countries in the Middle East. I’m in this fight for YOU. Honest to God, I care about our country. | You deserve to live in a country where your rights are respected, where you don’t have to worry about illegal aliens crossing our border or murderers being released from jail, and where you have confidence in our economy, our legal system, and our future. That’s why it truly makes me sick to see what Biden, Kamala, and Soros are doing to America. But, do not fear... We made our country great again once before – and on January 20, 2025, we will do it once again! Thank you, | Donald J. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Maxwell Frost is the kind of elected Democrat who gives the GOP cold sweats in the dark of night: They know from the midterms & WI Supreme Court race they can't beat him--or those like him--in a fair fight.
body:
Ron DeSantis’s bad week got worse
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td22692b6-2137-4e9a-a8e1-69d95eefd1e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Last week was quite an awful week for awful, sloppy autocrat Ron DeSantis. ** **_While Ft. Lauderdale was under water--due to policies worsened by his willful ignorance on climate change--gas lines in numerous areas of the Sunshine State began to form that looked like something out of the oil crisis in the 1970s._**_ Even right-wing soulmate Marco Rubio is complaining and calling for action._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te41ecf98-79ab-418a-9bd0-18d70a798f26/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Meanwhile, permitless-carry shootings are also occurring at a frightening pace and DeSantis is ignoring it all because he's a power-craving ghoul who won't leave his book tour to launch a presidential bid._**_ DeSantis did fly back in the dead of night when he hoped nobody was looking, however, to sign a cruel and dangerous abortion ban._** **__On the latter point, we got the perfect contrast to DeSantis. In response to his evil act signing the abortion ban, Florida Congressman, Maxwell Frost, got up and gave both an inspiring and blistering response.__** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T482e513d-cc27-4682-a303-3a9c295acc4c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Frost's only 26, the youngest Congress member. He's the future; part Latino, part Lebanese, part Black, wholly passionate equality and opportunity for all. Frost is what gives the GOP cold sweats in the dark of night: They know from the midterms & WI Supreme Court race they can't beat him--or those like him--in a fair fight._ [**_We need Frost and many more like him to run for public office. To be the face of opposition to greedy, gross DeSantis-ites. For his incredible speech--and for our future--will you give Rep. Maxwell Frost $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0edf8c8e-83e8-43fa-8e92-2aee47aff8dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for ensuring our future is democratic. And Democratic._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te8979b49-6f76-49aa-8ce9-67975f19126b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T651a2090-69ed-4bbf-9c67-074ec23274f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Will you renew your membership for the 4th consecutive year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is your LAST chance.

|
---
| | | |
---

**Are you there? I still haven’t heard back from you ...**

Friend,

It’s Kevin McCarthy. Because you are one of our _**TOP**_ patriots, I am giving you _**one last chance**_ to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership and confirm you are a patriot willing to fight for the future of our country. **[Will you please confirm before the deadline passes?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665197%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eL1GxS5Nooa7fmuB9h%2f6OA&sysid=1 "Will you please confirm
before the deadline passes?")**

Watch [Acts Pt. 2 - The Power Of Being](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20763138.11871.1.124a82197afad5a5d787d93ec5d22b21): [https://youtu.be/MVX8zj3wmzM](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20763138.11872.1.cf50f83423704b9a68e48f3505387721) **-Subscribe to[Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20763138.11873.1.494bbe3c526e0d2f3072c54014214c11)'s YouTube page**: [https://clr.cm/9gWE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20763138.11874.1.6dcaca92bf6e430c6dd1d6b079bf5f95) If you missed Acts Pt. 1, you can watch it here: [https://www.youtube.com/live/T51S0DLIAIc?feature=share](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20763138.11875.1.65dcd4abc7e0f809a264f32feacbcd89)

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I’m parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what’s _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdf2jfa6j1i15egiut5m4nfgp3u8tkc8649i29m0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm8p74c9h2bs "But with that in the rearview mirror, Iâm thrilled at whatâs coming next... ")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs846pffm0i3fkuad13vvgsgobpah39qcpi75gk8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm8p74c9h2bs "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It’s an emergency situation and we’re running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren’t going to give us an inch ... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can’t outsmart us when we’re the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze9pcbappvh92jssmn3luu2q983qum2tv0r9k8eg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm8p74c9h2bs "Look – if we want to win in 2024, itâs going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That’s why I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it’ll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we’ve ever seen before._

**But that’s a big “if” - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I’ll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg8di137t8uk2t8v345dus5vdgggado7b98alnt8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm8p74c9h2bs "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2acsvm2vckp0sloci2q9e73lkp0a7fha41ngjko_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm8p74c9h2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrl02ags10te1dc22qdql6g11k5qljf8050h8nt8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm8p74c9h2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0kruv34o6b96a2as1u8jpasehdvmjuib8mom4b0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm8p74c9h2bs)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze5h8kbrmhlm9usfek09ltjuos0h2ea6erfqjfo0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm8p74c9h2bs "image")
---

name: GIFFORDS
subject: [TAKE ACTION] Reject the overturning of the ATF’s stabilizing braces rule
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Pistols with stabilizing braces have been used in multiple mass shootings in recent years
#

Team -
Pistols with stabilizing braces have been used in multiple mass shootings in recent years: Covenant School, Boulder, Dayton, and Club Q.
Stabilizing braces when used with semi-automatic pistols are extremely dangerous because they essentially enable shooters to use the brace as a shoulder stock, creating a short-barrelled rifle. This means shooters can use the braces to create a firearm that is more accurate when firing multiple rounds, as well as more concealable and maneuverable when perpetrating a mass shooting. These weapons pose grave risks to the public and law enforcement.
Instead of working to pass commonsense legislation to save lives in the wake of recent deadly mass shootings, extreme Republicans are trying to overturn an ATF rule that rightfully classifies pistols with stabilizing braces as short-barreled rifles.
This is not a moment where we can stay on the sidelines. We need your help today.
[**Will you click here to sign our online petition to let us know that you reject the overturning of the ATF’s stabilizing braces ruling?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_stabilizingbracespet_apr23/?source=em230424-1-15&refcode2=5321.3935704.uu_J3E&akid=5321%2E3935704%2Euu_J3E)
**[SIGN ON](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_stabilizingbracespet_apr23/?source=em230424-1-15&refcode2=5321.3935704.uu_J3E&akid=5321%2E3935704%2Euu_J3E)**
You can also call our hotline at **202-335-5608** to urge your representative to vote NO on the GOP’s resolution of disapproval on the ATF’s rule.
[](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_stabilizingbracespet_apr23/?source=em230424-1-15&refcode2=5321.3935704.uu_J3E&akid=5321%2E3935704%2Euu_J3E)
Thank you for using your voice. More soon.
\- The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=5321%2E3935704%2Euu_J3E) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: VoteVets
subject: Seventeen Years
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
A lot of “progressive” organizations say they’re putting your donations to work, but they won’t spend a dime.
#
Seventeen years ago, we never would’ve guessed that VoteVets would become what it is today.
Back then, we were just a handful of Veterans hoping we could make a difference.
Today, we’re the largest group of progressive Veterans in the country with more than 1.5 million members.
A lot of “progressive” organizations say they’re putting your donations to work. But they don’t run a single ad, make a single call, or knock on a single door.
Not VoteVets.
We sent $500,000 in humanitarian relief to Ukraine. We combat the disinformation coming out of FOX News that targets Veterans. And we spend millions of dollars running hard-hitting ads in the toughest races in the country — $3.5 million in 2022 alone.
The work we do gets us fired up every day, but we need your help to keep it up.
**[So today, we’re asking you to make your first donation — $3 or whatever you can afford. $3 for an organization that fights for what’s right every single day.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-apr23.Brw65h&refcode=em230424-1-15&t=2&akid=8203%2E3013755%2E8eoCVC)

name: Taeka, Finance at Team Cori
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Here's the challenge we face right now.
#
Hey Peter,
There have been some numbers that are on my mind lately. Is it okay if I share them with you real quick?
* **6:** We are just **_6 days away_** from our April end-of-month fundraising deadline.
* **$25,000:** We've set a $25,000 goal for the month — which is **_critical for us**_ to be able to sustain our growing progressive movement
* **$18.68:** This is our average online donation this quarter. We're proud of this number because it represents the 100% people-powered movement that powers Cori's work in Congress.

I know these goals can seem overwhelming, but if enough of us can step up today and chip in, we can hit our $25,000 fundraising goal by the end of April. [**Will you chip in $18.68 or anything you can to help us reach this goal?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/1238?c0=cori-em-20230424.x0icdY&refcode=em20230424-2547&t=1&akid=2547%2E1082990%2Er4s7lP)
**[Donate $18.68](https://act.coribush.org/go/1238?c0=cori-em-20230424.x0icdY&refcode=em20230424-2547&t=20&akid=2547%2E1082990%2Er4s7lP)**
As the finance lead for Team Cori, I know what this movement is capable of when we work together. We don't take corporate PAC money or fund this campaign through a handful of contributions from wealthy donors.
**Instead, we focus on reaching out to our communities.** When we put our $1, $5, and $18.68 donations together, we have the power to create a new kind of politics that's built by real people and to fight for the transformative solutions our communities need.
**Together, we're showing the country and the establishment how powerful a people-centric, grassroots-powered campaign can be.**
But here's the challenge we face right now: We're tracking behind our fundraising and with **just 10 days** until our monthly bills are due, we can't afford to fall short.
Time is running out, but I know if we all work together, chipping in whatever we can afford, we can hit this goal. [**So Peter, can you chip in today?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/1238?c0=cori-em-20230424.x0icdY&refcode=em20230424-2547&t=21&akid=2547%2E1082990%2Er4s7lP)
Let's do this,
Taeka, Finance
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230424?refcode=em20230424-2547-footer&t=22&refcode2=2547_1082990_r4s7lP&akid=2547%2E1082990%2Er4s7lP) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=23&akid=2547%2E1082990%2Er4s7lP)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2547%2E1082990%2Er4s7lP)

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh104aqpocrknep3m2h5o2habimm5al5d2ohb9ig_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm2or2c3h2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zepu239qoe8i9bk662l9agigrogjq7tvhij6c9rg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm2or2c3h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlj8a2bp4ok6qc2v4d1hbc6uknqfu06f1a6jn7eo_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm2or2c3h2bs)
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zibg183dof26nev6hk9cc23b2ro33pp6cqpie770_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm2or2c3h2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zag28vq4gc2ila7i3kpcvs8r6n8rfuqvjs3m6398_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm2or2c3h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0rql3k4eb4qrs3bpjhb5njo9eqmqahuhg1ju1g0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm2or2c3h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z94ged9j7f7gbvb556ntnvpb1dkcigmtq8tpo9r0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm2or2c3h2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0qdqrtddcdq6igcqh0qbfpeujonap3nckbkdj10_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm2or2c3h2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4pg21k80rjjlsr9nqlethu1gg57fco0g19c6060_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm2or2c3h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgfd14oorjd8vpmk2b4f6l36hcp5qjs18i77rpc8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm2or2c3h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6can30eid3s2vmq46iqop1tv1jrin5fq8vdpavo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8o34s1ge0or246h22sh2s8i66o72cphm2or2c3h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4d9k642mgrk4b39ikq8us6ho771vvjd5sa2sj90_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphm2or2c3h2bs)_

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu7946okoa40k2pfat2dhi46hivear9c33sdkj68_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0s9j66ob3c9ge49fg)

body:
Please join us on Monday April 24th for a Get Out the Vote Rally featuring:
| | |

| Friend, Just wanted to remind you that TODAY, Monday April 24th **Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears will be holding a Get out the Vote Rally for our campaign in Bealeton, Virginia. ** Speakers Include: **Delegate Phil Scott, Delegate Nick Freitas, Delegate Michael Webert, Fauquier County Jeremy Falls, and Special Guest _Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears. _** If we are going to win this election on May 6th and defeat the Democrats in November, it is essential that we get out the vote and inform **_ALL Republicans_** on the upcoming elections. This is a free event, but we highly encourage you to please RSVP at the eventbrite link below: [_https://www.eventbrite.com/e/gotv-rally-tickets-618650409027_](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.eventbrite.com%2Fe%2Fgotv-rally-tickets-618650409027%3Ffbclid=IwAR2vp3-_7PKKA9yeJDUtpYLxZjbieOueTf_AxtPS61CqZeV6vo2gcJSySGo/1/01000187b3ecb019-4306366b-0b2a-4900-8547-4af2af470ba3-000000/U6U9WJJdelJOb-_k2Qy2t-T1eVE=318) Doors open at 5:30pm. We look forward to seeing everyone there!

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Why?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
This is a question I get a lot.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd4f8d8hdmdigc72k88qkhtg05i5lclds8poin10_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphmapb6cph2bs)
---
Friend,
Someone recently asked me...
_...Why are you still running for president after everything the Left has done to you? Why don’t you just go to a tropical island and live a very nice life?_
I get asked that question a lot.
**But no matter how tough this battle gets, I could _NEVER_ abandon America.**
America has given me everything I could ever have dreamed of. I truly love our country.
**And after seeing what the most incompetent and corrupt politicians have done to the greatest nation in history, I’m going to keep fighting to save our country.**
_I didn’t “have” to run for president, but I truly believe that this is my calling. The idea of giving up on America doesn’t even cross my mind._
And the more our enemies viciously try to stop me, the more I _**KNOW**_ that we MUST keep fighting to complete our mission to SAVE AMERICA.
I know you’ve already done a lot for this movement. History will forever remember the role you played in saving our country.
_But, if times aren’t too tough for you right now, even $1 could truly help our movement as the attacks against us get more and more vicious by the day._
[**Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA – for 1,500% impact.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9ug393086s2nvf21ju6eiolsg7hlo83254mgo2o_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphmapb6cph2bs)
Thank you,
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuvp9mkgdf0sq3vqup000fpipq02vocsmlefftn8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphmapb6cph2bs)

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro]Peter, My name is Mariah, and I am Wiley’s Finance Director. I am thrilled to have you on board as we kick off Wiley’s 2024 re-election campaign. Wiley has officially been added to the DCCC’s Frontline Candidate list, which means grassroots donations from supporters like you make an even bigger difference. Wiley defeated Bo Hines in 2022 and flipped this seat because he had a strong coalition behind him each step of the way. We need everyone on our team to step up once again this year and help us re-elect Wiley and protect this seat. I’d like to be honest with you, Peter. Campaigns across the board are struggling to reach their goals, but from what Wiley and the other team members have told me, our grassroots support is second to none. That said, we need to get a headstart on fundraising this cycle if we want to ensure Wiley continues leading the good fight in Congress. Can you rush in a $10 donation to Wiley’s re-election campaign right now? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro&amount=10] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: RUSH IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro&express_lane=true&amount=10] RUSH IN $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro&express_lane=true&amount=25] RUSH IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro&express_lane=true&amount=50] RUSH IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro&express_lane=true&amount=100] RUSH IN $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro&express_lane=true&amount=250] RUSH IN ANY AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro] I’ll be honest: Bo Hines will pull all the stops to unseat Wiley in 2024. We have no time to waste. This will surely be a tough fight, but if everyone on our team does their part, we will re-elect Wiley and continue having the best possible representative fighting for NC-13 in Congress. Can you rush in a donation of any size right now to help us show our strength? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-intro?refcode=2303-intro] I am so happy to be on this team and can’t wait to see all the incredible things we can accomplish together. Thank you, Peter. name: Coach
subject: [PETITION] Protect Female Athletes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Add your name >>>
| | | **Protect Women and Girls in Sports:**
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/e75e9c4f3ebff9ea/fa09eb72c65bbaecc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, For more than 50 years, Title IX has been a historic success for women and girls in this country. As a coach, educator, and mentor, I’ve seen its success firsthand. The Biden Administration’s policies have already taken a sledgehammer to Title IX, and this proposed rule of promoting biological males to unfairly compete against biological female athletes is another example of Joe Biden doing the bidding of the radical left. **I REFUSE to stand idly by as Woke Washington tries to erase strong women from the record books** –**** get off the sidelines and [**sign the petition for my _Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act_ today!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/e75e9c4f3ebff9ea/08d514663ddb4ba7c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** ** – Coach

name: Bruna at United We Dream Action
subject: Did you know this?
body:
Right now, DACA recipients are barred from accessing federally funded health insurance. | | | Peter, The first time my sister, Paloma, ever received health insurance was when she first got a job. But when she was part of pandemic layoffs, she was left without access to medical care — because she’s a DACA recipient. Outrageously unaffordable private health insurance is the only option for Paloma and hundreds of thousands just like her. **Right now, DACA recipients are barred from accessing federally funded health insurance. But that could change soon:** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8mx_5ABkFHmeFViL7NEeBD_AogMf18kAB-piHwjkW8FG4OaRsKe0RFGPEjrLADzriOal13uMDkGnNVc72Wp1KuIp0s_7qJ3NAeXnvkq41s372r6nOXS1qpNwNXvgpfXGd69YLTxEN1rQ9aa8DhxRdvr0kw-B3ihJU_-2akPXoOP_zeZVGZMpyEhCuETKJ7DBykn_o-wbDxs1SJWKEPaxKqjO6EWWOLqd6iWvq4NKP4SDbtF8y3hwbMUy4qzlRQUWIHmjF-Xd_ZelP2dQI6-ynZFd3ZElMx6VxzsH3tEhKTFTNEzTphnEnUgHaSqMaNbzxLXgtOCpnft3weKeQpFEb1Q/3vm/2HEKl182R8qH9x_v0g-Rrg/h0/lSmUMLnLr3_9k5dwCaGF5YHcYBCg-UWV2x3Ov-oLfOs) After years of organizing by our movement, Biden announced a new rule that would finally allow DACA recipients to access health care through Medicaid and Affordable Care Act coverage. While that’s great news for DACA recipients like my sister, the harsh truth is that there are millions more who could still end up in a position like she did because they don’t qualify for DACA. **That’s why UWDA is calling on Biden and Congress to expand a pathway to citizenship to include all 11 million. 1/3 of all DACA recipients don’t have health insurance, along with millions more undocumented people who miss out on federally funded health coverage.
The impacts of this can be devastating: 🏥 many don’t seek out care and risk worsening their condition, 💰 or are forced to pay unaffordable medical bills when they do.
That’s why we were thrilled to learn Biden is allowing DACA recipients to soon take advantage of Medicaid and ACA coverage. **But we know this doesn’t go far enough.**
The new rule is a step in the right direction, but we won’t stop fighting until ALL immigrant youth and undocumented people — not just DACA recipients — can access the same affordable health insurance options.

clean_body: Right now, DACA recipients are barred from accessing federally funded health insurance. | | | Peter, The first time my sister, Paloma, ever received health insurance was when she first got a job. But when she was part of pandemic layoffs, she was left without access to medical care — because she’s a DACA recipient. Outrageously unaffordable private health insurance is the only option for Paloma and hundreds of thousands just like her. Right now, DACA recipients are barred from accessing federally funded health insurance. But that could change soon: After years of organizing by our movement, Biden announced a new rule that would finally allow DACA recipients to access health care through Medicaid and Affordable Care Act coverage. While that’s great news for DACA recipients like my sister, the harsh truth is that there are millions more who could still end up in a position like she did because they don’t qualify for DACA. That’s why UWDA is calling on Biden and Congress to expand a pathway to citizenship to include all 11 million. Will you donate now to support our fight for permanent protections and make sure all undocumented people can access affordable health care? That’s why we were thrilled to learn Biden is allowing DACA recipients to soon take advantage of Medicaid and ACA coverage. But we know this doesn’t go far enough. The new rule is a step in the right direction, but we won’t stop fighting until ALL immigrant youth and undocumented people — not just DACA recipients — can access the same affordable health insurance options. body:
If House Republicans continue to miss their fundraising goals, we will SURELY lose our hold on the Majority for the House.

| |

---
| | | **FIRST:** House Democrats pledged $80,000,000+ to target swing districts in New York and California.

**THEN:** House Democrats announced they had outraised House Republicans by $12,000,000+.

**NOW:** Inside Elections has released their first set of House ratings of the cycle and we are **TIED. **

If House Republicans continue to miss their fundraising goals, we will SURELY lose our hold on the Majority for the House.

Everything is going to come down to **YOU** , Friend. The House GOP currently holds the narrowest Majority in decades. Top pollsters are already saying Dems have a chance to take back the House -- in fact, the odds they will are dead even. The stakes are clear: **our Majority could collapse like a house of cards if we aren 't careful.**

This is where you come in. Small dollar donors like yourself are who make up the financial backbone of political campaigns. Without your support, we won't be able to continue on.

_**[So, can we personally ask you to invest $5 in House Republicans efforts to DEFEND our Majority?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk04m8tmmpanuq25b8ruo96vco5a75f9412k28so_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphmepj4c5h2bs "So, can we personally ask you to invest $5 in House Republicans efforts to DEFEND our Majority?")**_
---
| | | [CHIP IN $5 >> INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk8gqj0dtq42usb72b0st8ug07ucu3vo4nju2lc8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphmepj4c5h2bs "CHIP IN $5 INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS")

Thank you,
Republican HQ

body:
When I look at this photo it reminds me how diabolically clever SEAL training is designed to be.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9igorv9ps1eagf00bto37df7lar94h3lq1jf618_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphmepj4c5h2bs)
---

When I look at this photo it reminds me how **_diabolically clever_** SEAL training is designed to be.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2i8t7bjj1cjsn9kmmao8j1nb701m035k6dqs6vg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphmepj4c5h2bs)
---

Many orders given to class are impossible to meet resulting in inevitable failure.

You must consistently remember while you're in the midst that the instructors want to see how you react when things _" aren't fair"_ and when you lose.

It's easy to be a tough guy or rockstar on a fair level playing field, **_but the real you is exposed in the eye of the storm when the deck is stacked against you._**

I've only been in Congress a short time, but there's too many people serving in our Congress who try to be rockstars without ever facing any form of true adversity.

**[I know this because I've lived it, friend.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5d1r3kv5uvs6asn1at9iul8nklu9fc4tld4g0q0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphmepj4c5h2bs "I know this because I’ve lived it, friend.")**

I'm a combat veteran, small-business owner, husband, father, and one damn proud American.

I've been on five war time deployments, three of them to the Middle East with SEAL Team 3 and served our country for 13 years - protecting and defending America's freedom, way of life, and Constitution.

I'm not in Congress to make friends, I'm here to stand up for our way of life. That's why from day one I've gone against the traditional way of doing things and made some real noise.

_You 've seen it, friend._ _**I 'm putting America First.**_

_Unfortunately,_ the D.C. Swamp is after me because of it. They know my seat is controlled by real working class, grassroots donors like yourself.

---
| | [STAND AGAINST THE SWAMP](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2go20dmbkdhftob1t7v7v7rcgu80cgqa1tiuq4o_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphmepj4c5h2bs)
---
If we fail to fundraise they will call in their liberal coastal elite donors and do anything to take my seat and your voice in Congress away.

**[That's why I'm reaching out to you today, friend - will you stand with me in the fight against the D.C. establishment and defend the America First agenda?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg2sg88ned43b54lr0od408tl94e35mubfpqv6dg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cphmepj4c5h2bs "That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, friend - will you stand with me in the fight against the D.C. establishment and defend the America First agenda?")**

---

---

Thank you,

Eli Crane

subject: Capitol Report April 24, 2023

body:
Guns and Transgender bills leave House, advance to Senate | | | |
---
| | |
# Capitol Report
April 24, 2022
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **Contact Senator Roberts** 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329
Jefferson City, MO 65101
(573) 751-4415
Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov
---
| | | | | | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=01e7762ed2&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=aab2114b36&e=a088917f89)
---
| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=a66894e3f8&e=a088917f89)
---
|
---
| **Bill allowing guns on buses, in churches advances to Senate** Concealed weapons permit holders would be allowed to carry firearms on public transit and in churches under legislation the House of Representatives approved April 17 on a vote of 102-45, with four members voting “present.” The bill now advances to the Senate.

Under existing law, concealed weapons are prohibited in certain places. House Bill 282 would remove public transit and churches from the prohibited list. Weapons can currently be brought into churches with the pastor’s permission without running afoul of the law, but HB 282 would remove that discretion.
---
|
---
| **House approves limiting transgender youths in school sports** Transgender athletes would be prohibited from competing on school-sponsored sports teams that don’t reflect their birth gender under legislation the House of Representatives advanced to the Senate on April 17. The bill passed on a near-party line vote of 106-46, with one lawmaker voting “present.” Just one Republican joined Democrats in opposing the bill.

House Bill 183 targets sports teams from grades six through 12, as well as college athletics.
Public school districts and universities would lose a portion of their state funding for allowing transgender kids to participate on a team that corresponds with their gender identity, while private universities would be subject to fines of up to $1 million.

A similar Senate bill has already cleared that chamber, as well as a House committee, and awaits action by the full House. In the 11 years since the Missouri High School Activities Association first adopted a policy governing participation by transgender athletes, only a dozen have been cleared to play.
---
|
---
| **House narrowly agrees to big increase in license fees** With just three more votes than the constitutionally required minimum, the House of Representatives sent legislation to the Senate on April 17 that would impose another 50 percent fee increase for driver’s licenses and vehicle license plates – just four years after lawmakers doubled the fees. The bill passed on a vote 85-50, with 13 lawmakers voting “present.”

The private companies the state contracts with to operate the license offices charge the fees to pay for their operating expenses and earn a profit. House Bill 424 would increase the fees for a set of two-year license plates or a six-year driver’s license from $12 to $18. The fees are in addition to what the state charges for plates or a license, revenue that goes to the state and would remain unchanged by the bill.
---
|
---
| **House, Senate differ on plan for expanding Interstate 70** The House of Representatives has endorsed a $859 million plan to expand portions of Interstate 70, while a Senate committee instead approved spending $2.8 billion to widen the entire length of Missouri’s central east-west highway from the outskirts of the Kansas City area to the edge of the St. Louis region.

Gov. Mike Parson, a Republican, proposed the less-ambitious version in January when he first presented his state operating budget for the 2024 fiscal year to the legislature. Parson’s plan calls for adding an extra lane to I-70 in both directions through Columbia, as well extending its multi-lane stretches from the two main metropolitan areas.

House Budget Committee Chairman Cody Smith, R-Carthage, stripped the governor’s plan from the budget bill for the Missouri Department of Transportation, but promised to include it in a separate legislation providing spending authority for a variety capital improvements projects, House Bill 19. The House on April 20 voted to advance that measure, as well as three other capital improvements spending bills, to the Senate. The four bills collectively authorize $5.45 billion in capital improvements spending.

A day earlier, the Senate Appropriations Committee voted to restore the I-70 project to the regular MoDOT funding measure, House Bill 4, along with expanding its cost and scope.
That bill and the other 12 appropriations measures that make up the FY 2024 operating budget now head to the full Senate for debate. Once the Senate approves the bills, negotiations can begin with the House on a compromise FY 24 budget plan.

Because the process fell weeks behind the normal schedule in the House, lawmakers have little time to spare to grant final passage to all of the appropriations bills by a hard constitutional deadline of 6 p.m. on May 5. The new fiscal year starts July 1.
---
|
---
| **2023 SENATE BILLS**
[_**SB 63**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=cda2499ff3&e=a088917f89) \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions

[_**SB 64**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=19ff616f77&e=a088917f89) \- Enacts new law relating to wage range inquiries by employees and prospective employees

[**SB 65**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=4a5a21d9f9&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons

[_**SB 145**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=727eae64ca&e=a088917f89) \- Creates certificates of exemplary conduct and good moral character issued by circuit courts

[_**SB 146**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=5073a7bfc9&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to compensation for wrongful convictions

[_**SB 147**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=f7d730bf5d&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility

[_**SB 215**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=6cebe67207&e=a088917f89) \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution

[**_SB 216_**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=eaa3329f54&e=a088917f89) \- Designates "James W Brooks Memorial Highway" in St. Louis City and St. Louis County

**[_SB 217_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=9df5a7c4f2&e=a088917f89) **\- Creates the offense of unlawful possession by a minor

[_**SB 270**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=84895d222f&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines

[**SB 363**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b224e62902&e=a088917f89) \- Specifies that the St. Louis City school board shall fill any vacancy that occurs in such school board outside of the normal election cycle

[_**SJR 21**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=0242f1c881&e=a088917f89) \- Authorizes counties to freeze the real property assessed values of certain senior citizens

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=f60459f452&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.

If you or someone you know needs help, please visit [Safe Connections](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=6c8dc57679&e=a088917f89) or call _314-531-2003_.

You can also contact [ALIVE](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=847fd16d26&e=a088917f89) at _314-993-2777_.

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|

| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b409486273&e=a088917f89).
