clean_body: Guns and Transgender bills leave House, advance to Senate | | | | | | | Capitol Report April 24, 2022 | | | | Contact Senator Roberts 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329 Jefferson City, MO 65101 (573) 751-4415 Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov | | | | | | | | | | | | Bill allowing guns on buses, in churches advances to Senate Concealed weapons permit holders would be allowed to carry firearms on public transit and in churches under legislation the House of Representatives approved April 17 on a vote of 102-45, with four members voting “present.” The bill now advances to the Senate. Under existing law, concealed weapons are prohibited in certain places. House Bill 282 would remove public transit and churches from the prohibited list. Weapons can currently be brought into churches with the pastor’s permission without running afoul of the law, but HB 282 would remove that discretion. | | House approves limiting transgender youths in school sports Transgender athletes would be prohibited from competing on school-sponsored sports teams that don’t reflect their birth gender under legislation the House of Representatives advanced to the Senate on April 17. The bill passed on a near-party line vote of 106-46, with one lawmaker voting “present.” Just one Republican joined Democrats in opposing the bill. House Bill 183 targets sports teams from grades six through 12, as well as college athletics. Public school districts and universities would lose a portion of their state funding for allowing transgender kids to participate on a team that corresponds with their gender identity, while private universities would be subject to fines of up to $1 million. A similar Senate bill has already cleared that chamber, as well as a House committee, and awaits action by the full House. In the 11 years since the Missouri High School Activities Association first adopted a policy governing participation by transgender athletes, only a dozen have been cleared to play. | | House narrowly agrees to big increase in license fees With just three more votes than the constitutionally required minimum, the House of Representatives sent legislation to the Senate on April 17 that would impose another 50 percent fee increase for driver’s licenses and vehicle license plates – just four years after lawmakers doubled the fees. The bill passed on a vote 85-50, with 13 lawmakers voting “present.” The private companies the state contracts with to operate the license offices charge the fees to pay for their operating expenses and earn a profit. House Bill 424 would increase the fees for a set of two-year license plates or a six-year driver’s license from $12 to $18. The fees are in addition to what the state charges for plates or a license, revenue that goes to the state and would remain unchanged by the bill. | | House, Senate differ on plan for expanding Interstate 70 The House of Representatives has endorsed a $859 million plan to expand portions of Interstate 70, while a Senate committee instead approved spending $2.8 billion to widen the entire length of Missouri’s central east-west highway from the outskirts of the Kansas City area to the edge of the St. Louis region. Gov. Mike Parson, a Republican, proposed the less-ambitious version in January when he first presented his state operating budget for the 2024 fiscal year to the legislature. Parson’s plan calls for adding an extra lane to I-70 in both directions through Columbia, as well extending its multi-lane stretches from the two main metropolitan areas. House Budget Committee Chairman Cody Smith, R-Carthage, stripped the governor’s plan from the budget bill for the Missouri Department of Transportation, but promised to include it in a separate legislation providing spending authority for a variety capital improvements projects, House Bill 19. The House on April 20 voted to advance that measure, as well as three other capital improvements spending bills, to the Senate. The four bills collectively authorize $5.45 billion in capital improvements spending. A day earlier, the Senate Appropriations Committee voted to restore the I-70 project to the regular MoDOT funding measure, House Bill 4, along with expanding its cost and scope. That bill and the other 12 appropriations measures that make up the FY 2024 operating budget now head to the full Senate for debate. Once the Senate approves the bills, negotiations can begin with the House on a compromise FY 24 budget plan. Because the process fell weeks behind the normal schedule in the House, lawmakers have little time to spare to grant final passage to all of the appropriations bills by a hard constitutional deadline of 6 p.m. on May 5. The new fiscal year starts July 1. | | 2023 SENATE BILLS \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions \- Enacts new law relating to wage range inquiries by employees and prospective employees \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons \- Creates certificates of exemplary conduct and good moral character issued by circuit courts \- Creates provisions relating to compensation for wrongful convictions \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution \- Designates "James W Brooks Memorial Highway" in St. Louis City and St. Louis County \- Creates the offense of unlawful possession by a minor \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines \- Specifies that the St. Louis City school board shall fill any vacancy that occurs in such school board outside of the normal election cycle \- Authorizes counties to freeze the real property assessed values of certain senior citizens | | "Signed By Governor" | "Truly Agreed Bills" | | | | | HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19). SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing. Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and . Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov for more information on SBA disaster assistance. | | SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit or call 314-531-2003. You can also contact at 314-993-2777. | | COMMUNITY RESOURCE LIST The has a COVID-19 Community Economic Relief Fund. If you need help paying bills, rent, or food call 866-211-9966. : : | | | | | | MEDICAL RESOURCES The Department of Health COVID-19 hotline is open from 8 a.m. - 10 p.m. Call 314-657-1499 with questions or concerns. The Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services hotline can be reached at tel:%20\(877\%20435-8411). | | | | | | RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit: As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy. Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program. Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free. | | LOW-COST INSULIN Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. name: Dan Goldman
subject: My 5-year-old’s lockdown drill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Today, my five-year-old son’s class participated in a lockdown drill. He’s in kindergarten. **Kindergarten.** He knows next to nothing about guns. But he’s preparing to shield himself from a possible mass shooting in his school. This is what it's come to. Republicans don’t want kids to learn about black history or the Holocaust. They don’t want students to talk about being gay. They don't want to ensure that every student is guaranteed a free school lunch. But they’re perfectly fine with our students needing to learn how to protect themselves from an active shooter using an assault weapon. Republicans continue to block common-sense gun legislation while children across our country are drilled for a mass shooting. **Enough.** **[We simply can’t wait any longer to take federal action against gun violence. Lives are on the line. If you’re with me, please add your name to my petition calling on House Republicans to get to work for the American people and stop blocking common-sense gun safety reforms.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62237419/402802319/937951877?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230424_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWU2NzY0MC1iZGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZWaGVHulp1X7zMICLjqMog0I2t72GMYsBpNb5ITD8Uk=&emci=001862e5-b7e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=5ee67640-bde2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=13556823)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62237420/402802320/937951877?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230424_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWU2NzY0MC1iZGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZWaGVHulp1X7zMICLjqMog0I2t72GMYsBpNb5ITD8Uk=&emci=001862e5-b7e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=5ee67640-bde2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=13556823)
---
_Guns are now the leading cause of death for children in America._ Mass shootings — and the endless cycle of trauma and grief left in their wake — are now routine in our country.
Our schools should be places of learning, laughter, and the safest places in our country. But Republicans refuse to do what is necessary to protect our children.
Last week, I joined my colleague Rep. Maxwell Frost in urging the Biden Administration to take executive action by creating an Office of Gun Violence Prevention within the Department of Justice to coordinate a federal response to this urgent public health crisis.
Peter, when I ran for Congress last year, the NRA gave me an “F” rating — **and I proudly wear it on my sleeve.** Because I won’t stop fighting back against Republicans in Congress who will stop at nothing to advance the gun lobby’s radical agenda.
**[There’s no getting around it: Congress needs to act to prevent more senseless gun violence. Please stand with me today and add your name to my petition to demand action now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62237421/402802321/937951877?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230424_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWU2NzY0MC1iZGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZWaGVHulp1X7zMICLjqMog0I2t72GMYsBpNb5ITD8Uk=&emci=001862e5-b7e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=5ee67640-bde2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=13556823)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62237422/402802322/937951877?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230424_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWU2NzY0MC1iZGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZWaGVHulp1X7zMICLjqMog0I2t72GMYsBpNb5ITD8Uk=&emci=001862e5-b7e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=5ee67640-bde2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=13556823)

Dan

Congressman Colin Allred is a rising star in Democratic politics. He's a former NFL linebacker, the child of a single mother, and was born and raised in Texas. In 2018, he beat an incumbent Republican to win his North Texas seat.
Sounds to us like someone who could beat Ted Cruz.
With this announcement, you can bet Cruz's fundraising has gone into overdrive. We need to be prepared to support Congressman Allred or anyone else who steps up to the plate to take on Cruz. name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20B.=20Jones?=
subject: How to cut crime in Jackson? Listen to Shad White
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8133004?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
Last year, State Auditor Shad White released a report highlighting the high crime rate in Jackson.

**It found that every homicide in the southeastern United States costs taxpayers roughly $900,000 to $1.2 million. Based on these statistics, this means Mississippi spent between $136.8 and $182.4 million dollars alone on homicides in our capital city in 2021. **

Shad White will be speaking next Thursday, May 4, on ways he believes our state can lower these crime rates and save taxpayer money.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f55961eb09&e=5703353baa)
---
**_Click on the image above to reserve a ticket!_**
| **White will be joined by best-selling author Rafael Mangual, who makes the case that more policing leads to less crime. ****Tickets can be found[here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=fb3b4196ef&e=5703353baa). **

Each ticket comes with a copy of Mangual's book, "Criminal (In)Justice." You don't want to miss out!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=06a774fde7&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the Best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: Help free Washington State from Democrat control
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join the WSRP and become a 2023 Sustaining Member ASAP

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

clean_body: Join the WSRP and become a 2023 Sustaining Member ASAP Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd! With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms. We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! () State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. () Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press: “We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions. “Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative." Read the full statement. () Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here () . Contact: Steve Johnson Communications Director Washington State Republican Party (425) 460-0570 steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org) ============================================================

I’m counting on your response because when I made history and became New York’s attorney general, I vowed to _always_ let the people’s voice guide my work. As someone who grew up without a platform to speak out against the things that directly affected my neighborhood, I knew that I _never_ wanted to let another New Yorker feel as powerless as I once did.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. As one of my top supporters, you’re someone I can trust to speak honestly and openly about which fights to prioritize this year – **but it looks like you still haven’t accepted my invitation to participate in my focus group.**** **

Together, we made ___real_ progress in our fight for the voiceless and vulnerable in 2022 – but we can’t afford to let that momentum falter in 2023. Because this January, _millions_ of Americans have entered the year without the right to an abortion, _millions_ of parents have entered the year without confidence that their children will be safe at school, and _millions_ of LGBTQ+ individuals have entered the year fearing for their safety.

Peter, with the chambers of Congress now divided, federal action on reproductive rights, voting rights, and gun safety reforms will likely continue to be stalled – and it’s up to state attorneys general like me to continue the fight for justice and progress.

**But before I solidify my plans for the year ahead, I need to know what you think. Please: [_Will you accept my personal invitation to participate in my exclusive focus group? name: James Carville
subject: Friend, the gop is batsh*t crazy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62239835/402811148/1983311359?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2523-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjNDcyNDIxLWMyZTItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=avXov4GDQe80qpx5vkNsJzElluveaveB-euKFQ1-BQg=)
Friend, I've been in politics a _long_ time.

I got my start in local politics in Baton Rouge in the 1980s, worked my way up to Bill Clinton's 1992 presidential campaign, and since then I've worked on campaigns around the U.S. and the world. **But here's the thing:**
**I have never seen a political party as cuckoo as the GOP today.**
From extending Trump's tax breaks for the wealthy to chipping away at our fundamental rights like voting and accessing health care, **the GOP of today is threatening our very democracy.**
But, friend, it gets worse. Republicans took back the House last year, so a lot of what they're planning _could actually happen._

**That's why this is urgent.** **We NEED to take back the House and hold on to our Senate majority next year, and in order to do that, we have to start NOW.**

At American Bridge, our mission is to hold Republicans accountable and DEFEAT them at the ballot box. **But we can't do it without you, friend.****[That's why I set a goal to raise $20,000 by midnight, so I am asking personally: Please, can you rush $15 or more to American Bridge right now to build up our resources so we can stop Republicans like Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis and Kevin McCarthy in their tracks?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62239837/402811151/1983311359?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk2523-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjNDcyNDIxLWMyZTItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=avXov4GDQe80qpx5vkNsJzElluveaveB-euKFQ1-BQg=)**

subject: You are LOSING money!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American, _It’s absolutely unbelievable._

**Since Joe Biden has been in office, average wages in America have PLUMMETED - all while prices are _higher than ever._**

**The math is simple - under Joe Biden, you’re losing money.**

But here’s the truth: the Biden Administration and their Democrat henchman will never care, because _they’re not in this business to help working people, they’re here to solidify their own power._

I’m not exactly popular in Washington, but I take that as a sign that I’m doing my job right for the people that matter:**hardworking Americans like you.**

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, It’s absolutely unbelievable. Since Joe Biden has been in office, average wages in America have PLUMMETED - all while prices are higher than ever. But here’s the truth: the Biden Administration and their Democrat henchman will never care, because they’re not in this business to help working people, they’re here to solidify their own power. I’m not exactly popular in Washington, but I take that as a sign that I’m doing my job right for the people that matter:hardworking Americans like you. I didn’t run for Senate because I wanted to make a name for myself, Fellow American. I got into politics because I saw what the Left was doing to working Americans, and I couldn’t sit by idly. body:
will you join her?
| | |
---
Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw this message from my friend Amy Klobuchar’s team. Like me, she’s been fighting in the Senate to restore the right to reproductive choice by codifying Roe v. Wade into law. I hope you’ll read on and add your name to her petition today!

\-- Kirsten Gillibrand
|
---
Friend, after the Supreme Court eliminated the right to reproductive freedom by overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , Senator Amy Klobuchar took action:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62249598/402848556/1630816142?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FKEG-April-2023-Klobuchar-Bundle-Upsell-email&code=jtk4085-su-nd&refcode=jtk4085-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTU0MmZhOS1lM2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-HNZt02UhDRSimJ1FnMUyfBpqSsNwuN-xDDAgfbIyk=&emci=7c6a68f4-a6df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b1542fa9-e3e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
Amy believes women and girls should have a say over their own bodies, no matter where they live. But right now, reproductive freedom is under attack across the country -- nearly half of all states have either already passed near-total abortion bans or plan to do so. Some even want women to face jail time for exercising their right to choose.
That’s why Amy is fighting to protect abortion rights nationwide by codifying Roe v. Wade into law. Now, we want to show that her plan has massive grassroots support.
**[_Will you join Senator Amy Klobuchar by adding your name today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62249599/402848557/1630816142?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FKEG-April-2023-Klobuchar-Bundle-Upsell-email&code=jtk4085-su-nd&refcode=jtk4085-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTU0MmZhOS1lM2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-HNZt02UhDRSimJ1FnMUyfBpqSsNwuN-xDDAgfbIyk=&emci=7c6a68f4-a6df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b1542fa9-e3e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
Team Klobuchar
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62249600/402848558/1575385346?code=jtk4085-su-nd&refcode=jtk4085-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTU0MmZhOS1lM2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-HNZt02UhDRSimJ1FnMUyfBpqSsNwuN-xDDAgfbIyk=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62249601/402848559/1575385346?code=jtk4085-su-nd&refcode=jtk4085-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTU0MmZhOS1lM2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-HNZt02UhDRSimJ1FnMUyfBpqSsNwuN-xDDAgfbIyk=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62249602/402848560/1575385346?code=jtk4085-su-nd&refcode=jtk4085-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTU0MmZhOS1lM2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y-HNZt02UhDRSimJ1FnMUyfBpqSsNwuN-xDDAgfbIyk=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

We need your support to ensure these climate champions have the resources to win their runoff elections.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62240168/402812355/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230424-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2MDI2YmY4LWMyZTItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HWGP9QpcQ4qe_DMmPekDFwjd4zva8wLbNzOcCCTd1Ms=)

| Dear friend,

Jane Fonda here!

I'm excited to personally invite you to a special virtual fundraiser for our Denver Climate Champions on Wednesday, April 26.

Please join the Jane Fonda Climate PAC and Run on Climate teams in supporting these three remarkable candidates running for Denver City Council who have runoff elections on June 6th: Candi CdeBaca, Shannon Hoffman, and Shontel Lewis.

I launched the Jane Fonda Climate PAC because we need to elect leaders who share our commitment to safeguarding the environment and fighting against the fossil fuel industry. Candi, Shannon, and Shontel have all committed to doing the hard work it will take to pass key climate policy when they’re elected and we know they will make a significant impact.

We need your support to ensure these climate champions have the resources to win their runoff elections. Join us for an inspiring evening of conversation, as we discuss the importance of strong climate leadership at the local level and learn more about the candidates' plans for a greener Denver. Here are the event details:
Date: Wednesday, April 26
Time: 5 PM PT/6 PM MT/8 PM ET
Location: Zoom (link to be provided upon registration)
_**[RSVP HERE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62240169/402812356/-1561757484?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230424-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2MDI2YmY4LWMyZTItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HWGP9QpcQ4qe_DMmPekDFwjd4zva8wLbNzOcCCTd1Ms=)**_ Your generous contribution will go a long way in helping Candi, Shannon, and Shontel win their races and continue the critical work of addressing the climate crisis in Denver. Together, we can create a brighter, more sustainable future for all. Thank you in advance for your support, and I look forward to seeing you at the virtual fundraiser.

Warm regards,
Jane Fonda
Jane Fonda Climate PAC

P.S. Can't make it to the event but still want to support these fantastic candidates? You can still donate directly to their campaigns by clicking [_**here.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62240170/402812357/294964268?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230424-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2MDI2YmY4LWMyZTItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HWGP9QpcQ4qe_DMmPekDFwjd4zva8wLbNzOcCCTd1Ms=)

subject: Thank you, Tucker.

body:
We couldn’t have done this without you.

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcrqmqbe10ua5psq7kf4krkavnqdnc2p2ph083n8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjm0o32clh2bs)

| | **_[Will you join me in thanking Tucker Carlson as he parts ways with Fox News?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeo8g6cj6jfqp3inh6p2jd3iqb3j9qsk42egi1s0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjm0o32clh2bs)_**
---
| | Thank you, Tucker. My name’s Ryan Girdusky. In May of 2021 I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our schools by replacing leftist school board members with brave conservatives. **[Tucker Carlson heard about my plan and had me on this show.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr0l7ls9dsltdgchphs5koml2sqm95mf72g97oa8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjm0o32clh2bs)** IMMEDIATELY, we had a FLOOD of thousands of brave patriots flocking to support our mission. There’s no doubt in my mind that if Tucker didn’t give me a chance to come on his show- we wouldn’t have achieved half as much as we did. _**[Will you join us in thanking Tucker Carlson for his bravery, and for being a historic champion of the conservative movement?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zurhuq070m2tk3nf80l3ki0qrdctt3rln9pn8kp0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjm0o32clh2bs)**_
---
[SIGN TUCKER’S THANK YOU CARD](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh0riqmoofp8uer0uep5l4tq8u07mks08ddkiusg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjm0o32clh2bs)
---
Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky, 1776 Project PAC

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: I would have been fired.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62240201/402812506/-665437442?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWU1YmUyNS1jM2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K-FbfTHyZ-tTXgukl26gFHta_weGU_XUFMCSkcvNrFc=)
I don't share this story often, Peter.

Before I came home to Illinois, I was a meteorologist at a local station in Tyler, Texas.

One morning, my boss approached me and said we needed to speak after the show.

When I got to the conference room, I saw my employment contract laid out on the desk. Next to it was a print out of my profile from a gay dating website.

I was told I had a choice: **to be _"that person"_ in the profile, or "have a job."**

I decided then and there to resign and move back to Illinois.

That was 20 years ago, and the reason I’m sharing this story now, is because I never imagined the LGBTQ community would be experiencing the surge in discrimination it is today.

We've seen far-right politicians banning LGBTQ books from schools and libraries. Just this week, Republicans passed a bill to ban transgender youth from girl's sports.

Imagine what gay and trans kids may think seeing this in the news? I can tell you for a fact I'd be feeling scared, isolated, and ashamed.

**These attacks are a reminder of why we need representatives in Congress who can lead with empathy -- especially when it comes to protecting youth who may already feel marginalized.**

[**I’m ready to stand up to the anti-LGBTQ agenda in Congress, but it's going to take a team effort to get this done. Please contribute $3 to my re-election campaign, and help me defeat these bigoted attacks on our community.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62240202/402812507/-665437442?refcode=em-4.24.23-nopnrs-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWU1YmUyNS1jM2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K-FbfTHyZ-tTXgukl26gFHta_weGU_XUFMCSkcvNrFc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62240203/402812508/-665437442?refcode=em-4.24.23-nopnrs-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWU1YmUyNS1jM2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K-FbfTHyZ-tTXgukl26gFHta_weGU_XUFMCSkcvNrFc=)

body:
| | | Fellow American, _It’s absolutely unbelievable._

**Since Joe Biden has been in office, average wages in America have PLUMMETED - all while prices are _higher than ever._**

**The math is simple - under Joe Biden, you’re losing money.**

But here’s the truth: the Biden Administration and their Democrat henchman will never care, because _they’re not in this business to help working people, they’re here to solidify their own power._

I’m not exactly popular in Washington, but I take that as a sign that I’m doing my job right for the people that matter:**hardworking Americans like you.**

**[Join our team today to FIRE Joe Biden and put money back in YOUR pockets!](http://links.gopwin.org/u/click?_t=880bb7f57f984ec39ea5a13773012007&_m=2e45f4bbbad94cee8389663ebd06ce22&_e=mPTWf7WTXBdrb2kvv-PCsBIEVshLNTy8kwEIlxsiGJHwNT2DBSyUX7dAIs9SJzfl2U4IEMNcO6lc0HKP1Ebuy8PkwA4g6BwcZNRkE3xLGK62nCqpfWIGHJLBgdSxCNtoy_qm2iKC7blUeXMAIfSXQPBSFWv33zCElSKw_kfrXPTvtt2DIfgYaz7cm4VvkIvtgqRCoLyv1fDQoRmdcXYN6tcezGNTMPgfdjJdosTMEwlXGx1XebHc84huI64IL-0iiuKQCv9sbEGqOzItEGENbAfMXxNaoh02lwFmfX1Xb01yZ--LqtYsn0eZPIsLi7-Y_6C-4WDctgMuzdJmaCop0Bcvnz5z0JNWADxI-eHgCqmXsxsDH_1_fZ48Hq0OvMKan6U5AzMu5CF6Wldy7VNFAQ%3D%3D)**

The Democrats will NEVER invest in good jobs and living wages because they don’t want to see blue collar America succeed.
The Left hates your independent spirit, your work ethic, and your patriotism, and they’re punishing you for it by tanking the economy with their socialist agenda.
_Enough is enough._
It’s time to FIRE Joe Biden and his do-nothing Democrats and get to work to take back our great country.

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, It’s absolutely unbelievable. Since Joe Biden has been in office, average wages in America have PLUMMETED - all while prices are higher than ever. The math is simple - under Joe Biden, you’re losing money. But here’s the truth: the Biden Administration and their Democrat henchman will never care, because they’re not in this business to help working people, they’re here to solidify their own power. I’m not exactly popular in Washington, but I take that as a sign that I’m doing my job right for the people that matter:hardworking Americans like you. I didn’t run for Senate because I wanted to make a name for myself, Fellow American. I got into politics because I saw what the Left was doing to working Americans, and I couldn’t sit by idly. The Democrats will NEVER invest in good jobs and living wages because they don’t want to see blue collar America succeed. The Left hates your independent spirit, your work ethic, and your patriotism, and they’re punishing you for it by tanking the economy with their socialist agenda. Enough is enough. It’s time to FIRE Joe Biden and his do-nothing Democrats and get to work to take back our great country. | | Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Things got heated with Don Lemon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Don Lemon was WRONG on this.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgg07q16o1hivbon3acsiq57m4bhq4ok5cpcng88_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjm0p72chh2bs)
Fellow American,

Things got a little heated on CNN.

While debating post Civil War history, Don Lemon preposterously claimed that "black people still aren't allowed to enjoy their freedoms."

**That's an insult to the progress we've made over the last 160 years.** His comments embody what's wrong with the dialogue about race in America. I told him so without apology.

My exchange with Don Lemon and CNN that has sparked controversy and anger from some in the mainstream media.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo1qtlhg06i7akktmrpmeclhm5uktkoc2kes11f8_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjm0p72chh2bs)
I spoke passionately about the importance of the Second Amendment and the need for civil discourse in our country. I stand by my words, but of course, some in the media have chosen to twist them and attack me.

**I refuse to back down, Fellow American.** I believe that we need to have honest, open discussions about the issues that matter most to Americans. That's why I am running for office. That's why I am working every day to make sure I have a prime spot on the debate stage in August.

In order to continue my campaign and fight for the values and principles that set this country into motion, I need your support. I can't do it alone. **[Any amount will bring us closer to our unique donor goal. I need your help to continue spreading my message of freedom and progress.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhm0o0u6e967kag76iufp7hu1ud1ab1f3mok6mtg_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjm0p72chh2bs)**

**[Please consider making a small donation to my campaign today. Your contribution will help me continue my fight to revive the values that this nation was founded on: free speech. The rule of law. Excellence over grievance.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjrfj34madm2ab7tlc0c533tfm1aljv44m4m25i0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjm0p72chh2bs)**

Thank you for your support. Together, we can make a difference.

Sincerely,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z51k25jsqegsgpla8d0o2e3u823avloilqlod9t0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjm0p72chh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. I am committed to bringing fresh radical ideas to the table that will help put America back on track. But I can't do it without your support. **[Please chip in $1 or more to help me continue this fight.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdaejl3lt9cam2cababk3lmpmaa75kldobgunf7g_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjm0p72chh2bs)**

| [** WATCH NOW -> **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk2nora7blvhb9adtsgc6n6r3kso5q15ep91mnf0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjm0p72chh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkpr6krcp27imof8v5312m9mq1po96qghp805vqo_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjm0p72chh2bs)

---

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrsn57u1dp1j7jpc8b01eedmtosqgg6reolc5tag_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjm0p72chh2bs)| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs376dncr60q7q3bj85uadlmbkhtokd3pc31hf0g_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjm0p72chh2bs)| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv7p8gjp5g1i2pe38eamihhfspqtc17o8j2qefk0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjm0p72chh2bs)
---|---|---

name: Our Revolution
subject: LIVE Call TONIGHT: Raise the Wage state by state with Rep. Schakowsky, Saru Jayaraman, Jordan Giger and more!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Join our LIVE National Organize-to-Win Call

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

TOPICS: End Subminimum Wages | US Rep. Jan Schakowsky | Stand with Tipped
Workers | OFW President Saru Jayaraman | Raise the Wage OH, IL, NY |
ServSafe Scam & the Restaurant Lobby | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1011&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ][IMG]

Don’t miss our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1012&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]National Organize-to-Win Call focused on raising the
wage in states across the country — LIVE tonight at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT!

US Rep. Jan Schakowsky and One Fair Wage President Saru Jayaraman will dig
into work to eliminate subminimum wages in Illinois, Ohio, and beyond!

Then, we’ll turn to building local power with San Antonio Council member
Teri Castillo on her run for re-election and Jorden Giger on his run for
City Council in South Bend IN!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1013&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]RSVP

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8629?t=1014&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]CANNABIS JUSTICE & CLIMATE JUSTICE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1015&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ][IMG]

Spring is in the air, and we’re [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8629?t=1016&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]Feeling the Bern! That’s why we’re
releasing this new sticker pack to help ramp up our efforts for Climate
Justice and Cannabis Justice.

No one should be in jail for weed while Big Oil billionaires get away with
burning our planet for record profit. Our Revolution is proud to stand
with Sen. Ed Markey and Reps. Ro Khanna and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez as
they reintroduce the Green New Deal this Earth Day!

We must stop funding the drug war on poor people and communities of color
and stop handing out billions in subsidies to the fossil fuel industry.

Help fund our work to take on the special interests blocking justice on
both of these issues with a $10 donation and we’ll send you this fresh
sticker bundle!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8629?t=1017&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]GET YOUR STICKERS

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1018&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ][IMG]

As you know, Our Revolution and One Fair Wage are working hard to end the
subminimum wage state by state across the country. Ahead of our Live Call
tonight, we’ll be kicking off the next phase of our work to Raise the Wage
in Illinois and Ohio!

This morning, our worker activists, organizers, and elected allies will
join US Rep. Jan Schakowsky in the Chicago Loop to call out the
anti-worker National Restaurant Association and their #ServSafeScam
forcing workers to fund lobbying efforts to keep wages low.

IL Rep. Abdulnasser Rashid will join in support and Chicago Aldermen Mike
Rodriguez will join us in addressing the city council in a legislative
push. And, advocates will share new info on the lobby’s efforts to weaken
child labor laws in order to fill gaps left by thousands of restaurant
workers refusing to work for poverty wages post-pandemic.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8630?t=1019&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]JOIN US IN CHICAGO

This afternoon, OR Field Director Mike Oles and our crew will activate our
Raise the Wage Ohio Team, gathering at the State House in Columbus to
launch a new petition for higher wages and an end to subminimum wages.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8622?t=1020&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]JOIN US IN COLUMBUS!

Looking ahead, we have exciting plans in the works for New York, where a
May 8th civil disobedience action is being planned for Albany — with
special guests we’ll be announcing soon! Stay tuned.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8628?t=1021&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]JOIN US IN ALBANY

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1022&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ][IMG]

We’ll have plenty of ways for you to get involved with our state teams on
the call, but you can plug into our work to raise wages state by state by
joining our team at the link below. One job should be enough!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8222?t=1023&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]HELP RAISE THE WAGE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1024&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ][IMG]

Every two weeks, we gather to organize directly with progressive leaders,
activists, and fellow workers. Make sure to [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1025&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]RSVP to participate
directly in Zoom and make connections in the chat!

Thousands watch LIVE on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8355?t=1026&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]Facebook and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8356?t=1027&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]Twitter, and you can find
more of our video content by subscribing to our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8357?t=1028&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]YouTube channel. Help
us build the call — share this [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8596?t=1029&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]link on your Twitter and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8488?t=1030&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]invite
your friends to tune-in with you.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1031&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8629?t=1032&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]GREEN POWER STICKER DUO!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1033&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ][IMG]

It’s the same powerful special interests blocking marijuana reform in the
midst of a mass incarceration crisis and escalating fossil fuel production
in the face of a climate crisis.

Donate $10 to fund our organizing work to get this ‘Green Bundle’ sticker
pack and demand freedom for those wrongfully jailed and freedom from
fossil fuels!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8629?t=1034&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]GET YOUR STICKERS!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1035&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ][IMG]

Don’t forget to [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1036&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]RSVP NOW for our LIVE interactive broadcast focused on
Raising the Wage state by state with US Rep. Jan Schakowsky, One Fair Wage
President Saru Jayaraman, San Antonio Council member Teri Castillo on her
run for re-election and Jorden Giger for City Council in South Bend, IN.
The call kicks off at 8:30 pm ET/5:30 PT TONIGHT!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1037&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]JOIN THE CALL

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1038&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ][IMG]

WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230424_NL_MondayInvite_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_MondayCall.j-mUhb&t=1008&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230424_NL_MondayInvite_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_MondayCall.TkzSyO&t=1009&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230424_NL_MondayInvite_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_MondayCall.YhGXFz&t=1010&akid=4219%2E5885482%2Es7RtmD ]GIVE ONCE

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: Democrats Make It Happen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
April 24, 2023
Dear friend,
Democrats and advocates have kept up the pressure on gun reform and because of this, our Republican-controlled state legislature plans to call an unprecedented special session [https://www.tn.gov/governor/news/2023/4/21/gov--lee-to-call-special-session-on-public-safety.html] to find solutions to address gun violence.
This much is clear: Democrats make it happen.
For far too long, the GOP in Tennessee has catered to the gun lobby, costing thousands of lives across the state. Democrats said enough is enough. They stood with youth and parents in Nashville to demand common-sense gun legislation. Day after day, they reminded the GOP and the nation of the names of those lost at Covenant School in Nashville, including children: Evelyn Dieckhaus (9), William Kinney (9), Hallie Scruggs (9), Mike Hill (61), Katherine Koonce (60), and Cynthia Peak (61). We'll continue to echo their names until there is action to ensure this never happens to another child, another family again.
Democratic Mayors across the state, including TVP Founder Shelby County Mayor Lee Harris, wrote a letter [https://wreg.com/news/local/4-tn-mayors-demand-gun-reform-in-letter-to-state-leaders/] to state leadership outlining several common-sense gun laws our legislature can move forward on now.
HELP TVP ELECT DEMOCRATS WORKING TO CURB GUN VIOLENCE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Right now, we're laser focused on municipal races across Tennessee and we're building up our coalition for next year's state races. We need leaders at every level working to drive public conversation and advocate for solutions to end gun violence once and for all.
Will you send TVP a contribution of any amount to help us elect Democrats who will fight relentlessly to end gun violence in our communities? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
We need more local leaders who will stand with our small but mighty Democratic caucus at the state level to push for reform. Your contribution helps us get there.
Thanks for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

| | | | | Peter, [**We have a chance this year to rid ourselves of another awful Republican Governor and elect a rock star...**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te44add4c-7715-4b3e-8c73-d2b4a4b12372/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _You may know Mississippi Gov. Tate Reeves from his "greatest" hits of a massive public corruption scandal and __refusal to accept Medicaid dollars--which has worsened his constituents' health, and, let's be honest, killed some of them._ **_There's also been the water crisis in Jackson, with residents unable to access clean running water_** , **_and the fact that Reeves is even hated by his own party, so much so that the Speaker of the State House, Philip Gunn, is openly talking about taking him on in a primary._** _From Mississippi Today:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T451d7c07-9afa-4f7e-8af6-5ac2589a5123/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _But the best news of all? Our rock star, Public Service Commissioner of the Northern District of Mississippi, Brandon Presley, is thinking of running. He's helped rural Mississipians get broadband and taken on corporations to keep utility rates low._ **_Oh, and did we tell you his name's Presley? Yeah, as in, that guy. Ok so he's not a rock star himself, but a second cousin to Elvis Presley. In the name recognition and positive feelings department in MI, he may as well be the rock star himself._** [**_So will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to return Tate Reeves to sender, so Mississippi can't help falling in love with Brandon Presley?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9c48f613-e113-4562-a6cf-bf2d7f6922c4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Mississippi, and America, deserve better than the loathsome Tate Reeves. Cliff

---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae8c55be-00a8-41a3-94fb-a26f11755969/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: Support Suzanne Geist for Mayor of Lincoln
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
Join the Nebraska Republican Party in backing Suzanne Geist for a brighter future in Lincoln | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d3046ba20557/n41kepo7ku-475989?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=88029a8148&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| As the May 2nd mayoral election in Lincoln approaches, the Nebraska Republican Party stands with Suzanne Geist, our Republican nominee for Mayor. Suzanne, a former state Senator, has demonstrated her commitment to the people of Lincoln and our shared conservative values. [**Will you join us in supporting her? Every dollar we raise from this email will go to support the Neighborhood Captains program in Lincoln. This program built the relationships at the door of Lincolnites so WE can WIN.**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=47ca713a04&e=25844e23a8)

We would also like to extend our gratitude to Stan Parker for running a strong race in the primaries. Stan has graciously joined forces and supports Suzanne. Together, we are united in our efforts to ensure a brighter future for the people of Lincoln.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=5777857dec&e=25844e23a8)
---
| **Stan Parker supporting Suzanne Geist for Mayor**
---
| This election is paramount, as Lincoln has not had a Republican mayor in nearly a quarter of a century—since 1999. Suzanne Geist is running against an incumbent Mayor who has been endorsed by radical far-left organizations like Emily's List, known for their support of government-funded abortion on demand.

Now more than ever, we need your support to secure a victory for Suzanne Geist and bring about meaningful change in Lincoln. We encourage you to stand with us in backing her candidacy.

Together, we can make history by electing a Republican mayor for the first time in 24 years and restoring conservative values to the leadership of a great city.
---
| **_Watch our video outlining why it's so important to support a proven Nebraska Conservative as Lincoln's next mayor_ :**

---
| [Watch Lincoln In Decline](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ac37d6b19d&e=25844e23a8 "Watch Lincoln In Decline")
---
| Sincerely, Chairman Eric Underwood
Nebraska Republican Party
**[NE.GOP](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=c4b17330d8&e=25844e23a8)**
---
| P.S. [**Your support is critical**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=4802907ac7&e=25844e23a8) in helping us propel Suzanne Geist to victory in this crucial election. Please consider making a donation to the Nebraska Republican Party as we work tirelessly to elect a strong Republican mayor for Lincoln. The foundation of growing healthy county parties is in the implementation of our ground game - Neighborhood Captains.
---
| | | | | | | [](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=7faeaa59e5&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=53e6adfb2d&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=f5896edc9e&e=25844e23a8)
---
| [PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
---
|

Nebraska Republican Party1610 N StLincoln, NE 68508-1871

clean_body: Courtesy Reminder. | | | Friend, You only have until TOMORROW to enter to win a chance to be President Trump’s VIP guest at his next rally. | While Biden has spent his entire life taking millions of dollars from special interests, President Trump is asking you to give just $1 to be automatically entered to win to be his VIP. This next rally will be the first rally since President Trump was arrested... ...It’s going to be an exciting time – and what could possibly be more exciting than to be his VIP guest for this big event? Thank you, Team Trump | NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Save America JFC by clicking . Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking or by texting "RALLY2" to 88022 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Save America JFC. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt out. Entries must be received between Apr 19, 2023, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on Apr 25, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) "Prize Winner" will receive a trip for two to President Trump's next rally of the 2024 campaign consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the rally destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner's residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iii) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; Approximate retail value ("ARV") of the Prize: $3,000. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

subject: There's still time to get your Bourbon & Blazers tickets!
body:
We wanted to personally invite you to our Bourbon & Blazers fundraiser on Thursday May 4th. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lwfaa/bourbon-and-blazers-13861654?e=cb396c52a2)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

We wanted to personally invite you to our Bourbon & Blazers fundraiser on Thursday May 4th!
---
| [ ](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=5856e60b36&e=cb396c52a2)
---
| It'll be a great evening full of all things Kentucky Derby as we raise money to fund our mission of growing the Republican Party. Guests can view races, sip cocktails, and enjoy each other’s company at the beautiful Cherokee Country Club. Space is limited, so grab your tickets while they are still available!

To purchase tickets, visit the link [HERE](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=012e1ef5a4&e=cb396c52a2) or go to [lwfaa.com/events](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=714a2cd33f&e=cb396c52a2).

If you're interested in one of the sponsorship levels, visit the link [HERE](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=f8ae26ca5a&e=cb396c52a2) or contact Mallory Whitfield at (404) 583-6081 or [info@lwfaa.com](mailto:info@lwfaa.com).

If you can't attend but would still like to support the organization, you can donate [here](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=2188220952&e=cb396c52a2).

God Bless,

Kelvin & Janelle King
Co-Chairs | Let’s Win for America Action
---
| |
---

body:
If House Republicans continue to miss their fundraising goals, we will SURELY lose our hold on the Majority for the House.

| |

---
| | | **FIRST:** House Democrats pledged $80,000,000+ to target swing districts in New York and California.

**THEN:** House Democrats announced they had outraised House Republicans by $12,000,000+.

**NOW:** Inside Elections has released their first set of House ratings of the cycle and we are **TIED. **

If House Republicans continue to miss their fundraising goals, we will SURELY lose our hold on the Majority for the House.

Everything is going to come down to **YOU** , Friend. The House GOP currently holds the narrowest Majority in decades. Top pollsters are already saying Dems have a chance to take back the House -- in fact, the odds they will are dead even. The stakes are clear: **our Majority could collapse like a house of cards if we aren 't careful.**

This is where you come in. Small dollar donors like yourself are who make up the financial backbone of political campaigns. Without your support, we won't be able to continue on.

name: All On The Line
subject: What’s your story?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Team, here at All On The Line we strive to ensure folks like you know how to get involved within your community to advocate for fair maps and democracy. But we know sometimes it’s hard to figure out where to start or how to speak up about issues that matter to you. **That’s why it’s important to craft your story.**
[**Join All On The Line Storytelling Training:
Sharing Your Story For Impact
Thursday, April 27, 6 - 7pm**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62251787/402855764/566252195?utm_campaign=20230424_AOTL_O_Storytelling_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiNGViNzU4LWViZTItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Yaze22WMJUIEQFnQrLyeP31-P2Lx6gL3WtlePaD23F4=&emci=d88a72ba-d9e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=cb4eb758-ebe2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)
**During this virtual event, attendees will learn:**
➡️ How to develop their story.
➡️ How to use their story to create change in communities of interest.
➡️ How to use their story to inspire and organize people to get involved.
[REGISTER](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62251788/402855767/566252195?utm_campaign=20230424_AOTL_O_Storytelling_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiNGViNzU4LWViZTItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Yaze22WMJUIEQFnQrLyeP31-P2Lx6gL3WtlePaD23F4=&emci=d88a72ba-d9e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=cb4eb758-ebe2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)

When it comes to changing minds and creating change, the most impactful tool is your voice. **[Join All On The Line on April 27th and share your story.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62251789/402855768/566252195?utm_campaign=20230424_AOTL_O_Storytelling_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiNGViNzU4LWViZTItZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Yaze22WMJUIEQFnQrLyeP31-P2Lx6gL3WtlePaD23F4=&emci=d88a72ba-d9e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=cb4eb758-ebe2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)**
We hope to see you there!
\-- All On The Line

name: Ashley Ehasz
subject: Partisan culture wars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick just voted in favor of House Republicans’ dangerous and extreme bill that bans girls from playing on girls’ sports teams at school if they are trans. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62242454/402820343/-227468080?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230422antitrans_a4pa1_actives_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmE2ZWQ0YS1jYWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0W5fBExvzKG6-pBYJzhlCiKA9354OGpVROc-g2KWZiI=)

Unbelievable, folks. **Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick just voted in favor of House Republicans’ dangerous and extreme bill that bans girls from playing on girls’ sports teams at school if they are trans.** This discriminatory law is an attack on Pennsylvania’s LGBTQ+ community, pure and simple. At a time when our LGBTQ+ students are more vulnerable than ever, Fitzpatrick is choosing partisan culture wars over protecting the health and safety of his constituents. PA-01 needs a real representative of the people, not a Majorie Taylor Greene from Levittown. **[Fitzpatrick is an extremist who’s betrayed this district. subject: Join us Wednesday!
body:
Attend our Town Hall Against Child Mutilation... | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0923cb2b530c/defend-our-children-476068?e=3ebdc747e6)
---
|
---
| | | | **WEDNESDAY**
---
|
# **_DEFEND OUR CHILDREN_**
---
|
---
| **Across America and our Great State of Ohio we are seeing a coordinated effort to confuse and harm our children through dangerous and irreversible medical procedures.

April 26th in Medina, we will be joined by State Representatives Jennifer Gross & Beth Lear, State School Board Member John Hagan and a panel of medical experts for our Town Hall Against Child Mutilation! **
**Every child is created in the image of God and deserves our protection from radical ideologues attempting to alter their true nature.**
**This Town Hall will benefit HB68 (The SAFE Act) which will ban dangerous puberty blockers and sex reassignment surgeries on minors in Ohio. Panel members will discuss their views and area of expertise followed by questions from the audience.**
**Come show your support for ending child mutilation in our state!**

*Attendees are advised to bring a chair as seating may be limited*
---
| | |
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://jonahdschulz.us21.list-manage.com/about?u=fca39b236a4d3fca484c28fd6&id=d0d068d055&e=3ebdc747e6&c=e5acf523a0) [unsubscribe from this list](https://jonahdschulz.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=fca39b236a4d3fca484c28fd6&id=d0d068d055&e=3ebdc747e6&c=e5acf523a0) [update subscription preferences](https://jonahdschulz.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=fca39b236a4d3fca484c28fd6&id=d0d068d055&e=3ebdc747e6&c=e5acf523a0)

body:

I need patriots I can trust, Friend.

My Senate Republican colleagues and I just left a BIG 2024 Election meeting, but we ran into a problem - we needed more up-to-date information to make better strategic decisions.

I'm entrusting YOU with completing the **[Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zeo9iup8hpe7pv7igu4mrillk49cdbk93qfd5u90_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjmco75clh2bs)** because of your excellent track record of providing valuable input for the Conservative movement.

Your opinions, concerns, and interests are CRITICAL to formulating our 2024 campaign platform. We can only **WIN** in 2024 when we create an agenda __that best represents the will of the American people.__

You'll be the voice of your fellow patriots in your area, so we're counting on your quick response.

**[Please take the Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey IMMEDIATELY to represent your area in our critical 2024 Election strategy.>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0cmi4gm7lgvc2g7qtgif7cd348fn7bfpphhvv40_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjmco75clh2bs)**

2024 is the most important election of our lifetime. We can't afford another defeat like the one we had in 2022. The **[Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq1l9p13jbgigbak1umkl88rrj0je9s73t7hatj0_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjmco75clh2bs)** is our way of correcting our missteps and ensuring a GOP victory next year.

Please don't let our Party down, friend. We're counting on you.

**[I need you to complete the Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey AS SOON AS POSSIBLE to ensure your response is recorded.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2mt5hqa4bqjjmcio626ts5rfvvcdkmtkuuafnug_rp22sh2s8i66o72cpjmco75clh2bs)**

Thank you,

name: BACK THE BLUE
subject: We’re getting tough on crime. Are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
When we look around at blue states like New York, we’re absolutely horrified.

Their prosecutors brag about letting violent felons off the hook while using valuable resources to go after their political opponents.

**Blue state “justice” systems are a sham, but now, they want to bring their soft-on-crime agenda NATIONWIDE.**

We’re gathering patriots across America to take a stand for REAL justice, but we need your help.

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Getting money out of politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress **[marcykaptur
body:
Campaign spending has skyrocketed in the years following the outrageous Citizens United decision. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62243355/402823908/-818894537?refcode=EM_FR_230424PET_N_TK_90DA_5_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWY0MjFlYS1jYmUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDVc-vRP1XORF0VZK4YkHSCDyC5LKKNwC_pPl-nFED8=)

As a representative in Congress, I have seen firsthand the corrupting influence of money in politics. It undermines the very foundation of our democracy and puts the interests of corporations and special interests ahead of the American people.

Campaign spending has skyrocketed in the years following the outrageous _Citizens United_ decision. Billionaires and corporations are now free to pump millions of dollars into our elections without accountability. Our country’s very future as a democracy is at risk unless we achieve campaign finance reform.

I know we must reign in special interests, and I have supported legislation to repeal _Citizens United_ , limit spending in elections, and improve access to the ballot for candidates. Our elections cannot be up for sale to the highest bidder.

We can take back our democracy and put the power back in the hands of the people. That's why I'm asking for your support in overturning _Citizens United_ and fighting for campaign finance reform.

**[Please join me in this fight to restore integrity and fairness to our elections by signing your name below. Together, we can make a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62243362/402823909/-1540471935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWY0MjFlYS1jYmUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDVc-vRP1XORF0VZK4YkHSCDyC5LKKNwC_pPl-nFED8=&emci=359750d4-b5e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=89f421ea-cbe2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2814549)** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62243364/402823918/-1540471935?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWY0MjFlYS1jYmUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FDVc-vRP1XORF0VZK4YkHSCDyC5LKKNwC_pPl-nFED8=&emci=359750d4-b5e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=89f421ea-cbe2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2814549) Thank you,
