Date: April 23, 2023 11:01am
Subject: We won’t let North Carolina be dragged backward
> Lt. Gov. Mark Robinson just announced he’s running for governor.
> We must defeat him — and we will. Together.
> **[I’m setting a goal to raise $5,000 in the next 24 hours to defeat Robinson. Make a donation right now to prevent a far-right extremist from gaining power and taking us backward>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62243402/402824147/435245919?refcode=ea.1281872e-cce2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.1281872e-cce2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjgxODcyZS1jY2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGNOWXDPtOVUVvYyAsUN8K4dN9x0NHZRR_OaEzNzoKM=)**
> * * *
> Peter —
> I’m proud of how far we’ve come — the progress we’ve made for our state — in the six years since I became governor.
> We repealed the disastrous, cruel “Bathroom Bill” that discriminated against LGBTQ+ North Carolinians. We’ve taken substantive action to protect our climate. We’ve defended reproductive rights. We came to a bipartisan agreement to expand Medicaid.
> **But if a radical right-winger like Mark Robinson takes office, all that progress would be at risk.**
> Peter, Robinson has made his position clear: He’s only focused on far-right culture war issues. He would likely seek to ban abortion, support absurd and hurtful restrictions on what and how public school teachers are allowed to teach, and roll back our efforts to fight climate change.
> He has said that men, not women, should be our leaders, that LGTBQ+ people are filth, that it’s questionable that the Holocaust occurred, and that climate change is a lie. That should be enough to disqualify him from office in our great state.
> Not to mention his threatening and dangerous positions like: “I got them AR-15s in case the government gets too big for its britches.”

clean_body: We MUST defeat Mark Robinson. | Peter — did you see Roy’s email yesterday? If you missed it, here’s what you need to know: North Carolina’s far-right lieutenant governor, Mark Robinson, just announced that he’s running for governor in 2024. We cannot let him win. = | = Thank you, Team Cooper Begin forwarded message: \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Roy Cooper = Date: April 23, 2023 11:01am Subject: We won’t let North Carolina be dragged backward Lt. Gov. Mark Robinson just announced he’s running for governor. We must defeat him — and we will. Together. = Peter — I’m proud of how far we’ve come — the progress we’ve made for our state — in the six years since I became governor. We repealed the disastrous, cruel “Bathroom Bill” that discriminated against LGBTQ+ North Carolinians. We’ve taken substantive action to protect our climate. We’ve defended reproductive rights. We came to a bipartisan agreement to expand Medicaid. But if a radical right-winger like Mark Robinson takes office, all that progress would be at risk. Peter, Robinson has made his position clear: He’s only focused on far-right culture war issues. He would likely seek to ban abortion, support absurd and hurtful restrictions on what and how public school teachers are allowed to teach, and roll back our efforts to fight climate change. He has said that men, not women, should be our leaders, that LGTBQ+ people are filth, that it’s questionable that the Holocaust occurred, and that climate change is a lie. That should be enough to disqualify him from office in our great state. Not to mention his threatening and dangerous positions like: “I got them AR-15s in case the government gets too big for its britches.” North Carolina was just rated the top state in the country for business. Under a Governor Robinson, companies would flee from his divisive culture wars — just like they did when HB2 passed. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = --- = --- = --- = --- = --- Thank you, Roy = **=** --- **=** Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

| | Thank you, Tucker. My name's Ryan Girdusky. In May of 2021 I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our schools by replacing leftist school board members with brave conservatives. **[Tucker Carlson heard about my plan and had me on this show.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=243a4970c42a477f9eeb473f8d69158a&_e=tOjHsqQq0jQIYTRyyfDc5H3V7MOiDryNYihWh5zFbTgHH7BnuR2BIeu42SS7y35FaQLxz21uLAEX9Ts2I7b_paN90iyJhcGc94sFP03LZjfC0IQpo9dWePNSausU4sL9zDm-ZJEO9YSJnJj08P0go87se5nzHNZRYXtch2skm9udJQymJioZ0Dp9CmJUsStmxsn4xFHdskC-NbeTQCJywVTSPQBXeABaJ_1zGmzI-pOJpRvKSoMwFPrmxkbr_iQaHZYfC7dXSJrUvtYqvvrt7DKSWpw3PD5oNB64ZFrkJUP6YeAsIW2iH-V-JWufPACAqzTVEKF36djkiyF3k6jpCQVhmJMBjXZOPaRc4JCI-OIF1pf2mB4EdQhckTPHzkd5aj8nauxMcIT6XkgIcI_4ml3aAKFFWR62rkn7_RbfaCPmniew5AHq_rO4wLXjU62rVjj8br2ft-8D6UeRp8arBg%3D%3D)** IMMEDIATELY, we had a FLOOD of thousands of brave patriots flocking to support our mission. There's no doubt in my mind that if Tucker didn't give me a chance to come on his show- we wouldn't have achieved half as much as we did. _**[Will you join us in thanking Tucker Carlson for his bravery, and for being a historic champion of the conservative movement?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=243a4970c42a477f9eeb473f8d69158a&_e=tOjHsqQq0jQIYTRyyfDc5H3V7MOiDryNYihWh5zFbTgHH7BnuR2BIeu42SS7y35FaQLxz21uLAEX9Ts2I7b_paN90iyJhcGc94sFP03LZjfC0IQpo9dWePNSausU4sL9zDm-ZJEO9YSJnJj08P0go87se5nzHNZRYXtch2skm9udJQymJioZ0Dp9CmJUsStmxsn4xFHdskC-NbeTQCJywVTSPQBXeABaJ_1zGmzI-pOJpRvKSoMwFPrmxkbr_iQaHZYfC7dXSJrUvtYqvvrt7DKSWpw3PD5oNB64ZFrkJUP6YeAsIW2iH-V-JWufPACAnWVAp2C1VSxe99B8CB-crKJXyhNPSTnBopYBzEvNLKzxqXhwbPpyi6BY1EnUjTMx_1i87p4lW2_7ncgrLQpbGuQc1IWl3j3RT3aN31WxqGUvQkTTph9wjedqFeJPgIcWicT1Qn2YVRDSzBn3HVP-dA%3D%3D)**_

House Democrats are mounting their biggest push WE'VE EVER SEEN to remove Justice Thomas from the Supreme Court - why aren 't more Republicans speaking out in his defense?! | | | "SAVE JUSTICE CLARENCE THOMAS" Listen carefully: House Democrats are calling for his impeachment. Senate Democrats are calling for congressional investigations. And the Liberal Media is dragging him through the mud. They'll do anything to FORCE him off the Supreme Court! We urge you in the strongest possible terms to take this threat seriously. Why? Because if Democrats remove Justice Thomas from the bench, Joe Biden would IMMEDIATELY move to fill the vacancy with a Liberal activist judge, and we can kiss our reliable Supreme Court Majority GOODBYE! It's mission critical we stop this Liberal power grab before it's too late. "Don’t legitimize this Liberal plot against Justice Thomas with your silence! We need your help right here and right now. Peter — It’s time for Cameron Sexton to step down.
_First,_ he led the racist charge to expel the two youngest, Black lawmakers in the chamber. While Reps. Jones and Pearson are back where they belong, serving the people of Tennessee, the Speaker has tried to pull every trick in the book to keep them from legislating.
_Then,_ the news dropped that the Speaker spends more of his time in Nashville than his “home” district in Crossville. According to reports, he may have overcharged the people of Tennessee as much as $78,756 since 2020.
_And it doesn’t stop there,_ it’s now come to light that Speaker Sexton may have had prior knowledge of the sexual harassment incident that led to the resignation of Republican Rep. Scotty Campbell and hid it from the public to cover it up.
Peter — Now, it’s time for Sexton to go. We won’t stand by and let the GOP sweep this repeated corruption under the rug.
[**Add your name right now to join our call to demand that Speaker Sexton resigns.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62244236/402826492/1593217285?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20230424_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWY0MjVmMy1jZWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iqz3TixGiMPInszLsr2PV-7n7ur5JFcTM4QCCWdejgg=&emci=c7767405-cee2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f5f425f3-cee2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: What the National Republican Senatorial Committee said about me being a "nerd"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Their latest attack about me and Magic: The Gathering
#
Peter — the NRSC and Josh Hawley’s oppo shop said it’s “disqualifying” to be a “nerd” who plays Magic: The Gathering.
Well here’s what I have to say: **Being a “nerd” wasn’t something we worried about when we played after long days while deployed — and it’s not what Missourians are worried about either.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31662?refcode=em20230424-3038&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3038%2E614464%2EUShHTK)
Corrupt elites like Josh Hawley have spent years stripping communities across our state for parts. They use their power to control the lives of everyday Missourians instead of making them better and they’re desperate to make voters forget it.
**They know that this “nerd” — and the people-powered movement you’re helping us build — has a real shot to flip this Senate seat next year.**
But we can only do it with your help. So Peter:

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: It’s getting really, really, really old to have to wonder which fundamental freedom the far-right Supreme Court justices are about to dismantle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
The American people are losing confidence in the Court by the day. And for good reason. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62253456/402861240/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ13G_SCO_E_20230424_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTUwZjY5OS1mMGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LKACuWntcSDWqNF9PDsWV1hEjuzd3-pzVLNBsMkzqeI=&emci=c350f699-f0e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c550f699-f0e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
I don’t know about you, but I’m tired of being kept in suspense to see _just how extreme_ the Supreme Court is about to be. Last spring, we were waiting to see if they’d overturn Roe. Then their opinion came down like a hammer. Last Friday, we were waiting all day to see if they’d let one lower-court judge restrict access to medication abortion across the country. Finally, after 6:30 p.m., they finally announced that they wouldn’t — at least for now. It’s getting really, really, really old to have to wonder which fundamental freedom the far-right justices are about to dismantle. Simply put, a tiny group of far-right radicals are trying to impose their unpopular views on the rest of us for insidious reasons. The American people are losing confidence in the Court by the day. And for good reason, with the Court’s recent ethics scandals and dangerous decisions on abortion rights, climate action, gun safety, and more. They’re anti-union, they’re anti-consumer, and they've empowered corporations more than ever before — giving them religious liberty rights and letting them spend gobs of money to influence the political process. The Court is tossing aside settled law and saying they're just going to substitute their own personal views and make the rest of America bend to it. Pure and simple, a tiny group of far-right radicals are trying to impose their unpopular views on the rest of us for insidious reasons. It deeply troubles me to think how six justices could care so little about the people who will pay the price for their baseless decisions. So now is the time to be angry. And now is the time to channel that anger into action. Let’s remind ourselves the Supreme Court doesn't get the final word. The final word rests with We The People. **That’s why I just joined Senator Ed Markey and Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley in Boston to help launch the Just Majority Supreme Court accountability campaign.** **Alongside dozens of partners — including March For Our Lives, NARAL, and Color of Change — we’re calling for a fair and ethical Supreme Court. And we’re fighting to rebalance this hijacked institution by expanding it. Think of it as a democratic recalibration. Congress has already used that power seven times before, and it’s time to use it again.** The campaign’s kicking off a 20-city tour. I’m going to stay in the fight, and I’ll keep working to elect more anti-filibuster Democratic senators across the country — because that’s what we need to pass nationwide abortion protections and reverse the Court’s horrifying injustices. And we cannot let Republicans seize any more power. If they do, we’ve already seen their wishlist — and right at top, circled and underlined, is a nationwide ban on abortion. That means no safe havens anywhere. There is still a path out of these attacks on our freedoms. It is not a guaranteed path, but I can guarantee you this: You don't get what you don't fight for. So I’m staying in this fight all the way. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

clean_body: If House Republicans continue to miss their fundraising goals, we will SURELY lose our hold on the Majority for the House. | | | | | FIRST: House Democrats pledged $80,000,000+ to target swing districts in New York and California. THEN: House Democrats announced they had outraised House Republicans by $12,000,000+. NOW: Inside Elections has released their first set of House ratings of the cycle and we are TIED. If House Republicans continue to miss their fundraising goals, we will SURELY lose our hold on the Majority for the House. Everything is going to come down to YOU , Friend. The House GOP currently holds the narrowest Majority in decades. Top pollsters are already saying Dems have a chance to take back the House -- in fact, the odds they will are dead even. The stakes are clear: our Majority could collapse like a house of cards if we aren 't careful. This is where you come in. Small dollar donors like yourself are who make up the financial backbone of political campaigns. Without your support, we won't be able to continue on. "So, can we personally ask you to invest $5 in House Republicans efforts to DEFEND our Majority?" | | | "CHIP IN $5 >> INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS" We sincerely hope we can count on your support. name: Tim Kaine [via durbinforsenate.com]
subject: Before I became a Senator…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
This is who I am
#
Peter,
I’m Tim Kaine. Many of you know me as a U.S. Senator, but my passion for service and fighting for equality started long before I entered the public eye.
In my career, I’ve been a teacher, a missionary, a civil rights lawyer, a Mayor, Governor, Senator, and on the presidential ticket as a Vice Presidential candidate. **But over the decades, one thing has never wavered: my commitment to improving life for hard-working Americans.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62244426/402827288/1383980153?refcode=dd_em_230424_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2QyY2Y2MS1kMGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rp87sjNXjhmiSbR89WnmAmfQxesUiXD2-2YV4pXs49E=)
I grew up in Kansas City, where my Dad ran a union ironworking shop. My parents taught me the value of hard work, being kind, and serving others.
During my time in law school, I took a year off to volunteer as a missionary in Honduras, where I taught welding -- a skill I’d learned during weekends and summers in my Dad’s shop. While I was there, I witnessed an economic system where too few people controlled far too much of the wealth, and there began a commitment to expanding economic opportunity for everyone back at home.
**After law school, my wife, Anne and I moved to Richmond, started a family, joined a church, and made a home together with our three children.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62244428/402827290/1383980153?refcode=dd_em_230424_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2QyY2Y2MS1kMGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rp87sjNXjhmiSbR89WnmAmfQxesUiXD2-2YV4pXs49E=)
I began work as a civil rights lawyer, representing people who were discriminated against by banks and landlords, insurance companies firms and local governments, anyone who treated people unfairly. Ten years later, I ran for City Council, knocked on every door of my district, and won by just 97 votes.
Since then, I’ve gone on to become Mayor of Richmond, Virginia’s 70th Governor, and a U.S. Senator.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62244430/402827292/1383980153?refcode=dd_em_230424_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2QyY2Y2MS1kMGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rp87sjNXjhmiSbR89WnmAmfQxesUiXD2-2YV4pXs49E=)
Today, as I serve in the Capitol and run for re-election to the Senate, I’m still fighting for the issues that matter most to our communities -- like access to affordable health care, quality education, and economic opportunity for all.
**But right now, experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ are calling my race in Virginia a “pickup opportunity” for Republicans in the Senate in 2024. And with a razor-thin Democratic majority, we can’t afford to lose this seat. **
**[If you want to see more progress on the issues you and I have been fighting for together for so long, I hope you’ll consider splitting a donation between Senator Durbin’s and my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62244433/402827295/1383980153?refcode=dd_em_230424_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2QyY2Y2MS1kMGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rp87sjNXjhmiSbR89WnmAmfQxesUiXD2-2YV4pXs49E=)**
********[CONTRIBUTE>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62244435/402827297/1383980153?refcode=dd_em_230424_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2QyY2Y2MS1kMGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rp87sjNXjhmiSbR89WnmAmfQxesUiXD2-2YV4pXs49E=)********
Thanks for reading -- and for standing with me during my campaign to keep moving our Commonwealth and our country forward.
-Tim Kaine
P.S. Like many of you, I’m a huge music fan -- and I’m not bad on the harmonica. Some of my favorites are The Replacements, Charlie Parker, and the Carter Family.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62244437/402827299/1383980153?refcode=dd_em_230424_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2QyY2Y2MS1kMGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rp87sjNXjhmiSbR89WnmAmfQxesUiXD2-2YV4pXs49E=)
**** ****
**** ****
********[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62244439/402827301/1383980153?refcode=dd_em_230424_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2QyY2Y2MS1kMGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rp87sjNXjhmiSbR89WnmAmfQxesUiXD2-2YV4pXs49E=)********

body:
Republicans know that this seat is critical to Democratic Senate control and you better believe they’re going to pull out all the stops to regain the majority in the Senate. | |
---
Derek, I wanted to reach out personally to give you an update on my race: What’s crystal clear is that Republicans are absolutely terrified of the strong coalition of supporters we’re building. They know that this seat is critical to Democratic Senate control, and you better believe they’re going to pull out all the stops to get MAGA Republicans to regain the majority in the Senate. **Not going to happen -- not on my watch. But I’m counting on the support of this grassroots team to help me build the campaign we need to win.** **[Will you split a donation between the DNC and my campaign today? clean_body: Republicans know that this seat is critical to Democratic Senate control and you better believe they’re going to pull out all the stops to regain the majority in the Senate. | | Derek, I wanted to reach out personally to give you an update on my race: What’s crystal clear is that Republicans are absolutely terrified of the strong coalition of supporters we’re building. They know that this seat is critical to Democratic Senate control, and you better believe they’re going to pull out all the stops to get MAGA Republicans to regain the majority in the Senate. Not going to happen -- not on my watch. But I’m counting on the support of this grassroots team to help me build the campaign we need to win. I’m not one to back down from a fight. No matter how hard the GOP dark money machine comes at me, I’m keeping my eye on the prize: winning this race so I can continue to deliver for rural communities and my neighbors in Montana. Appreciate it, Jon Jon Tester U.S. Senator, Montana Paid for by the Democratic National Committee and authorized by Montanans for Jon Tester The DNC's Congressional Split Series helps fundraise for and raise awareness around down-ballot Democrats in some of the most important races across the country. body:
#
On behalf of Alexandria and our entire team, we wanted to thank you for being a part of our campaign for transformative change in Washington »
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230424.1pYtI2&refcode=em20230424-4215-P_FND_TYE_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4215%2E2526796%2EeqjOJt)
Because of your support, Alexandria has been a relentless force for progress since 2018 and has stood with the working families of NY-14 every single step of the way — from supporting Starbucks workers unionizing, to speaking out against monopolistic billionaires, to setting up a ‘homework helpers’ tutoring program for students in NY-14.
All of this work is made possible because of the collective power of our movement, and people like you contributing what they can to help build a brighter future for all people across the country.
[Will you contribute $3 right now in order to support Alexandria and our entire movement as we continue to build this campaign and push for progress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230424.1pYtI2&refcode=em20230424-4215-P_FND_TYE_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4215%2E2526796%2EeqjOJt)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230424.1pYtI2&refcode=em20230424-4215-P_FND_TYE_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4215%2E2526796%2EeqjOJt)**
Alexandria and our team are so grateful for your support. Whether you can afford to contribute today or not, thank you so much for being a key part of this people-powered movement.
Pa'lante,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230424?refcode=em20230424-4215-P_FND_TYE_MIS&t=22&refcode2=4215_2526796_eqjOJt&akid=4215%2E2526796%2EeqjOJt)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230424-4215-P_FND_TYE_MIS&t=23&akid=4215%2E2526796%2EeqjOJt)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=4215%2E2526796%2EeqjOJt) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=4215%2E2526796%2EeqjOJt) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=4215%2E2526796%2EeqjOJt)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=4215%2E2526796%2EeqjOJt)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=4215%2E2526796%2EeqjOJt)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

Hey Peter,Emily Busch’s son ran for his life on November 30, 2021, when a school shooter at Oxford High School opened fire and killed four children, and wounded seven others. Unfortunately, Oxford was just one of the many horrific incidents in Michigan and across our country lately – including a mass shooting at Michigan State University, in which some survivors of the Oxford School shooting had to **_once again run for their lives._** Our children shouldn’t have to relive trauma and go through not one, but _multiple_ school shootings in their lifetime. This is a uniquely American problem, and we need to solve it. Emily is deeply concerned about gun violence and the safety of our children and now, she wants to know where you stand on this key issue.**_So we want to know, how concerned are you about gun violence?_** [VERY name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Why?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
This is a question I get a lot.

Friend,
Someone recently asked me...
_... Why are you still running for president after everything the Left has done to you? Why don't you just go to a tropical island and live a very nice life?_
I get asked that question a lot.
**But no matter how tough this battle gets, I could _NEVER_ abandon America.**
America has given me everything I could ever have dreamed of. I truly love our country.
**And after seeing what the most incompetent and corrupt politicians have done to the greatest nation in history, I 'm going to keep fighting to save our country.**
_I didn 't "have" to run for president, but I truly believe that this is my calling. The idea of giving up on America doesn't even cross my mind._
And the more our enemies viciously try to stop me, the more I _**KNOW**_ that we MUST keep fighting to complete our mission to SAVE AMERICA.
I know you've already done a lot for this movement. History will forever remember the role you played in saving our country.
_But, if times aren 't too tough for you right now, even $1 could truly help our movement as the attacks against us get more and more vicious by the day._
[**Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA - for 1,500% impact.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9cb2292b6cf24c73bb093e19d71fef21&_e=YNgBjisKxgJVJ9qIrVm0snvnlH45z0hoPXWLZewfHuCel920mfa4eXibCaOlqoFvShNHvMk_usfrPpnKRt3XSnjzIicjgEtR5XOmDez3k8ely8-KjLTfPH_EgyA2lmSZz3yGeCNn0k2U90Lrnzg-DRlsM7VG8VthiJdMHizgKlrgwSXYGLjHHgVfKUShFMxq5BUpeA8xOTaKWDTKL373wBrbLTYOjjp78xyeAuTyDAkmPp40MHuqOAeQhA3X2LTWVSXWuaY2tUAsg_UvxC5Ag09Yac1tZO_FFNdC1FZKCqWZGTVB0bbdR_zV6Vzbx9-gttzQ8WtGgT1I7p3s66klfenJMnylKeB8hzAhn3kRmMLsdWDEaVk9dX5Fwphzs162GhwJxG81jeBluwV9GZqfzQ%3D%3D)

name: SHOCKER! (via VPP)
subject: Tucker Carlson = FIRED!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we’re OVERJOYED by this news
| **BREAKING: Tucker Carlson out at Fox News!!!** After YEARS of spreading misinformation, extremist conspiracy theories, and hateful rhetoric Tucker Carlson has been fired. _FINALLY!_

**So we’re sending Tucker Carlson a letter from our top grassroots supporters to tell him goodbye and good riddance!**

[**We’re sending this letter to his home at 8AM tomorrow – so we only have 105 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43970?t=6&akid=7306%2E878179%2E5m5fcR) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43970?t=7&akid=7306%2E878179%2E5m5fcR)
---

**TO:** Tucker Carlson
**FROM:** An elated Democrat
**SUBJECT:** Goodbye!

**_Dear Tucker Carlson — Goodbye and good riddance!_**

**We cannot begin to tell you the immense relief we felt when we saw that you had been fired from Fox News!**

_The lies you told your viewers have directly made our country worse._

Whether it’s election misinformation, COVID disinformation, or far-right conspiracy theories, there’s no doubt that you’ve helped increase the division, hatred, and violence in our country.

**We know transitioning to unemployment won’t be easy — so take your time looking for your next job!_In fact, the longer you take, the better for ALL of us!_**

[**Seriously, I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that are happy you won’t be on the air anymore. That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to tell you goodbye and to elect Democrats who will defeat the MAGA stooges you’ve promoted on Fox News for so long »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43970?t=8&akid=7306%2E878179%2E5m5fcR) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43970?t=9&akid=7306%2E878179%2E5m5fcR)
---
Goodbye and good riddance,
X A PROUD DEMOCRAT
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7306%2E878179%2E5m5fcR). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7306%2E878179%2E5m5fcR).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7306%2E878179%2E5m5fcR) to request fewer emails. name: =?utf-8?Q?Alfonso=20For=20Congress?=
subject: Time for a Change
body:
We are here to fight for you | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/alfonsoforcongress.com/time-for-a-change?e=16d812e81c)
---
# Our commitment is to you!

I hope this email finds you well. As your representative, I want to address the current divisive nature in Washington D.C.I assure you that I am committed to working towards a more collaborative and productive political environment.I believe that in order to do this, we need to focus on the issues that matter most to our constituents. One of these issues is protecting women's healthcare privacy. I am committed to ensuring that women have access to safe and affordable healthcare without fear of discrimination or violation of their privacy rights.Another issue that I am passionate about is taking care of our veterans. Our brave men and women who have served our country deserve nothing less than the best care and support. I will work tirelessly to ensure that they receive the care and benefits they need and deserve.Finally, I believe that bringing in good paying jobs is crucial to our community's success. I will work to attract and retain businesses that provide high-quality jobs with fair wages and benefits.In these challenging times, it is more important than ever that we come together to find common ground and work towards solutions that benefit us all. I am committed to being a leader who listens to and works with everyone to make our community a better place.
Thank you for your time and we hope to gain your support.
Sincerely,Joseph Alfonso
| [Your Support Helps](https://alfonsoforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bb75364011dcc8a637f1fdd6f&id=e834eb5d92&e=16d812e81c)
---
|

name: =?utf-8?Q?JR=20Majewski?=
subject: 🚨 I stand with Tucker Carlson
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JR FOR OHIO](https://jrforohio
body:
My experience on his show was that Tucker always had the best interests of our country at heart and he never hesitated to stand up for America-First.. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jrforohio/jr-majewski-officially-announces-campaign-to-represent-ohios-9th-district-in-congress-8123773?e=0426928d91)
---
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=6b32ebe75b&e=0426928d91)
Peter,
_**Real Conservatives are under attack.**_

Today’s news that Tucker Carlson will no longer be on Fox News in an outrage. Not only was he an incredible journalist and host, but he was also a brave and consistent voice for conservatism in America.

His departure is going to have devastating consequences for our party if we don’t join together and elect America-First Republicans to Congress.
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=3237353124&e=0426928d91)
| [JOIN ME IN STANDING WITH TUCKER CARLSON BY CHIPPING IN $50 OR MORE TO MY AMERICA-FIRST CAMPAIGN TODAY >>>](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=da30eb3004&e=0426928d91)
---
Since his show debuted, Tucker has been one of the few voices in the media willing to stand up for what is right, even if it meant standing against members of both parties. He always spoke truth to power and that’s why so many of us were able to trust him

My experience on his show was that Tucker always had the best interests of our country at heart and he never hesitated to stand up for America-First policies. His departure is going to leave a void in conservative media and it’s up to us to fill that void with strong Republican candidates who will fight for the interests of the American people

Let’s honor Tucker by joining together and electing real Republicans to Congress who will stand up for our values, fight for conservative policies, and speak truth to power.

[**Can I count on your support, Peter?**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=c96e214528&e=0426928d91)
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=19f7df00ae&e=0426928d91)
JR Majewski
Candidate for Congress
Ohio CD-09

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: The myth of a blue Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=138%2E135344%2EgEL7eA)
Friend --
Today we wanted to talk about the “myth” of a blue Michigan -- the notion that Michigan is now safely in Democratic hands.
Right now in Michigan, Democrats have a slim majority in the Michigan House, Senate and Governor’s office -- the trifecta -- for the first time in 40 years. But this is brand new, and it reflects a ton of recent change.
You only have to go back five short years to 2018 to see when the state was run top-to-bottom by Republicans -- and the state voted for President Trump in 2016.
These dramatic shifts from red to blue reflect the reality that Michiganders are all too familiar with: Michigan is the kind of place where Democrats have to be constantly out-raising, out-organizing, and out-working Republicans to stay ahead. It’s because of that hustle, and a whole lot of strategic planning, that we were able to secure our first Democratic majority in this state in November.
And in the short amount of time that we’ve had this majority we’ve codified abortion rights, protected LGBTQ Michiganders, repealed Right to Work, and the Governor signed a package of gun violence prevention bills into law that will create universal background checks and mandate safe storage requirements around children.
We are taking meaningful action in our state, but all Michiganders know that the minute the Democratic party sleeps on Michigan, it will flip back. Complacency will result in Democrats losing what we’ve worked so hard to achieve in these last five years.
That’s another reason why Elissa’s race is so important. Michigan has been represented in the Senate by two Democrats since 2001 and letting our guard down will all but ensure we will lose this seat to Republicans next year.
[**This is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. clean_body: Friend -- Today we wanted to talk about the “myth” of a blue Michigan -- the notion that Michigan is now safely in Democratic hands. Right now in Michigan, Democrats have a slim majority in the Michigan House, Senate and Governor’s office -- the trifecta -- for the first time in 40 years. But this is brand new, and it reflects a ton of recent change. You only have to go back five short years to 2018 to see when the state was run top-to-bottom by Republicans -- and the state voted for President Trump in 2016. These dramatic shifts from red to blue reflect the reality that Michiganders are all too familiar with: Michigan is the kind of place where Democrats have to be constantly out-raising, out-organizing, and out-working Republicans to stay ahead. It’s because of that hustle, and a whole lot of strategic planning, that we were able to secure our first Democratic majority in this state in November. And in the short amount of time that we’ve had this majority we’ve codified abortion rights, protected LGBTQ Michiganders, repealed Right to Work, and the Governor signed a package of gun violence prevention bills into law that will create universal background checks and mandate safe storage requirements around children. We are taking meaningful action in our state, but all Michiganders know that the minute the Democratic party sleeps on Michigan, it will flip back. Complacency will result in Democrats losing what we’ve worked so hard to achieve in these last five years. That’s another reason why Elissa’s race is so important. Michigan has been represented in the Senate by two Democrats since 2001 and letting our guard down will all but ensure we will lose this seat to Republicans next year. body:
Here's my story, Peter. | | | Hi Peter, can I tell you a little story about me? I grew up on my family’s farm and it’s still home today. That explains a lot about me. When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there — but I can damn sure remember rushing to a local doctor. Here’s why I’m telling you this: just like my $12 flattop haircut from my local barbershop back home and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts, **my background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government.** With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will fight to protect our public lands, create good-paying jobs, and ensure rural communities have hospitals within driving distance in case of an emergency. **I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate, Peter. I’m just a dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state and across the country.** **_[That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $10 or more between United Rural Democrats and my campaign today to help us block Mitch McConnell from taking back the Senate. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Why?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
This is a question I get a lot.

| | | [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bfa15c2dc4c40eda33f45083398ed01&_e=ULkbHsv7WJWxhm5sFb9yKLJNA87DQ0HnKqgmwf-_fc8526xJKB4WQSxXNaHYD1ndcdMDGOoDxjMLyEVLEZ1iLVpZ0zGB8smbhyPOiU0emDCQj5XpRFprlUlR_bnWFWuBcA4gKvH0JXSFtqqdr1qY2NZdFitks4WHsdc_EomHZLtVYfH198SOWFrEH2Tqhcr6dPF4XyP3SLlBcekXOGCW829ygO0f5HY7ejrOOwZ4O94Cupt5dqr3v0IluLn7p9kFQPTCaLvi-V-EQu1nSG4G9KLhEYsfZZC4KJm_A0kgGJELKn8rguMC3WgQWx37TjXaK4tpcBORAHQvyAfQkaJS8YpzvM5PUbiUj1dQjWyGte1XmHUnNdgxnn8JPz4mgLyPFEwY_bJsIias23Iz3cmFxg%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
Someone recently asked me...
_... Why are you still running for president after everything the Left has done to you? Why don't you just go to a tropical island and live a very nice life?_
I get asked that question a lot.
**But no matter how tough this battle gets, I could _NEVER_ abandon America.**
America has given me everything I could ever have dreamed of. I truly love our country.
**And after seeing what the most incompetent and corrupt politicians have done to the greatest nation in history, I 'm going to keep fighting to save our country.**
_I didn 't "have" to run for president, but I truly believe that this is my calling. The idea of giving up on America doesn't even cross my mind._
And the more our enemies viciously try to stop me, the more I _**KNOW**_ that we MUST keep fighting to complete our mission to SAVE AMERICA.
I know you've already done a lot for this movement. History will forever remember the role you played in saving our country.
_But, if times aren 't too tough for you right now, even $1 could truly help our movement as the attacks against us get more and more vicious by the day._
[**Please make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA - for 1,500% impact.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6bfa15c2dc4c40eda33f45083398ed01&_e=ULkbHsv7WJWxhm5sFb9yKLJNA87DQ0HnKqgmwf-_fc8526xJKB4WQSxXNaHYD1ndcdMDGOoDxjMLyEVLEZ1iLVpZ0zGB8smbhyPOiU0emDCQj5XpRFprlUlR_bnWFWuBcA4gKvH0JXSFtqqdr1qY2NZdFitks4WHsdc_EomHZLtVYfH198SOWFrEH2Tqhcr6dPF4XyP3SLlBcekXOGCW829ygO0f5HY7ejrOOwZ4O94Cupt5dqr3v0IluLn7p9kF_iuFXbFXYMxi9d8gB9Pw9xlvE3T95AkrKRb4WGpKSM4K4DhTeNiD9QA14Tx6TuUE9vTjv_ZPhEnyNV9LhTLtU2g_4PHcnRmR-dKwGCvFYjHzV_8RYe9_3-ZJwpGwiySVEkp42BUOgRoogfilrka0DQ%3D%3D)
Thank you,

name: Conrad Black
subject: Our nation desperately needs The New York Sun
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTE0LTlhODE4YzkxOGQ2MzQ5ODE5OWE0YzVjOWRlNTRkMzZmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9RkZPMzgwMTQifQ/ZHVW8JEZaHH4O73Ojaq16g)
---
---
**FROM THE DESK OF CONRAD BLACK** **You may already know that I spent most of my career in publishing and helped build the third largest newspaper company in the western world.**

We published over 400 titles, including the London Daily Telegraph, Chicago Sun Times, Jerusalem Post, Spectator, and most of the leading newspapers in Canada and Australia.

**I am proud to have also been one of the founders of the modern New York Sun, and believe that now, more than ever, it is a paper that is uniquely suited for this moment of crisis in journalism.**

Too many journalists are not only failing to live up to public expectations but are actively abusing public trust. Instead of policing the powerful on behalf of the public, they police the public on behalf of the powers they favor.

**The New York Sun has never lost sight of who it serves.** It's a patriotic newspaper that places principle over politics and people over party. That is why I am happy to be a weekly contributor to it. It maintains the highest professional standards without being pedantic or boring. It's a community where I am proud to belong.

The Sun is a lone voice among a sea of major publications owned by multi-billion-dollar corporations that generally try to stifle dissent.

**The only one way the Sun can win is if we all join in its effort.** Collectively we cannot be overwhelmed by any media conglomerate or oppressive, woke, media groupthink. The Sun has long advocated on our behalf. Now, if we join the Sun's movement to restore American journalism, we will be unstoppable.

**Membership starts at just 1¢ a day.** I encourage you to sign up now. Every single person counts.
---
[**Join the Sun now →**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTE0LTlhODE4YzkxOGQ2MzQ5ODE5OWE0YzVjOWRlNTRkMzZmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZ25zb2Z5Y2NxaD9zcmM9RkZPMzgwMTQifQ/GbonvbVBFuIzjup_DgqDJA)
---
Please join us in the fight to restore America's journalism.

This is a newspaper that our country desperately needs.

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | FROM THE DESK OF CONRAD BLACK You may already know that I spent most of my career in publishing and helped build the third largest newspaper company in the western world. We published over 400 titles, including the London Daily Telegraph, Chicago Sun Times, Jerusalem Post, Spectator, and most of the leading newspapers in Canada and Australia. I am proud to have also been one of the founders of the modern New York Sun, and believe that now, more than ever, it is a paper that is uniquely suited for this moment of crisis in journalism. Too many journalists are not only failing to live up to public expectations but are actively abusing public trust. Instead of policing the powerful on behalf of the public, they police the public on behalf of the powers they favor. The New York Sun has never lost sight of who it serves. It's a patriotic newspaper that places principle over politics and people over party. That is why I am happy to be a weekly contributor to it. It maintains the highest professional standards without being pedantic or boring. It's a community where I am proud to belong. The Sun is a lone voice among a sea of major publications owned by multi-billion-dollar corporations that generally try to stifle dissent. The only one way the Sun can win is if we all join in its effort. Collectively we cannot be overwhelmed by any media conglomerate or oppressive, woke, media groupthink. The Sun has long advocated on our behalf. Now, if we join the Sun's movement to restore American journalism, we will be unstoppable. Membership starts at just 1¢ a day. I encourage you to sign up now. Every single person counts. Please join us in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is a newspaper that our country desperately needs. Conrad Black Columnist for The New York Sun | | Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: Team Helen
subject: Is there anything we can say?

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
Hey folks — With only three weeks left in this race, we have to ask: Is there anything we can say to convince you to make your first donation before Helen’s LAST end-of-month fundraising goal?

What if we said Helen’s running in a massive field of candidates — so we need to work 10x as hard to have our message heard by Philly voters?

What if we told you those other candidates have literally poured up to $8,000,000 of their personal fortunes into this race, while Helen’s campaign is powered by grassroots donors like you and emails like this one?

And what if we reminded you it was Helen who provided safe drinking water in every school? Ensured hourly workers had fair, stable schedules? And reduced eviction rates by 70% citywide?

No matter what we say or how we say it, here’s the bottom line: Philadelphia needs a tough Philly mom like Helen in the Mayor’s Office, and Helen needs your support to win this crucial, crowded race.

Please rush $20.23, or whatever you’re able, to reach our $15,000 end-of-month goal to keep our ads up on TV and elect Helen Gym on May 16th. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

Thanks so much. Your support makes all our work possible.

— Team Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. | | Thank you, Tucker. My name's Ryan Girdusky. In May of 2021 I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our schools by replacing leftist school board members with brave conservatives. **[Tucker Carlson heard about my plan and had me on this show.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=034a2301a2dc4686876ac2a7e0f204fb&_e=dEnZC107uv-KC79qconKnbFoCnKcUpL1KUmljVKTVfr1Htvk0mFzNH4u5v0QPMwUPUl9dnHNSTTq18zxFxkbVIyV6hKFtCTHNhzU9Qdd9kpzlBgPu5Qav4UbrmDOyqcc__0DgzYYz_zO5Dw6_0d_6nyZMH7Cn7Daqukt5GrSFhWZ08kbz69Dqj0cahgoX9Eqass9As9XaQhdwRE7i0RJI8lwnByiOEDoeHlAOwgZKmaX0EVvdgzVTWwgVz5kx6bdr94gl6mcVdBH3LGPsYSkyssQhGajygx1qqcsZsKJMIfQobppacE9hOhWFjE-zD31mGu4S-mppadKLpX2NupJc3pRgmFU1KZOnmBPNO6aV8dWCp7YUG-gTjNiUkU-tWfkUVsGljVJcAYX9x5Qvdw3wYwlVJ5Nqf3UKnKWoTpSfcXR086-oBIZf5tssWc9BLdc1BjWGmUo7gNlOY4idetbcg%3D%3D)** IMMEDIATELY, we had a FLOOD of thousands of brave patriots flocking to support our mission. There's no doubt in my mind that if Tucker didn't give me a chance to come on his show- we wouldn't have achieved half as much as we did. _**[Will you join us in thanking Tucker Carlson for his bravery, and for being a historic champion of the conservative movement?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=034a2301a2dc4686876ac2a7e0f204fb&_e=dEnZC107uv-KC79qconKnbFoCnKcUpL1KUmljVKTVfr1Htvk0mFzNH4u5v0QPMwUPUl9dnHNSTTq18zxFxkbVIyV6hKFtCTHNhzU9Qdd9kpzlBgPu5Qav4UbrmDOyqcc__0DgzYYz_zO5Dw6_0d_6nyZMH7Cn7Daqukt5GrSFhWZ08kbz69Dqj0cahgoX9Eqass9As9XaQhdwRE7i0RJI8lwnByiOEDoeHlAOwgZKmaX0EVvdgzVTWwgVz5kx6bdr94gl6mcVdBH3LGPsYSkyssQhGajygx1qqcsZsKJMIfQobppacE9hOhWFjE-zD31JUmPzWopibit6vD9GTUPdifZZVZOIAOCO6io6scVGzzBPws9Z2rCatAyYiMp6dxKKcl74vGuKlgXhrHeVFivhYeKi9E0yHOXRyQyrfFdqgxg1dm2VcosRF-3EH3AUcVMUKSqfm3P5Ub3wqf5RVTUXg%3D%3D)**_

body:
I won’t let him win.

**It’s official: Extremist Lt. Gov. Mark Robinson (R) has entered the race for Governor of North Carolina.**

I won’t stand for an extremist who will drag North Carolina backward to become our Governor. Derek, I’m ready to fight back with everything I’ve got — but I need you with me.

**[Rush an immediate contribution to defeat Mark Robinson>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246489/402834746/-1679429229?refcode=email_042423_shapiro-stein&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDBhMDc3YS1kOWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9FmUaSjBdviaPQ92sRZqOelGZWPhFoYIg8HX_99CS04=)** | | [Fight Back →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246490/402834747/-1679429229?refcode=email_042423_shapiro-stein&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDBhMDc3YS1kOWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9FmUaSjBdviaPQ92sRZqOelGZWPhFoYIg8HX_99CS04=)
---
* * *
Derek, you and I believe that building a brighter future is possible for North Carolina – one that is rooted in our shared values of freedom, justice, and opportunity for all.

My opponent would do the exact opposite.

Derek, extremists like Mark Robinson want to tell people who they can marry, when women must be pregnant, and which people we should hate. He and his radical accomplices are the greatest threat to the brighter future we seek. Frankly, Robinson is wrong for North Carolina.

**Our race for Governor of North Carolina will be the most important and most expensive in the country in 2024, and right now, it’s way too close for comfort.[I’m asking committed Democrats everywhere to step up and help defeat Mark Robinson and the North Carolina GOP. Click here to split any amount you can between my campaign and Governor Josh Shapiro's to power our fight >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246491/402834748/-1679429229?refcode=email_042423_shapiro-stein&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDBhMDc3YS1kOWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9FmUaSjBdviaPQ92sRZqOelGZWPhFoYIg8HX_99CS04=)**

The most important thing we can do for the future of democracy everywhere is to prevent extremist, anti-democracy radicals from gaining power — but Robinson and his GOP allies have spent years preparing for this campaign. We cannot allow him to become Governor.

I know you share my priorities for North Carolina and our nation, Derek. If we are going to protect our fundamental rights, secure our democracy, and ensure the dignity of ALL people, we need to stand together and win this CRITICAL race.

**[Please, click here to split a donation and power our campaign for a brighter future>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246492/402834749/-1679429229?refcode=email_042423_shapiro-stein&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDBhMDc3YS1kOWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9FmUaSjBdviaPQ92sRZqOelGZWPhFoYIg8HX_99CS04=)**

subject: I need to know who you support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | |
---
Hi team -- It’s Diana, Research Director for the DSCC. I’m reaching out because President Biden and Donald Trump are TIED in recent polling data.

**It’s almost _unbelievable_ \-- especially with a 34-count felony indictment against Trump, his scandal-plagued presidency, and _multiple_ investigations still ongoing.**

We need to confirm these results ASAP. But I just checked our official poll results and didn’t see your response -- and without hearing your answers, we will NOT have a representative sample in Pennsylvania. That’s why I’m reaching out:

**With this CRUCIAL poll closing at midnight,_please answer immediately:_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12805?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230424-Diana-TrumpVsBidenStrawPoll-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230424-Diana-TrumpVsBidenStrawPoll-ETG-sl1&akid=10543%2E9716520%2E__hpuw)

clean_body: | | | Hi team -- It’s Diana, Research Director for the DSCC. I’m reaching out because President Biden and Donald Trump are TIED in recent polling data. It’s almost unbelievable \-- especially with a 34-count felony indictment against Trump, his scandal-plagued presidency, and multiple investigations still ongoing. We need to confirm these results ASAP. But I just checked our official poll results and didn’t see your response -- and without hearing your answers, we will NOT have a representative sample in Pennsylvania. body:
What we've been up to [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246700/402836938/-2052849?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5YWI2OTQtZGFlMi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IE3cV1rzrPXE7dUMDRhPFGMftR7KGiXMiwrawUmYBgY=&emci=b498bb45-a8e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=bd9ab694-dae2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10498376) | _Dear Peter, Joe Signorello here checking in from the road. Can you believe we have been on the campaign trail together for nearly two months? March and April have been busy for our team. I wanted to share some of the most memorable moments with you, but before you read through,[_**could you pitch in**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246703/402836962/-2039043568?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_24042023_FR_Actives_Trail-Notes&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5YWI2OTQtZGFlMi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IE3cV1rzrPXE7dUMDRhPFGMftR7KGiXMiwrawUmYBgY=)_[ _**_$27 to help keep our digital grassroots fundraising on track?_**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246705/402836970/-2039043568?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_24042023_FR_Actives_Trail-Notes&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5YWI2OTQtZGFlMi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IE3cV1rzrPXE7dUMDRhPFGMftR7KGiXMiwrawUmYBgY=) [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246706/402836981/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_24042023_FR_Actives_Trail-Notes&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5YWI2OTQtZGFlMi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IE3cV1rzrPXE7dUMDRhPFGMftR7KGiXMiwrawUmYBgY=)
* * *
I was proud to stand on the picket line alongside striking graduate student workers at Rutgers University earlier in March. I support every single worker’s right to organize their workplace. Graduate students provide critical research and teaching support throughout our public university system and deserve fair wages, access to affordable housing, good healthcare benefits, and more. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246707/402836989/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_24042023_FR_Actives_Trail-Notes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5YWI2OTQtZGFlMi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IE3cV1rzrPXE7dUMDRhPFGMftR7KGiXMiwrawUmYBgY=) We also introduced a furry-special campaign team member: Bips the Cat. We knew this was going to be a tough race and wanted to make sure we had an expert on the game of cat-and-mouse on hand to fend off any sneaky maneuvering from our opponent or his corporate cronies. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246708/402836990/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_24042023_FR_Actives_Trail-Notes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5YWI2OTQtZGFlMi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IE3cV1rzrPXE7dUMDRhPFGMftR7KGiXMiwrawUmYBgY=) To those who celebrated – Happy Easter, Passover, and Ramadan! In the Signorello family, Easter is an important time to come together, and to enjoy each other’s company and incredible food. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246709/402836991/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_24042023_FR_Actives_Trail-Notes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5YWI2OTQtZGFlMi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IE3cV1rzrPXE7dUMDRhPFGMftR7KGiXMiwrawUmYBgY=) It was great to run into former progressive candidate Lawrence Hamm at the Rally for MLK in Newark earlier this month! I will always stand up and speak out in the face of injustice, and will bring that energy to Washington as your next Senator. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246710/402836992/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_24042023_FR_Actives_Trail-Notes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5YWI2OTQtZGFlMi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IE3cV1rzrPXE7dUMDRhPFGMftR7KGiXMiwrawUmYBgY=) As a local Mayor, our public elementary schools are incredibly important to me. I had the opportunity earlier this month to participate in Aldene Elementary School’s annual PTO fundraiser to ensure our young students have the resources and opportunities they need to succeed. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246711/402836993/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_24042023_FR_Actives_Trail-Notes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5YWI2OTQtZGFlMi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IE3cV1rzrPXE7dUMDRhPFGMftR7KGiXMiwrawUmYBgY=) I also toured new facilities and programs at Saint Elizabeth University in Florham Park. It was a fantastic opportunity to connect with educators and students and to discuss the importance of public service and public education! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246712/402836994/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_24042023_FR_Actives_Trail-Notes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5YWI2OTQtZGFlMi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IE3cV1rzrPXE7dUMDRhPFGMftR7KGiXMiwrawUmYBgY=) Being on the campaign trail is an incredible experience, Peter. I look forward to continuing to travel around New Jersey to talk with folks everywhere about the issues that matter. [_**Can you help support our grassroots campaign with a donation before the end of the month?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246713/402836995/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_24042023_FR_Actives_Trail-Notes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5YWI2OTQtZGFlMi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IE3cV1rzrPXE7dUMDRhPFGMftR7KGiXMiwrawUmYBgY=) [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246714/402836996/-1437131847?refcode=SIG-NJ-SEN_EMAIL_24042023_FR_Actives_Trail-Notes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5YWI2OTQtZGFlMi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IE3cV1rzrPXE7dUMDRhPFGMftR7KGiXMiwrawUmYBgY=) Thank you, **— Joe** |
* * *
_I'm Joe Signorello. I’m the Mayor of Roselle Park, New Jersey, and I’m running for U.S. Senate in 2024. Bob Menendez is an embarrassment to the people of the state of New Jersey, but for the last couple of years, we’ve had no other option – nobody’s been willing to step up to him. **I'm ready to get to work!**_ _Once we leave the corrupt politics of the past behind, we can move forward with progress and have a smart, efficient government with the ability to make positive change for everyone.**I need your support to build our grassroots movement — [so please chip in what you can right now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246715/402837024/244492595?refcode=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5YWI2OTQtZGFlMi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IE3cV1rzrPXE7dUMDRhPFGMftR7KGiXMiwrawUmYBgY=)**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62246716/402837025/244492595?refcode=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQyMzEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ5YWI2OTQtZGFlMi1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IE3cV1rzrPXE7dUMDRhPFGMftR7KGiXMiwrawUmYBgY=) Our email list is an important tool for us to reach Democrats and activists in New Jersey and around the country. If you no longer wish to receive emails from us, please use [this link to unsubscribe.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/qsataXLFGEWcjxevshYDeA2?unsubscribedata=gUq02v6rE%2FedhOlaJJ468c3mCnqtvf2WfczkA6i3t8qGsc6F8jnx2kYrC%2BpMV6wms2k%2BUc0CZbjtLLhDATGEaCUtPQukvRyqHPai%2BEwuCx01k3AVSmorMMMzgxPCqGo%2BX3adxCeJUuFFpcivjC20sMsFL0Yr0BtJagQWTWKqq1p27%2Ftrr0fWsKZdSBziFfqwSX3ysmwuyByIiZG9PUXjOZrHwvVCPRFolXL4YuDmVSOvhDUAYv7KHCgD9Ow%2BVwKEzz28l4xCNzN7BopE1hI2AdFz%2Fh%2BUwRjtCgTfcS1ujI6aNVmoUn6Os4PzXMWLVKx1r0vGPT5bI6H7uDP7UC15t0KWNPdD05GNUzCa%2BaUwLvn9C41ib%2BJJLQSKvt9pmd1NUFqZZ2yhPZYV6uP%2BsHdGBE7DcjK0eVAurQr2pG5Lu7QfgX5F2TCuX2mGZjI8Ii4Y) Paid for by Signorello for Senate

name: Riley Gaines
subject: They gave Lia Thomas the trophy all for a photo-op…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
It gets worse:When I tied with Lia Thomas - down the hundredthof a second - I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes...

My name is Riley Gaines. I'm a 12 time All-American swimmer with 5 SEC titles under my belt after my time at the University of Kentucky.

After college, my dream was to become a dentist. Unfortunately, my life completely changed when I was forced to share a locker room with and compete against biological male Lia Thomas at the 2022 NCAA Women's Swimming Championship.

**It gets worse:** When I tied with Lia Thomas - down the _hundredth_ of a second - I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes...

My story is not unique. Unfortunately, countless young girls and women like myself are being sidelined as biological males infiltrate and dominate our competition.

**That 's why I'm taking a stand against Democrats' attacks against women's sports.**

_The "Party of Science" doesn't believe in biological differences.
The "Party of Women" doesn't support women.
Democrats are erasing our dreams in the name of wokeness._

Fortunately, Republicans in the House have introduced a bill that would codify the protections that women have been able to count on for generations, ensuring that biological girls will have an equal playing field. Together, we're making it clear we will not stand for discrimination against girls and women in sports. But Joe Biden is threatening to do just the opposite - to cement into law the destruction of women's sports...

So, I'm humbly asking on behalf of millions of female athletes dreaming big - **[will you stand with me?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=97050b0926294cb8958232b6e3dcec38&_e=wdBGoVyDLpMtd-veYEzlnYnR9_aK2e7tnxjXp5NKh_4g_QYqY77RPfF19fen2g5PhRENdi1Nfj5ezAWjdgV7IR7j9k0Uq5kFcUMcEQ_QIFr1A5yNJnHLd48_2ZV7KDl4H6t8A1bMrMV2uELn6dbd6Zz3g_RXXG6_EE4VItAHzXDH_Avkw4wS-p59aSfRASe-uy53z0my7wwCYpd5ujzCGjYEImGHWxKW7yQHVHwjBWsbFbdHNeYZ0xUjq7bnuSXKyYZt5UU8mdo6K-Vu1OdL5bVvzQigpROhM3Gp4qjWU44QlRSypXPhlqLpQwx2zlUtDP3qRN9TV-HXroJXoejz_8vYmTueaQHmlFJjESb3X0Gps_8mzmnTkyToSERY1Hwz1DhdOpXTuIh4hxv_qKwaHnUPkQdaajnlf6ugUM3nUO0e0-WASifaxxwx1UQicZEuzffvni3b5y-t0w_HR8Sexw%3D%3D "will you stand with me?")** If we fail, I fear this could be the end of female athletic competition as we know it...

subject: Tammy + Jacky
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www

|

| | They've got what it takes to win. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62246930/402838230/541775293?sourceid=1049957&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThiZjljYy1kYWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gxlQJF-F7ek8zjC2Kdd6UK8lJGu5HnZQYgw5eZVKCeI=&emci=c3f34af5-b2e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=158bf9cc-dae2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

If you're looking to support pro-choice Democrats in some of the toughest Senate races of 2024, look no further:

Sens. **Tammy Baldwin (WI)** and **Jacky Rosen (NV)** are running to defend blue Senate seats in quintessential swing states this cycle. And, frankly, these are seats we can't afford to lose if we want to maintain control of the Senate.

**[**Donate now to help elect and reelect pro-choice champions like Tammy Baldwin and Jacky Rosen who can help protect our razor-thin Senate majority.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62246951/402838307/541775293?sourceid=1049957&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThiZjljYy1kYWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gxlQJF-F7ek8zjC2Kdd6UK8lJGu5HnZQYgw5eZVKCeI=&emci=c3f34af5-b2e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=158bf9cc-dae2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Tammy and Jacky are running for reelection in two of the toughest races of 2024, period. Republicans see both of these seats as major pick-up opportunities, and they will do everything in their power to unseat our rockstar senators — including hostile attacks and huge fundraising boosts.

Fortunately, we know that, with the support of the EMILYs List community, Tammy and Jacky have what it takes to win.

In 2012, Tammy Baldwin first ran for Senate in deep purple Wisconsin as the race's clear underdog, and when she won, she became the first openly gay person ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And in 2018, Jacky Rosen was the _only_ Democratic challenger in the country to unseat a Republican Senate incumbent.

These women are _very_ familiar with tough races — and they both know what it's like to fight hard and emerge victorious. We've been with these pro-choice champions through each of their previous runs, and this cycle we're ready to help them win again. ****Donate now to help elect and reelect women like Tammy Baldwin and Jacky Rosen in some of the toughest races of 2024:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Help-Women-Win-April23](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62246955/402838312/541775293?sourceid=1049957&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNThiZjljYy1kYWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gxlQJF-F7ek8zjC2Kdd6UK8lJGu5HnZQYgw5eZVKCeI=&emci=c3f34af5-b2e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=158bf9cc-dae2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you,

body:
The campaign we ran to get him kicked off Military installations and his impact on Veterans cut through the clutter
#
As you may have already heard, Tucker Carlson was abruptly let go at FOX News earlier today. Let us be clear:
Part of the reason Tucker Carlson is gone today is because of the lies and disinformation he peddled about the insurrection at the Capitol on January 6.
And FOX News would not have made this decision if it wasn’t for the extraordinary amount of pressure they were getting about Tucker Carlson.
We played a big role in that. We. VoteVets and YOU. The campaign we ran to get him kicked off Military installations and his impact on Veterans cut through the clutter.
Our ads and other tactics to keep our work in the news kept FOX’s feet to the fire.
But if FOX News thinks this solves the problem, they’re wrong. We will not stop until their other lying hosts — ones targeting Veterans with disinformation and lies to pit us against each other — are gone from their network, or gone from Military TVs.
**[We can’t do that alone. We never could. So we’re asking: Can you please contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to VoteVets today? name: Kirsten Engel
subject: I think it's important you know this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi friend,
As I ask for your support in this race, I believe it's important to be as transparent as possible about who I am and why I'm running for Congress. That's why I wanted to take a minute to tell you more about my story.
I've spent my career standing up for underserved communities and protecting our resources for generations to come.
I’ve always been passionate about conservation and the environment — one of my first jobs was as a National Park Ranger! I followed this passion by getting a law degree . As an environmental lawyer, I held polluters accountable, cleaned up waste sites, and contributed to the Supreme Court case that recognized the role greenhouse gases play in climate change.
It wasn’t until my daughter started school that I was inspired to run for office. I saw how Republican-backed cuts were making our public schools worse, and I had to take action.
I ran for State House hoping to make a difference in the futures of kids across Arizona. I fought to fully fund our schools, to make college more affordable, and to invest in technical programs. I stood up to extremists to protect our water supply and clean energy resources. And I worked across the aisle on issues like criminal justice reform.
Two years ago, I decided to run for Congress. I was proud of what I had done in the Arizona legislature — but I knew there was still so much more I could accomplish for Arizona families.
Then, just months before the election, the Supreme Court handed down the Dobbs decision and overturned nearly 50 years of abortion protections. To say I was furious would be an understatement.
On Election Day, our movement outperformed all expectations. We showed that southern Arizonans want leaders who will FIGHT for basic freedoms — not run away when the issues get tough.
I'm running again because I know that together, we can win this race. We can build a better Arizona by fighting the good fight in Congress. That's why I have to ask: will you become a Founding Donor to our campaign now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_042423_AboutMe]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=X_042423_AboutMe_25]
Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_042423_AboutMe_100]
Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=X_042423_AboutMe_250]
Donate $1500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=1500&refcode=X_042423_AboutMe_1500]
Donate other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_042423_AboutMe_other]
Thank you so much for taking the time to read this.
— Kirsten
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_042423_AboutMe [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_042423_AboutMe]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_042423_AboutMe [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_042423_AboutMe] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_042423_AboutMe]

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Records Show Funding for EcoHealth/Wuhan Institute Research to Create Coronavirus ‘Mutants’
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently it received 552 pages of records from the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) which include the initial grant application and annual reports to the National Institutes of Health (NIH) from EcoHealth Alliance, describing the aim of its work with the Wuhan Institute of Virology in China to create mutant viruses “to better predict the capacity of our CoVs [coronaviruses] to infect people.”

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Apr 24, 2023
---|---|---

The program is known as Gang Resistance Education And Training (GREAT) and it has been funded by the U.S. since 2010 in El Salvador, Honduras, Panama and Costa Rica to supposedly prevent youth crime, violence and gang involvement. Under the new $5.4 million grant Guatemala, a hotbed of gang violence, has been added to the list and will receive the biggest single chunk of money.
