### [George Soros’ army of lieutenants get easy access to Biden White House ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63091&L=29394&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZ2VvcmdlLXNvcm9zLWFybXktb2YtbGlldXRlbmFudHMtZ2V0LWVhc3ktYWNjZXNzLXRvLWJpZGVuLXdoaXRlLWhvdXNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=4d46ab862a8a7460fc9493180ddd27f85feaac81c39807b3efc81f6b53cfcd7f) The New York Post Far-left billionaire George Soros has a legion of loyal lieutenants who’ve racked up over two dozen meetings with top officials at the White House since President Biden took office, The Post has learned.

The progressive kingmaker’s unrivaled access into the Biden administration extends well beyond his 37-year-old son Alexander, who chairs the powerful, liberal grant-making network Open Society Foundations founded by his dad, and as The Post reported on Page 1 last week, has taken on the role of a de-facto White House “ambassador” by making at least 14 visits there. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63091&L=29394&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZ2VvcmdlLXNvcm9zLWFybXktb2YtbGlldXRlbmFudHMtZ2V0LWVhc3ktYWNjZXNzLXRvLWJpZGVuLXdoaXRlLWhvdXNlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=4d46ab862a8a7460fc9493180ddd27f85feaac81c39807b3efc81f6b53cfcd7f)

### [Judicial Watch Sues MD Police for Records on Illegal Protests Outside SCOTUS Justices Homes ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63091&L=29324&F=H&&hash=991f3810f4be3d4fe67baed664eab1e2e9ae1f1b3ac553e42bdb612854b11e70) CNS News The Montgomery County Police Department in Maryland has not responded to a standard and legal Public Information Act (PIA) request for records and communications about the ongoing protests outside the homes of some Supreme Court justices. As a result, Judicial Watch has filed a PIA lawsuit against the police department in the Montgomery Circuit Court for those records. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63091&L=29324&F=H&&hash=991f3810f4be3d4fe67baed664eab1e2e9ae1f1b3ac553e42bdb612854b11e70)

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently it received 552 pages of records from the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) which include the initial grant application and annual reports to the National Institutes of Health (NIH) from EcoHealth Alliance, describing the aim of its work with the Wuhan Institute of Virology in China to create mutant viruses “to better predict the capacity of our CoVs [coronaviruses] to infect people.” | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Apr 24, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently it received 552 pages of records from the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) which include the initial grant application and annual reports to the National Institutes of Health (NIH) from EcoHealth Alliance, describing the aim of its work with the Wuhan Institute of Virology in China to create mutant viruses “to better predict the capacity of our CoVs [coronaviruses] to infect people.” ---|--- | | | | | As part of the Biden administration’s fruitless drive to address the underlying factors of “irregular migration” the U.S. government will pour extra money into a longstanding Central American anti-gang program that has failed to put a dent in the region’s gang stronghold and the violence that has spilled north. The program is known as Gang Resistance Education And Training (GREAT) and it has been funded by the U.S. since 2010 in El Salvador, Honduras, Panama and Costa Rica to supposedly prevent youth crime, violence and gang involvement. Under the new $5.4 million grant Guatemala, a hotbed of gang violence, has been added to the list and will receive the biggest single chunk of money. ---|--- | | | | | “One can only conclude, after seeing the uproar over the anti-Trump, partisan Mueller operation, that the Garland Justice Department has something to hide about Jack Smith and his prosecutors again targeting Trump and other Republicans with unprecedented investigations,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Special Prosecutor Jack Smith isn’t above the law and the American people have the right to basic transparency and accountability.” ---|--- | | | | | The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) misled and stonewalled Judicial Watch on a legitimate public record request involving an illegal Chinese police station opened in New York by agents of China’s communist government. The outpost is the first in the United States operated on behalf of the Fuzhou branch of the Ministry of Public Security (MPS) of the People’s Republic of China (PRC) and was surreptitiously established in an office building in Manhattan’s Chinatown to intimidate Chinese dissidents living in this country. ---|--- | | | The New York Post Far-left billionaire George Soros has a legion of loyal lieutenants who’ve racked up over two dozen meetings with top officials at the White House since President Biden took office, The Post has learned. The progressive kingmaker’s unrivaled access into the Biden administration extends well beyond his 37-year-old son Alexander, who chairs the powerful, liberal grant-making network Open Society Foundations founded by his dad, and as The Post reported on Page 1 last week, has taken on the role of a de-facto White House “ambassador” by making at least 14 visits there. CNS News The Montgomery County Police Department in Maryland has not responded to a standard and legal Public Information Act (PIA) request for records and communications about the ongoing protests outside the homes of some Supreme Court justices. As a result, Judicial Watch has filed a PIA lawsuit against the police department in the Montgomery Circuit Court for those records. Breitbart “I’m not a scientist, but I will say this — why in fact did the NIH get, a penny a single cent from — for a Wuhan virology lab in China, our number one geopolitical foe?” host Sean Hannity said. “Number two, it sounds like they’re playing with fire when you read the actual document and the draft by Judicial Watch. And, three, you know, I believe that we were lied to from the very beginning that Anthony Fauci, the people that were telling us that this was a wet market issue and not a virology lab issue were lying to us. * * *
Peter — we can no longer ignore the alarming rate of gun violence in America.
We've had over 160 mass shootings and 12,000 gun-related deaths in the U.S. just this year. And what's the weapon of choice? Assault rifles.
Here's the thing: _Experts estimate that a national ban on assault weapons could cut deaths in mass shootings by a WHOPPING 70%._ It's a no-brainer.
President Biden is on board, but we need Congress to act NOW. Do you agree that it's long overdue for Washington to ban assault weapons?

We've had over 160 mass shootings and 12,000 gun-related deaths in the U.S. just this year. And what's the weapon of choice? Assault rifles. Here's the thing: Experts estimate that a national ban on assault weapons could cut deaths in mass shootings by a WHOPPING 70%. It's a no-brainer. subject: A look at our ActBlue

body:
Fundraising is critical this early in the race, so we're keeping a close eye on this number.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=21786%2E3422442%2EGtSBgl)
Hey Derek,
Here's what we see when we log in to our ActBlue:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230424-1?refcode=EMAG24_1_AVG_20230424_V1_F&refcode2=21786_3422442_GtSBgl&akid=21786%2E3422442%2EGtSBgl)
That's right, our average donation this month is $26.21. Not a cent of that comes from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Bank, Big Pharma, or Big Oil CEOs.
**98% of our contributions are of $100 or less.** While it may feel like donating $5 or $25 can't really make a difference, it truly is how we're able to raise the millions it will take to win this race.
**[Can you pitch in $26.21 or whatever makes sense for you today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230424-1?refcode=EMAG24_1_AVG_20230424_V1_F&refcode2=21786_3422442_GtSBgl&akid=21786%2E3422442%2EGtSBgl)**

Thanks, we appreciate you!
Team KP for California

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG24_1_AVG_20230424_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=21786_3422442_GtSBgl&akid=21786%2E3422442%2EGtSBgl)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

I stand by my words, but of course, some in the media have chosen to twist them and attack me. I refuse to back down, Fellow American. I believe that we need to have honest, open discussions about the issues that matter most to Americans. That's why I am running for office. That's why I am working every day to make sure I have a prime spot on the debate stage in August. In order to continue my campaign and fight for the values and principles that set this country into motion, I need your support. I can't do it alone. Thank you for your support. Together, we can make a difference. Sincerely, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. I am committed to bringing fresh radical ideas to the table that will help put America back on track. But I can't do it without your support. | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: GOP's anti-voter bill has moved through the Senate

body:
Extreme Republicans in our state are trying to rig the rules so they can further their own extremist agendas
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62248490/402844517/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjA5MDk3OC1kZmUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2ca1xZeExxaWvhzTjWNlyMwBilyZHwqOEuE7C1MRFVc=) | Team,

Last Wednesday, Republicans in the Ohio Senate passed a self-serving measure that will make it even harder for voters to amend Ohio's constitution.

Right now, amendments need just a simple majority to pass in Ohio. _But Republicans are trying to rig the rules and raise that threshold to a 60% majority_ to further their own extremist agendas and sabotage the reproductive rights amendment Democrats are working to introduce this fall.

**I want to make one thing clear: Republicans know they're on the wrong side of the issues that are important to working Ohioans. That's why they're doing everything they can to try and stop citizen-led ballot initiatives and uphold their dangerous abortion ban and gerrymandered maps.**

Look, while the Ohio GOP has shown us that they're willing and ready to make it harder for Ohioans to make their voices heard at the polls, Ohio Democrats are working around the clock to fight these attacks on Ohio voters and keep power in the hands of the people — _not politicians_. **But we can't do it without your support.**

| | I needed to share this update with you directly, Peter: **A self-funding GOP millionaire – one of Donald Trump's yes-men – just announced he's running against me for Ohio's Senate seat.**

With national Republicans prepared to spend millions on this race, I need your immediate grassroots support to fight back ASAP. So I'm personally asking: **[_Will you chip in right now and split $25 or more between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia so we can win two key states and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62248524/402844629/-843865763?refcode=20230424.2_ShB_4AX&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDY2ZTZiZS1kZmUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_6PCbD2ix0WVDlLoCp6ndemvWptRX0qNWJAFipB1Kb0=)**_

The truth is, I'm not scared. But I do know that where Trump goes, GOP dark money follows. That's why I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help.

**This is, without a doubt, the biggest moment yet for our campaign – and how we respond in the next 24 hours is critically important to our chances of defending this seat.**

**Unlike my potential opponent, I don’t have a massive personal fortune to pour into this race. However, If you wish to unsubscribe you can do so [here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/502xl98alkm3J5MS-c04xA2?unsubscribedata=HydCF0J7OwXz%2B2uv3fs6qfloHpej0WdEgj3FfNn45s77fh6UeXkBjM%2BbaMPVcS9LTaZdi%2Be12n5wxTjJ271pqKGjuJyhxQYumnxzJQi5m1nU7tlvam5AlPk4mkPLDXVTyYJ5nlnR6QtWjf%2FFssqjiQP%2FRqNVH2BvIAzev83isiUGJL2HXSjzUqH%2F19lDFOeyG%2BIEcMsK%2FEMWL4BCo42vXXcPK1m5m60YSsqL%2BLgWTdq%2BmbwPhJHC9PsDFNGXbvFXCHUO%2BWFlu3nbNbvs8CBZ0FGIOhsk4uCe4q2%2Fq%2FCPkiPaaejahOwH9B069xeXHbjlE1oJMxx1X2Qc4C%2BqEAwzcU6tjV%2FGwX0G%2FZ6jSXX4x494zVkdRcXfkbxipUG1JPcGanVMN%2F%2BKWbLHnXEm%2BHtVNRfWK2vB5zMXQkXUCwwCncbrKJ52fz%2BM%2Bc8nqpCEJe1D).

clean_body: | | | I needed to share this update with you directly, Peter: A self-funding GOP millionaire – one of Donald Trump's yes-men – just announced he's running against me for Ohio's Senate seat. With national Republicans prepared to spend millions on this race, I need your immediate grassroots support to fight back ASAP. So I'm personally asking: = Here's why this is so important: With experts saying that Ohio could decide Senate control, Washington Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me and flip the Senate red. The truth is, I'm not scared. But I do know that where Trump goes, GOP dark money follows. That's why I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help. This is, without a doubt, the biggest moment yet for our campaign – and how we respond in the next 24 hours is critically important to our chances of defending this seat. Unlike my potential opponent, I don’t have a massive personal fortune to pour into this race. Instead, I'm relying on critical support from folks like you, one grassroots donation at a time. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for rushing your support to show the strength of this grassroots movement, Peter. With you by my side, I know that we'll be able to take on whatever the GOP throws our way – and win. – Sherrod | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

name: John Fetterman
subject: This is *really* worrying
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Republicans are already attacking my friend Bob + zeroing in on PA.
#
This is *really* worrying, Derek.
**The Senate Republican campaign arm released an ad attacking my friend Bob Casey** ...less than 24 freakin’ hours after he announced his re-election campaign.
Look, Bob did EVERYTHING in his power to support me in 2022 — and I couldn’t have won without his support. So we can’t let these new attacks on him slide.
**[Will you chip in right now to defend Bob against Mitch McConnell + the GOP? We need as many folks as possible stepping up, and I hope you’re one of them.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230424-1?refcode=em20230424-8346&refcode2=8346_434096_4suQzb&akid=8346%2E434096%2E4suQzb)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230424-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230424-8346&refcode2=8346_434096_4suQzb&akid=8346%2E434096%2E4suQzb)**
I’m not gonna lie...this is just the beginning, Derek. Take it from me — you can bet that Republicans are going to dump hundreds of million$ into gross, misleading ads in PA’s Senate race.
**In fact, this is going to be one of the most competitive + expensive races of 2024!!**
So here’s the deal. If we’re serious about winning this thing, we need to start building up our grassroots resources NOW to ensure we can keep Bob in the Senate to fight alongside me for working Pennsylvanians.
**[Help fight back against GOP attacks by chipping in $5 or more to support Bob Casey. We can keep PA + the Senate blue if everyone does their part.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230424-1?refcode=em20230424-8346&refcode2=8346_434096_4suQzb&akid=8346%2E434096%2E4suQzb)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230424-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230424-8346&refcode2=8346_434096_4suQzb&akid=8346%2E434096%2E4suQzb)**
Much love,
John 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230424-8346-footer&t=1&refcode2=8346_434096_4suQzb&akid=8346%2E434096%2E4suQzb)**

name: Jon Tester
subject: First, then, now

body:
I’m the most vulnerable Senator up for reelection next year, and Mitch McConnell and his GOP cronies are already raising big money to attack me.

| I have an important state-of-the-race update for you, Peter:

**First:** Democrats lost our House majority, making the Senate the last line of defense in the fight for reproductive freedom, getting dark money out of our politics, and more.

**Then:** Political experts from _CNN_ to Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ kicked off the 2024 election cycle by saying that Montana is one of the GOP's top targets.

**Now:** I’m the most vulnerable Senator up for reelection next year, and Mitch McConnell and his GOP cronies are already raising big money to attack me. We need to be ready to respond.

[_**We can’t — and won’t — win without the support of this grassroots team. body:
This case could criminalize the very act of journalism. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvqNZOBI5oUC4XzeK4RerHbX5NgdwwOpbsZ03du2VxrZ316penDuyyII5siY0YqCjnZKE2wjH1DXFWnYjhF98zz_egHSAS1pR99oSzO1PY9VScd6Qktc0_LcKerSw6hOsxlvb78KhCIwVweVDqQZDOzSAREy9k7Y5IbAwPW9PIl0k/3vm/0_8Pg0oyRDWyTRyUm-ug9w/h0/Gdg0fEacmT8ULCntaTIIVOFDcrzhzFLSu4u-C-oB-Fs)

Friend, **I am leading a fight to protect the freedom of the press. That's why I organized a letter from members of Congress to the U.S. Department of Justice to drop charges against Julian Assange.** While President, Donald Trump charged Assange for publishing information on Wikileaks about the U.S. State Department, Guantanamo Bay, and wars in Iraq and Afghanistan -- true information which was also published by newspapers like the _New York Times_ and _Washington Post_. These charges against Assange threaten our First Amendment right to free speech, setting a frightening precedent that journalists and newspapers could be prosecuted for doing their jobs. That’s why leading global newspapers and human rights organizations have called to drop the charges, which the U.S. Department of Justice can halt at any moment by simply dropping the charges against Mr. Assange. [**Please add your name to join the call to Attorney General Merrick Garland: Protect our right to free speech and a free press by dropping Trump-era charges against Julian Assange.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk9RGLvDE6XLiOF4lGDQyeWXZWDFqSso3EA2TmXJ07LXsPhksVTp_DN1KjBd3HfI7Mul9bSDx8jukj7l_ZKdlcuMV2eS9mWUwxsPy6-31nydcuCLpfmAs8FYxMJb6AVgXuScKzCIhN4Qd65KeHsRTKmdo1aGpDXGisvC0e7-cIKEhJ0C5iRlrH0KfxJmhsjfR9LYc_mWSRb9K0gtF6zAb40WDzLuzy-Js2ha0gCj2Kl7CJYJlEJ1hNXEutXJkPMvOyniIRN187fNH-gZ4Ivbe8UTdcipr83rDaoMMHZT19ZHegGDNSHHKHDgSdbgjDr9T9rJtEwF2zpQ2O2QclR-YvxaZ9pURkdomDvFTUFEMrGDRT-v6ujTY8-su0D582mgu4QjlMLmeo0I0Rh7q8PhuK0OLCJszQqpB8YS5AI-yPIkA/3vm/0_8Pg0oyRDWyTRyUm-ug9w/h1/QKnIpv30-WZiqC9FkFM91rIZ3wIbJc_1t_9VwhOsjoo) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk9RGLvDE6XLiOF4lGDQyeWXZWDFqSso3EA2TmXJ07LXsPhksVTp_DN1KjBd3HfI7Mul9bSDx8jukj7l_ZKdlcuMV2eS9mWUwxsPy6-31nydcuCLpfmAs8FYxMJb6AVgXuScKzCIhN4Qd65KeHsRTKmdo1aGpDXGisvC0e7-cIKEoCQuiHM7Az5pCsU1keTNyBNCKPIOjvw0-_j8DqPxq9BHkdeBBVIWj_bWPE4de6_70b84sp8G50lrSW0skN3GWOb-fIG-GA3yH57huBa0l5gpZNYgR57twCZlPWVNch8TobYFxTP-7q1CpAAA3g4nPVdZYAhuHrF-AgofSwi5tgvVe5RS4yE7R5kLzvHNmHfQmmwT0ZMkYungB-B_xNVrRAkS5NNW5bgfp66SScjnU_8fvP4Q3qtTP9sidnP0Dji1w/3vm/0_8Pg0oyRDWyTRyUm-ug9w/h2/zgpxSMpwl5K-jadfEzMPjXeFd-zUTeRSW3wU2anZqkQ)
---
As Chip Gibbons, the Policy Director of Defending Rights & Dissent, said:__
> **_“When the Trump Administration brought unprecedented Espionage Act charges against Julian Assange for doing what journalists do every day, they put the First Amendment in peril.”_**
**This case could criminalize the very act of journalism.**
We need Attorney General Merrick Garland to uphold the First Amendment’s protections for the freedom of the press by dropping the criminal charges against Julian Assange and withdrawing the U.S. extradition request with the British government.
[**Sign now to demand the U.S. Department of Justice uphold our constitutional right to free speech.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk9RGLvDE6XLiOF4lGDQyeWXZWDFqSso3EA2TmXJ07LXsPhksVTp_DN1KjBd3HfI7Mul9bSDx8jukj7l_ZKdlcuMV2eS9mWUwxsPy6-31nydcuCLpfmAs8FYxMJb6AVgXuScKzCIhN4Qd65KeHsRTKmdo1aGpDXGisvC0e7-cIKEtIYAdu4U7ayDBTkNWbwqKwb431Tw3-c2EDMCWMCLmMij9gaFlK_uFERWKSAoxMTVGMRW3PfntWN8bwZ6qzraiq2NcrDg5VCkRUPZ4Vtv6r4Xn6uy8IeZe83ZnVKLsOvl7q_A06TxuHTg7LcdLKAmXjDa__jW_N2UhT2zh9HOMpONLO6RHf0mUU6NSFR43Z5rALyq2CY4BThmbdQIEUvCFdZKtXwgRINEwdt0BNKuVKaPa7JCCeUwb9snvUGCKfpOg/3vm/0_8Pg0oyRDWyTRyUm-ug9w/h3/HREA8dXIN1poFev1wL7gy_ituKTJp4b379n5dAdksCg)

That’s why leading global newspapers and human rights organizations have called to drop the charges, which the U.S. Department of Justice can halt at any moment by simply dropping the charges against Mr. Assange. | As Chip Gibbons, the Policy Director of Defending Rights & Dissent, said: “When the Trump Administration brought unprecedented Espionage Act charges against Julian Assange for doing what journalists do every day, they put the First Amendment in peril.” This case could criminalize the very act of journalism. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: This is an insult to the progress we’ve made
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Don Lemon was WRONG on this.

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=16d347f4ed254545bd7667a64f497384&_e=0wYYcOaT8s7bN8vrLK04YT45mTtTsKHAtodqY7AULj4MY00DtbefJCtDDr0WvBMOA4E3hqN7_E4s9jqjPGz6Ynw3YRrSfbQ2SfWgF6I7DcIMLalkAtpqoV-b_2AHQ88B-1iFBTbFWITJPWbnSX0jUbjkS_qiYU_tD7OLMzIFa5DGcFCJ8Kkue2sOhSQZBe2kN8EThTO_wPgV0Dh-cQA62IGQXnt-sFBONsNPSoFWbByOBUNQtaVCP9M9KGAhPZbFP0lGY7p975SYN0yr32essncCcPETANMwkyWKTx9md_fTo-uyVDpAdyY2j-sHLaF0QkDNn9vFvKUpmUl_ZXF058XG2tlAxQPbODCDnaL7jANUyWDpHmnd3T8nt8MszVDb)
Fellow American,

Things got a little heated on CNN.

While debating post Civil War history, Don Lemon preposterously claimed that "black people still aren't allowed to enjoy their freedoms."

**That's an insult to the progress we've made over the last 160 years.** His comments embody what's wrong with the dialogue about race in America. I told him so without apology.

My exchange with Don Lemon and CNN that has sparked controversy and anger from some in the mainstream media.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=16d347f4ed254545bd7667a64f497384&_e=0wYYcOaT8s7bN8vrLK04YT45mTtTsKHAtodqY7AULj4MY00DtbefJCtDDr0WvBMOA4E3hqN7_E4s9jqjPGz6Ynw3YRrSfbQ2SfWgF6I7DcIMLalkAtpqoV-b_2AHQ88B-1iFBTbFWITJPWbnSX0jUbjkS_qiYU_tD7OLMzIFa5DGcFCJ8Kkue2sOhSQZBe2kN8EThTO_wPgV0Dh-cQA62IGQXnt-sFBONsNPSoFWbBxYm56BGnNA9AbSDbZNvgcCugl6Fq9JR-AekkKUS4tniJTL56Gm8coxA3cgs2Nall5lYnG6YcBTh-KhnZBb7XCeEFFr4tECV6RKOa2ZyejJ6-mBPDnrt0QTyHuRfYdSyA1y4vpc_M-xluP_yLP34H5e)
I spoke passionately about the importance of the Second Amendment and the need for civil discourse in our country. I stand by my words, but of course, some in the media have chosen to twist them and attack me.

**I refuse to back down, Fellow American.** I believe that we need to have honest, open discussions about the issues that matter most to Americans. That's why I am running for office. That's why I am working every day to make sure I have a prime spot on the debate stage in August.

In order to continue my campaign and fight for the values and principles that set this country into motion, I need your support. I can't do it alone. **[Any amount will bring us closer to our unique donor goal. I need your help to continue spreading my message of freedom and progress.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=16d347f4ed254545bd7667a64f497384&_e=0wYYcOaT8s7bN8vrLK04YT45mTtTsKHAtodqY7AULj4MY00DtbefJCtDDr0WvBMOA4E3hqN7_E4s9jqjPGz6Ynw3YRrSfbQ2SfWgF6I7DcIMLalkAtpqoV-b_2AHQ88B-1iFBTbFWITJPWbnSX0jUbjkS_qiYU_tD7OLMzIFa5DGcFCJ8Kkue2sOhSQZBe2kN8EThTO_wPgV0Dh-cQA62IGQXnt-sFBONsNPSoFWbBzH_UJfebvaot-LI4ZtkU6Uw9mhkE4IkqXNh64zhzpQrtI9izkWPZ3PKrSo-kTlnO5Ynn6XaX6ZJSXIdeq9QHCt0FRt9ufDighCkVmPsyLEDkzwNB8vsn9ClcJhRHv9bx_-Wnp7tSnVTbzY4SvFSLUt)**

**[Please consider making a small donation to my campaign today. Your contribution will help me continue my fight to revive the values that this nation was founded on: free speech. The rule of law. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=16d347f4ed254545bd7667a64f497384&_e=0wYYcOaT8s7bN8vrLK04YT45mTtTsKHAtodqY7AULj4MY00DtbefJCtDDr0WvBMOA4E3hqN7_E4s9jqjPGz6Ynw3YRrSfbQ2SfWgF6I7DcIMLalkAtpqoV-b_2AHQ88B-1iFBTbFWITJPWbnSX0jUbjkS_qiYU_tD7OLMzIFa5DGcFCJ8Kkue2sOhSQZBe2kN8EThTO_wPgV0Dh-cQA62IGQXnt-sFBONsNPSoFWbBxFHxKz9PR7w8LdTO3ClL_AwZPbXrpg1q-B4bVTbu7WKLD8MDPPW7mDTIs8BH2EdrXoYfBQMFkXR6aadRn44hJ7oPf_4ufhvyXHO05T6LEswozujk4U_Lqxcll8q7AyAiILDLzbDrrhNqNwcIk9kWz0)

---

| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=16d347f4ed254545bd7667a64f497384&_e=0wYYcOaT8s7bN8vrLK04Yfnhe9kp2XgNAKYE0gC-3bzlzjiAfvlg_ENIpsfARMTdeSLUGG_II-g2qi_Dald1Wl612wtTCbI2g_hAx5E3CGEwglZYhD9AJuSBGkLKrGS3QJn8SpxobngRUVXc7w5dOkMXkNg2LCee_HhgeY8Ojrg6yCDHuNEzKRY3lT8GP5zA4ZGNAYDb7-uvPKjVNNA4eZ_T_El7bdYC3LTd1AYlryw%3D) | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=16d347f4ed254545bd7667a64f497384&_e=0wYYcOaT8s7bN8vrLK04YfbQ4SB-aYANmyL0Ig52KGqO1zb6uLLJexOn1oRGeEiXnpnhRjzJy4sLMMQ8f0UgcLTSy8hn8uVojn2EmhFcqw9VqtkeYnCkxjfggge5uXozS00DP685n6UXfvEYbPtSFEdhcuRM-3GPN-FloGH5udmHMf1M-IkXYhdxSOQb5ZxU07mdxrptb_6NOXSnQDJO6A%3D%3D) | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=16d347f4ed254545bd7667a64f497384&_e=0wYYcOaT8s7bN8vrLK04Yb71syzoXJX-nCGiuwLeAnhLwRkBsMlN8o3dbq5oBYP0fOdMXl_CojKALTtLecrWZkBBxH2bEdtWmSSM0EFBIMnXKw3nzf8pI8q2iqfZr0YMGAwGVjBePw11-Z4KmTXTW4tJCJPkyKi8DcjEMsAYraaOuJJiPRdiCpcoGbKTPanJjUC0-Scb7LAR7M8jXqFQyG-V-irowmgTUEI8Bkx0a_k%3D)

clean_body: Don Lemon was WRONG on this. | Fellow American, Things got a little heated on CNN. While debating post Civil War history, Don Lemon preposterously claimed that "black people still aren't allowed to enjoy their freedoms." That's an insult to the progress we've made over the last 160 years. His comments embody what's wrong with the dialogue about race in America. I told him so without apology. My exchange with Don Lemon and CNN that has sparked controversy and anger from some in the mainstream media. I spoke passionately about the importance of the Second Amendment and the need for civil discourse in our country. I stand by my words, but of course, some in the media have chosen to twist them and attack me. I refuse to back down, Fellow American. I believe that we need to have honest, open discussions about the issues that matter most to Americans. That's why I am running for office. That's why I am working every day to make sure I have a prime spot on the debate stage in August. In order to continue my campaign and fight for the values and principles that set this country into motion, I need your support. I can't do it alone. - Thank you for your support. Together, we can make a difference. Sincerely, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. I am committed to bringing fresh radical ideas to the table that will help put America back on track. subject: Tucker Carlson is out at Fox and you, our Blue Amp Action community, helped VoteVets make it happen!
body:
You helped!

| | | | | Peter, **_[In a move WE helped make happen, Tucker Carlson was fired from Fox today!!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3cd51884-e11b-487d-8757-de0c9f9bccc5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** **_Did you see the BuzzFeed announcement?_** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11661e43-8f6a-46c8-8473-88d6bb737550/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Yes, Blue Amp Action Community, we, as one of the few independent lists this size, joined Democratic politicians, (some) mainstream media and progressive press, key non-profits and, of course, voting machine companies Dominion & Smartmatic. **We lay siege to Fox financially, in the press and around water coolers across America._ **_We supported VoteVets in their fight--still ongoing--to get Fox banned from U.S. military institutions _(I'd argue it should extend to all governing institutions**). **VoteVets has aired outstanding ads on this issue that undoubtedly added to Fox's toxicity, making them cut bait with Liar Tuck and settle with Dominion.** _They're still petrified of the Smartmatic lawsuit, as they defamed them even more severely. _ [**_In honor of this great success, let's double up on this campaign. Can you join Blue Amp Action in giving VoteVets $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to keep attacking Fox, which will directly help save our democracy._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T12cc3cd3-c809-4cfd-9fde-037e9ada1663/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting these treasonous propagandists! Let's Keep The Pressure On!! Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec575e12-c0e6-4e59-9984-ad1a40f49382/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Sinema refuses to answer questions about her luxury spending
body:
Sinema spent $100K on hotels, restaurants, chauffeurs, and wine | | | Peter – Did you see this? name: Senator Heidi Campbell
subject: Ticketmaster: we are never ever, ever getting back together (like ever) 💅
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230424_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230424_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Peter,
Taylor Swift's tour sales on Ticketmaster sparked a national dialogue about the corrupt Ticketmaster-Live Nation monopoly and prompted an investigation led by the Department of Justice. Let me explain the situation and what we did :
When Ticketmaster and Live Nation merged in 2010, they formed a monopoly that controls a massive portion of ticket sales with virtually no competitors at the same scale. Ticketmaster can charge as much as 70% more per ticket in mysterious service fees – and these prices can skyrocket when bots bypass Ticketmaster’s weak security system to buy large amounts of tickets for resale.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230424_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230424_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
It’s not fair to Tennesseeans who just want to watch their favorite artists play live music, Peter. That’s why I sponsored a bill to create more transparency in online ticket sales.
Peter, Nashville music fans should be able to buy concert tickets without unreasonable service fees and hours of waiting in online queues. Can we count on Nashville Swifties and live music fans to support my anti-monopoly campaign for mayor with a contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230424_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230424_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
If passed, HB1231/SB1043 would force third-party ticket resellers to show consumers the cost of the ticket without fees, cost of additional fees, cost of fees charged by the third-party, and the total cost of the ticket including all fees.
The bill also addresses the practice of 'holdback' tickets, which does not offer tickets to the general public and instead holds them for pre-sales, sales to credit card partners, or third-party ticket resellers. Third party ticket sellers would not be allowed to reserve more than 45% of the tickets for an event and would have to make 55% of tickets available to the general public.
As a singer and songwriter myself, keeping Nashville’s music scene accessible and affordable is really important to me. Peter, will you help me put Nashville musicians and concertgoers first with a donation today? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230424_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
With gratitude,
Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230424_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230424_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230424_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Campbell for Mayor
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

clean_body: [] Peter, Taylor Swift's tour sales on Ticketmaster sparked a national dialogue about the corrupt Ticketmaster-Live Nation monopoly and prompted an investigation led by the Department of Justice. Let me explain the situation and what we did : When Ticketmaster and Live Nation merged in 2010, they formed a monopoly that controls a massive portion of ticket sales with virtually no competitors at the same scale. Ticketmaster can charge as much as 70% more per ticket in mysterious service fees – and these prices can skyrocket when bots bypass Ticketmaster’s weak security system to buy large amounts of tickets for resale. [] It’s not fair to Tennesseeans who just want to watch their favorite artists play live music, Peter. That’s why I sponsored a bill to create more transparency in online ticket sales. Peter, Nashville music fans should be able to buy concert tickets without unreasonable service fees and hours of waiting in online queues. Can we count on Nashville Swifties and live music fans to support my anti-monopoly campaign for mayor with a contribution today? [] SUPPORT HEIDI [] If passed, HB1231/SB1043 would force third-party ticket resellers to show consumers the cost of the ticket without fees, cost of additional fees, cost of fees charged by the third-party, and the total cost of the ticket including all fees. The bill also addresses the practice of 'holdback' tickets, which does not offer tickets to the general public and instead holds them for pre-sales, sales to credit card partners, or third-party ticket resellers. Third party ticket sellers would not be allowed to reserve more than 45% of the tickets for an event and would have to make 55% of tickets available to the general public. As a singer and songwriter myself, keeping Nashville’s music scene accessible and affordable is really important to me. Peter, will you help me put Nashville musicians and concertgoers first with a donation today? >> [] With gratitude, Heidi Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill. [] As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves. Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment. Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote. Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream. Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023. Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to: Campbell for Mayor P.O. Box 330302 Nashville, Tennessee 37203 SUPPORT HEIDI [] Paid for by Campbell for Mayor Chip Forrester, Treasurer Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer Campbell for Mayor PO Box 330302 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

In addition to fighting for our community in Washington, I’ve been traveling around the district, going to events and talking to Texans. I’ve heard about the issues and concerns on people’s minds, from gun violence and public safety to abortion access and so much more. It’s great when I can speak with Texans face to face to hear how people in our community are feeling. And email gives me another way I can get insights. So, today, I want to hear from you. Our campaign is—and always will be—driven by the values and priorities of our community. To that end, we’ve put together a survey for you to share what you’re focused on and what you expect from your representatives. What are your hopes? Your biggest concerns? [_**Let me know by taking the survey here. I look forward to reading your responses and sharing them with the team!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62250608/402851830/829507852?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODM1MTkyZC1lN2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QY99aFnJGmknn_iLzLMIUUF7jxf-jf4y7Y6sTQA4cMA=&emci=9752a67a-8ddf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6835192d-e7e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=30230943) Together, we can do anything,

name: PETITION REQUEST via Fairness Project
subject: SIGN ON: ALL working Americans need better access to childcare !!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62250718/402852458/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmNmYWI5NS1lOGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9dT6Y-6p6pDPXgOMk3PARYm4-6MIv0qyenl93Ryl7c=&emci=2c75da54-e3e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3fcfab95-e8e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Team** ** — The Biden Administration just took huge steps last week when President Biden signed an executive order to lower the cost of childcare for federal workers and military families. The order is expected to expand access to childcare for these target groups, as well as raise wages and improve working conditions for the teachers and staff powering the program. [**While this is a great first step, ALL American workers need better access to affordable childcare. If you agree, will you add your name to our petition, friend?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62250719/402852459/1231613684?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmNmYWI5NS1lOGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9dT6Y-6p6pDPXgOMk3PARYm4-6MIv0qyenl93Ryl7c=&emci=2c75da54-e3e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3fcfab95-e8e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62250720/402852460/1231613684?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmNmYWI5NS1lOGUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m9dT6Y-6p6pDPXgOMk3PARYm4-6MIv0qyenl93Ryl7c=&emci=2c75da54-e3e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=3fcfab95-e8e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) We’re helping workers enact the policies they need to build a strong family foundation directly at the ballot box. Raising the minimum wage, expanding access to affordable health care, and enacting paid family leave policies are ALL ways we’re standing with working people in America to power the change they need to see. Making childcare more accessible and affordable is another great way we can support working people in America. body:
Will you join our $20.24 movement? | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/scottymooreforcongress/ester?e=5e611ce1ba)
---
[](https://scottymooreforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=13531191a7daf2aecc5c39a85&id=134a9e6fa6&e=5e611ce1ba)
\- My name is Ester Moore, and I wanted to reach out to you personally.
In 2022, my husband Scotty Moore ran for Congress in Florida’s 9th Congressional District. As the Republican nominee in the general election, we fell just a few thousand votes short of defeating Democrat Darren Soto.
Our family is doubling down in 2024! National Republicans now see what we saw in 2022 and they too are targeting this seat — our family is “ALL IN” again.
We’ve been endorsed by Senator Ted Cruz, Senator Rick Scott, and President Trump’s former Chief of Staff Mark Meadows.
Will you join us? I know times are tough and every dollar is hard to come by, but will you invest $20.24 with us for 2024?
All the best, Ester
[](https://scottymooreforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=13531191a7daf2aecc5c39a85&id=32ee530318&e=5e611ce1ba)
| [CHIP IN $20.24](https://scottymooreforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=13531191a7daf2aecc5c39a85&id=47f300aa0c&e=5e611ce1ba)
---
# About Scotty Moore:
For over 20 years, Scotty worked at the largest Christian mission organization in the world, Campus Crusade for Christ; now known as Cru.

Throughout his career, Scotty has made it his mission to help people know Jesus and help transform their lives. He has the unique ability to connect with anyone, anywhere, anytime - leveraging his highly dynamic and energetic personality in order to win people over. He excels in casting vision, telling stories and developing lasting relationships that produce next-level results. Scotty has coached people to reach their dream weight, assist struggling marriages, coach individuals in their leadership and personal development and help struggling businesses steady the ship and set a course for the future. He has traveled extensively and lived in Brazil for 6 years where he married his wife and learned to speak Portuguese on the streets of Brazil.

In 2021, Scotty took the bold step to run for U.S. Congress in Florida’s 9th congressional district, earning the endorsements of Mark Meadows, Senator Ted Cruz and Senator Rick Scott – eventually winning the primary and becoming the Republican nominee.
Scotty believes America is experiencing a leadership crisis. He strongly believes not all leaders are alike and that we need men and women who will courageously defend the Constitution, promote conservative principles with AMERICA-FIRST policies that honor God and help SAVE AMERICA.
Scotty holds a B.A. in Communication and has been married to Ester for 20 years and they have two daughters.
# FOLLOW US
| | | | [](https://scottymooreforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=13531191a7daf2aecc5c39a85&id=115f9d6214&e=5e611ce1ba)| [](https://scottymooreforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=13531191a7daf2aecc5c39a85&id=fc38c2f902&e=5e611ce1ba)| [](https://scottymooreforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=13531191a7daf2aecc5c39a85&id=edcb4cb7f2&e=5e611ce1ba)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Tell Kroger NO MORE bee-killing pesticides
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1738903?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell Kroger to say NO to bee-killing pesticides! ** Imagine this: you walk into your grocery store prepared to purchase fruits and vegetables to nourish both yourself and your family... **BUT THE SHELVES ARE NEARLY BARE.** What was once a colorful display of nutritious produce is now nearly **EMPTY.** What happened to the fruits and vegetables, Friend? These bare shelves are the result of the declining bee population. Bees and other pollinators are at the foundation of our food system. **1 out of every 3 bites of food** we eat and **75% of the world’s most nutritious crops,** including staples like apples and almonds, depend on pollinators like buzzing bees. Let’s talk about the problem -- Kroger, one of the largest U.S. food retailers, continues to sell food grown with dangerous neonic pesticides that are _**DEADLY to BEES.**_ These chemicals attack their nervous systems and damage their ability to navigate, find food, fight diseases, and _**EVEN REPRODUCE!**_ [**Friend, help SAVE the bees by demanding Kroger STOP selling produce grown with these toxic pesticides and endangering our food supply by 11:59pm TONIGHT!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1738904?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1738905?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Unfortunately, these toxic pesticides are not only dangerous to pollinators. Neonics have been linked to _**birth defects of the brain and heart, hormone disruption, and neurodevelopmental problems like autism.**_ This is not just about protecting bees Friend; it’s about protecting people, too! We deserve a food system that nourishes us, not one that threatens our health and the planet.
Let’s keep our produce shelves full and protect pollinators and our health by holding Kroger accountable. [**We need 56 more people from your area to demand Kroger STOP selling food grown with toxic pesticides to reach our goal. Act now!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1738906?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1738905?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Paolo Mutia
Food and agriculture campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell Kroger to say NO to bee-killing pesticides! Imagine this: you walk into your grocery store prepared to purchase fruits and vegetables to nourish both yourself and your family... BUT THE SHELVES ARE NEARLY BARE. What was once a colorful display of nutritious produce is now nearly EMPTY. What happened to the fruits and vegetables, Friend? These bare shelves are the result of the declining bee population. Bees and other pollinators are at the foundation of our food system. 1 out of every 3 bites of food we eat and 75% of the world’s most nutritious crops, including staples like apples and almonds, depend on pollinators like buzzing bees. Let’s talk about the problem -- Kroger, one of the largest U.S. food retailers, continues to sell food grown with dangerous neonic pesticides that are DEADLY to BEES. These chemicals attack their nervous systems and damage their ability to navigate, find food, fight diseases, and EVEN REPRODUCE! == | == Unfortunately, these toxic pesticides are not only dangerous to pollinators. Neonics have been linked to birth defects of the brain and heart, hormone disruption, and neurodevelopmental problems like autism. This is not just about protecting bees Friend; it’s about protecting people, too! We deserve a food system that nourishes us, not one that threatens our health and the planet. Let’s keep our produce shelves full and protect pollinators and our health by holding Kroger accountable. == == Standing with you, Paolo Mutia Food and agriculture campaigner, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Charge Hunter Already!
body:
What You Need to Know Today No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-quihrit-trhiujldw-yd/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quihrit-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Monday! **
## CaucusRoom's parent company, Ouray Digital Inc., is about to launch an online space for faith-based groups to meet, share, and learn. **[Help us name our Faith-based App!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quihrit-trhiujldw-y/)**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quihrit-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quihrit-trhiujldw-t/) **Aggressive Environmental Regulations** The **[fossil fuel industry is pushing back on EPA plans](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quihrit-trhiujldw-i/)** to force power plants to substantially curb emissions or utilize costly carbon capture technology. **Abandoned in Sudan** The White House has said **[it has no plans to evacuate the thousands of American civilians](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quihrit-trhiujldw-d/) **currently believed to be trapped in Sudan. **Will Biden be Hidin?** Biden may finally announce he is running for reelection, but it will be a lot different than in 2020. For one thing, **[he can't hide in the basement this time.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quihrit-trhiujldw-h/)** **$900K Worth of Drugs** The drug cartels in Mexico are **[finding more ways to disguise the drugs they are sending over the border](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quihrit-trhiujldw-k/)**. How much of this didn't get caught by CBP officers?

**Charge Him Already!** Federal prosecutors have **[considered four possible charges against Hunter Biden](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quihrit-trhiujldw-u/)** related to taxes and a gun purchase. _WHAT IS THE HOLD-UP?_ **No Questions Please** Biden has been**[slammed for holding the fewest number of press conferences](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quihrit-trhiujldw-o/) **since Ronald Reagan's reign in the eighties. **The Decline is Clear** The **[Wall Street Journal editorial board had the guts to say what we are all thinking](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quihrit-trhiujldw-x/)** about Biden running for re-election. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quihrit-trhiujldw-m/)!**
* In case of **[outrage](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quihrit-trhiujldw-c/)**...

body:
the fight for abortion access continues
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62252303/402857074/-1140859173?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.04.24_B1_mife-ruling_All_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTUyYjY1Mi1lY2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=isA-nR-PvUXXtBKu7XSxEWmoybmjGSfYYHfo-d87bMI=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62252311/402857075/1164678692?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.04.24_B1_mife-ruling_All_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTUyYjY1Mi1lY2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=isA-nR-PvUXXtBKu7XSxEWmoybmjGSfYYHfo-d87bMI=) Team,

As you've probably seen by now, the Supreme Court blocked the dangerous restrictions on Mifepristone. This is a huge win for abortion rights, but the work doesn't stop just yet.

Back when I was working as the Deputy Secretary of Health and Social Services for Delaware, I worked with a variety of groups, with a wide spectrum of opinions on abortion rights, to win funding for abortion data in my home state.

**That kind of problem solving is what the fight for reproductive rights needs.**

I know I can bring that kind of problem solving to Congress and continue advocating for abortion rights, but not without your help. **[_A donation of just $10 would help propel my grassroots campaign and allow me to continue fighting for your rights._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62252312/402857076/-1140859173?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.04.24_B1_mife-ruling_All&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTUyYjY1Mi1lY2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=isA-nR-PvUXXtBKu7XSxEWmoybmjGSfYYHfo-d87bMI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62252313/402857077/-1140859173?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.04.24_B1_mife-ruling_All&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode2=EL10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTUyYjY1Mi1lY2UyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=isA-nR-PvUXXtBKu7XSxEWmoybmjGSfYYHfo-d87bMI=)

name: Art
subject: Three things to know about Moore v. Harper
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

**Here are three things you should know about the _Moore v. Harper_ case...**
1️⃣ Republicans argue that the “independent state legislature” (ISL) theory -- a far-fetched legal theory that claims that state legislatures are the ONLY state entities with the power to regulate federal elections.
2️⃣ If the Supreme Court sides with the power-hungry politicians in this case, an era of perpetual redistricting could be unleashed.
3️⃣ Worst case scenario, the ISL theory opens the door for power grabs by anti-democratic advocates and elected officials in other gerrymandered states. By claiming that state legislatures have exclusive power over federal elections, extremists in Republican state legislatures could effectively nullify state constitutional provisions that protect voters.
As A.G. Holder said, this should not be a difficult decision for the Supreme Court -- endorsing the ISL theory would "damage a cornerstone of our democracy" and "unleash" gerrymandering from both parties.
**[Before we hear back on the SCOTUS decision, add your name to our petition if you believe SCOTUS should uphold checks and balances in redistricting.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62260166/402903196/-1462679232?refcode=20230424_AOTL_F_SCOTUS2_RedLite&source=20230424_AOTL_F_SCOTUS2_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5MjczYmZiLTBlZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hey67YMESAkQbP3VsI7Im0bnBmDEuitCSF8OeNz7oXk=&emci=c63bf592-b9e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=69273bfb-0ee3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8431045)**

Extreme Republicans are relentless in their attacks on our elections -- putting their ISL theory into practice would be an unfathomable threat to our democracy.
We’re doing a lot of work to make sure that activists, legal experts, the media, and partner organizations understand what’s at stake -- and are prepared for the potential fallout of this decision. We appreciate your support!
\-- Art Mitchell
Deputy Director, Litigation and Policy

clean_body: | Here are three things you should know about the Moore v. Harper case... 1️⃣ Republicans argue that the “independent state legislature” (ISL) theory -- a far-fetched legal theory that claims that state legislatures are the ONLY state entities with the power to regulate federal elections. 2️⃣ If the Supreme Court sides with the power-hungry politicians in this case, an era of perpetual redistricting could be unleashed. 3️⃣ Worst case scenario, the ISL theory opens the door for power grabs by anti-democratic advocates and elected officials in other gerrymandered states. By claiming that state legislatures have exclusive power over federal elections, extremists in Republican state legislatures could effectively nullify state constitutional provisions that protect voters. As A.G. Holder said, this should not be a difficult decision for the Supreme Court -- endorsing the ISL theory would "damage a cornerstone of our democracy" and "unleash" gerrymandering from both parties. Extreme Republicans are relentless in their attacks on our elections -- putting their ISL theory into practice would be an unfathomable threat to our democracy. We’re doing a lot of work to make sure that activists, legal experts, the media, and partner organizations understand what’s at stake -- and are prepared for the potential fallout of this decision. We appreciate your support! \-- Art Mitchell Deputy Director, Litigation and Policy All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Peter,

I want to be vulnerable with you for a moment and share my personal painful story about my coming out experience.

**In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay with bigoted and homophobic ads to our district. I hadn’t even come out publicly yet!**

For members of the LGBTQ+ community, coming out is an extremely personal and sensitive moment. So, you can imagine my horror and heartbreak upon finding out I had been outed so publicly in such a hateful way. I was crushed.

**I ended up losing that extremely competitive race and it wasn’t until 18 years later that I finally won my race for Congress in 2012.**

Peter, I’m so glad that in the face of such discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up.

Now, I can fight for LGBTQ+ equality and dignity in our nation’s capital and stand up for other marginalized Americans.

But sadly, since 2012, Republican bigotry and vitriol has not slowed down. Trump’s MAGA Republicans have spread hatred and divisiveness around the world while Republican state legislatures are passing anti‐LGBTQ+ legislation as fast as they can. [**Peter, in 1994 when I was attacked for my identity, I lost because I didn’t have good people like you by my side. But now I do — and I’m hoping that I can count on you to chip in $7 to help me fight back against hateful Republicans and stop their anti‐LGBTQ+ agenda. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62253008/402859879/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGUwZTFmOS1lZWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mhaRUsFWY_-Lvm3anF4petXlD-dKnzO9HBIHswucOm8=&emci=4819ddab-dfe2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=04e0e1f9-eee2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
We just got word, Peter.

_**Fox News just announced that they “have agreed to part ways” with their star primetime host Tucker Carlson.**_

For years, Tucker has been a mouthpiece for right-wing propaganda and misinformation. And they’ve made him extremely powerful within the Republican Party.

**Politicians like Greg Abbott have done Tucker's bidding without question** —including recently when he convinced Abbott to pardon a man who was convicted of murdering a protester blocks away from the Texas Capitol. And I’ve seen firsthand how Tucker’s lies have been adopted by my Republican colleagues on the House Oversight Committee.

**I have no doubt that Tucker will continue to spread lies and propaganda—and whoever replaces him at Fox will do the same. That’s why it’s so important that we fight back.

[As we near the end-of-the-month fundraising deadline, can you chip in $20 or whatever you can to support Team Casar as we fight against right-wing extremism and misinformation? name: Becca for Congress
subject: 📰Becca in WSJ, VT Digger, and more:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
Becca is proving herself to be a leading progressive voice for Vermonters in Washington:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62253006/402859866/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2UwZTFmOS1lZWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g68SkhRvWaug-9CWOJbBPe_dyG0oeL9gP_7iBJKtlls=&emci=daa325c4-cce2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=07e0e1f9-eee2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, Between writing and introducing her first bill, co-sponsoring key pieces of legislation, and giving passionate speeches on the House floor, Becca is proving herself to be a leading progressive voice for Vermonters in Washington: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62253007/402859874/-441002663?refcode=E21026-20230424-CampaignTrailUpdate-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2UwZTFmOS1lZWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g68SkhRvWaug-9CWOJbBPe_dyG0oeL9gP_7iBJKtlls=) Becca was chosen by her colleagues to introduce the motion to send the first nationwide transgender sports ban bill introduced by Republicans back to committee. This bill is a part of the nationwide effort to strip transgender Americans and children of their fundamental rights. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62253009/402859883/-441002663?refcode=E21026-20230424-CampaignTrailUpdate-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2UwZTFmOS1lZWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g68SkhRvWaug-9CWOJbBPe_dyG0oeL9gP_7iBJKtlls=) When Becca decided to run for Congress, she made expanding mental health care for Vermonters a key component of her platform. Now, after making several visits to high schools around Vermont and speaking with students and staff, Becca has introduced her first bill – _the Peer Education and Emergency Response for Mental Health Act_ – to invest in training teachers, school personnel, and students to assist their peers who may be facing mental health crises. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62253011/402859888/-441002663?refcode=E21026-20230424-CampaignTrailUpdate-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2UwZTFmOS1lZWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g68SkhRvWaug-9CWOJbBPe_dyG0oeL9gP_7iBJKtlls=) Becca joined Senators Bernie Sanders and Peter Welch in co-sponsoring the Nulhegan River and Paul Stream Wild and Scenic River Study Act of 2023, which seeks wild and scenic designation for the Northeast Kingdom’s Nulhegan River and Paul Stream. clean_body: Becca is proving herself to be a leading progressive voice for Vermonters in Washington: | | Peter, Between writing and introducing her first bill, co-sponsoring key pieces of legislation, and giving passionate speeches on the House floor, Becca is proving herself to be a leading progressive voice for Vermonters in Washington: = Becca was chosen by her colleagues to introduce the motion to send the first nationwide transgender sports ban bill introduced by Republicans back to committee. This bill is a part of the nationwide effort to strip transgender Americans and children of their fundamental rights. = When Becca decided to run for Congress, she made expanding mental health care for Vermonters a key component of her platform. Now, after making several visits to high schools around Vermont and speaking with students and staff, Becca has introduced her first bill – the Peer Education and Emergency Response for Mental Health Act – to invest in training teachers, school personnel, and students to assist their peers who may be facing mental health crises. = Becca joined Senators Bernie Sanders and Peter Welch in co-sponsoring the Nulhegan River and Paul Stream Wild and Scenic River Study Act of 2023, which seeks wild and scenic designation for the Northeast Kingdom’s Nulhegan River and Paul Stream. This bill is an important step towards protecting Vermont’s natural beauty for generations to come. Becca has proven that she has our back as a progressive voice for Vermonters in Congress.Now, let’s make sure she knows that we have hers.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Becca for Congress = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . If you prefer to contribute by check, you are welcome to send a contribution to the campaign at the address below. To comply with Federal law, we must use our best efforts to obtain, maintain and submit the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Thank you in advance for including that information along with your check. | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont Becca for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05302 United States

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxckU9vnDAQxT-NubEyY_4sBw5pET1VqlQlh17QxB5gstimxnRLPn0FSSq119-M3nvzBu0y87A3ovokACY2qwAQ6kEAbFE94ePj17CnCmz6pXiC8RjCZwEQ94X-br6LXMgizwet2sQ0OWA26ISarLyCqoqiypKpuWKN1wKlljVhppBk-azNtcrzqs4yKBNuQIKSOeQACvLsomsoVS1lqSSYISORy9PoMgSiOLG7UTDI837R3iZzM8W4rGewTkC3kt4CXe7sApljQ0BnvMNI0RvcBXQ3XKfU2_QFXaknz0Gobou2X_0WNAnVDtEIKA9kyfBmhWrfLz2hRrsgj06o9i13OvA4xTvH6ZDuTzf2rvdLZMuv1D_TzPSLDjXs_7-if3lL0T8Hf6OAI_UfhXwYehfJRaFap-fUdXvxfby9PmwCyt7NbI7Bv_D8q2p__B675dtPTEJjljvPM69lJXI5nnVqb_8EAAD__-YRq4c)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today.
