clean_body: Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. subject: The debt limit? I have a plan for that:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62253392/402860999/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWQ0MjZiMi1lZWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TvrDDS2_8u4ExbK6p3MXdEbJBasEgoG-8Z4sk_ZTLpc=&emci=191b18bc-e4e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=15d426b2-eee2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)

| | Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA allies continue to play political games with the debt limit. He recently went to New York to announce his plan: demand deep cuts to programs Americans rely on before he agrees to raise the debt ceiling. Does he want to make corporations pay their fair share? _No._ Does he want to make the CEOs pay the same tax rate as their employees? _No._ Instead, Kevin McCarthy wants to sock it to ordinary Americans. **What programs would he cut? He wouldn't say.** **Except for food stamps. He definitely wants to cut food stamps.** I would be laughing if I wasn't so angry. It gets worse. Some of McCarthy's MAGA allies are demanding massive cuts in programs we all depend on— including Social Security, Medicare, veterans benefits, environmental protection, higher education, and more. **The political brinkmanship over the debt ceiling has to stop.** With Senator Tim Kaine, I've proposed a simple idea: President Biden — and all future presidents — should be able to raise the debt ceiling anytime it's necessary. If Congress thinks the president has gone too far, Congress could vote to override the decision. Defaulting on our debt would cause the global economy to crash. It would put car payment and credit card interest rates through the roof. Playing games with peoples' lives is not OK. This is all coming to a head in the next month or two. Stay tuned. I'm in this fight for you and your family. name: Bob Casey
subject: More than words to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Once again I am asking for the honor of your trust. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62253925/402862471/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWJlZTUzZC1mMmUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2N8ivTP9MfkP3iBmOopwmKe9gRpSnZyq7GmJa1vtC8M=&emci=53d50983-e9e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=01bee53d-f2e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725) _**"All public service is a trust, given in faith and accepted in honor.” **_ Peter, those are the words inscribed over the front door of the Finance Building in Harrisburg, where I began my public service as PA’s Auditor General. **But they’re so much more than words to me. ** One thing you might not know about me is that my wife, Terese, and I raised our four daughters in the same community where I grew up — my hometown of Scranton, PA. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62253926/402862472/572475792?refcode=em20230424-1-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWJlZTUzZC1mMmUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2N8ivTP9MfkP3iBmOopwmKe9gRpSnZyq7GmJa1vtC8M=) _Our family at home in Scranton (2003)_ Pennsylvania has been and always will be my home. If there is anything I've learned from serving my home state, it’s that PA’s hardworking people need an actual champion in Washington — which brings me back to those words. _**All public service is a trust, given in faith.**_ As your Senator, I am reminded every day that you have put your trust in me to fight for what’s right. _**And accepted in honor.**_ I work to earn that trust by standing up for you and your families: against Republican attacks on Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid; against tax cuts for the ultra-rich; against countries like China that threaten our jobs with unfair trade practices; and against big health care companies raising costs for the middle class. Peter, my record as Senator makes it clear who I’m fighting for in Washington. But there’s still more work to cut through the gridlock, stand up to powerful special interests, and make the lives of hardworking Pennsylvanians a little bit easier. And the stakes are too high to sit out this election. That’s why I am once again asking for the honor of your trust: **[I’m running for re-election because I want to continue to fight for you and your family in the Senate. Our 2024 re-election fight promises to be among the most expensive and competitive Senate races in the country. I will do whatever it takes to defend this seat and our Democratic Majority — and I’m asking you to make your first founding donation to fuel the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62253927/402862473/572475792?refcode=em20230424-1-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWJlZTUzZC1mMmUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2N8ivTP9MfkP3iBmOopwmKe9gRpSnZyq7GmJa1vtC8M=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, we'll process your donation to Bob Casey immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62253928/402862474/572475792?refcode=em20230424-1-ngp&express_lane=true&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWJlZTUzZC1mMmUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2N8ivTP9MfkP3iBmOopwmKe9gRpSnZyq7GmJa1vtC8M=)

clean_body: Here at the DNC, we know that our supporters are some of the most dedicated and passionate people out there. That’s why our design team has worked so hard to craft the perfect sticker for folks like you and me. | | As we gear up for elections this year and next, the DNC is excited to announce that we're releasing a new limited-edition sticker to help folks show off their support of the Democratic Party. But we’ve got just one thing holding us back: We’re stuck between three different designs, Derek. We know that this grassroots team is dedicated to and passionate about electing Democrats. That’s why our design team has worked so hard to craft the perfect sticker for y’all. But they’re all so good we just can’t seem to narrow it down. So, we need your help to decide which of these designs we should send to our printer. Can’t wait to see which design you pick, Jess Jessica Porter Online Fundraising Director Democratic National Committee Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . Look, I know it may seem odd to ask for _just_ $1. In the grand scheme of things, it can be hard to see how a dollar can even make a difference.

**But here’s the difference, team:** My campaign doesn’t run on dark money contributions or wealthy mega-donors. **It’s built by hard-working folks like you.**

Supporters who come from families like mine. Families who want to leave their communities better than they found it. Everyday people coming together to build something greater than themselves.

And though $1 may seem symbolic, the movement it grows will be able to move mountains. **And it all starts with $1.**

[**So can I count on you to chip in $1, friend? Every dollar we raise will help our campaign build a movement to take back the House, but I need your help to get me there.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKMESXaE6NL3dPa6SXUcsfApSEBZ4vS-xTRG_f39IenP4udnC6uHvjOAHcoeF0rvabsQZaiNsG_MaR3G_CGw2Ee7Oa6d4qZ-40ygjFw3fXIFpJDzhh8mL7xazHCHqqBoNQzz0lNqlUXC5r4hoRcflBt2wEhTQ3pLSh1VKOXcfOMTzr6AhpPpaUVcbVfeI1rJfZUoA-euvJAf9--CBlG2JRAvIe_n9EtqGqOh-nqpibEjvyOViQTMYxNhSxo_xY-Rbx0RU9OwaoRVssunNkKu0C5aFXAjVduXdI8_NR5kqUI_0jxJfr3ywYzt7-0Utb5pgxaqSZzBO4BhyP93XINloEnw/3vm/YuyqkOZPTk6J7G-nMH5uGQ/h4/QFbfLW6lf443l8l98Da02PxE7fLHyZUGgyrIt3UJIrg)

clean_body: I have to ask, folks! | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Friend, Raul Ruiz here. | Look, I know it may seem odd to ask for just $1. In the grand scheme of things, it can be hard to see how a dollar can even make a difference. But here’s the difference, team: My campaign doesn’t run on dark money contributions or wealthy mega-donors. It’s built by hard-working folks like you. Supporters who come from families like mine. Families who want to leave their communities better than they found it. Everyday people coming together to build something greater than themselves. And though $1 may seem symbolic, the movement it grows will be able to move mountains. And it all starts with $1. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for standing with us! standards.

Side sleeping offers many benefits, from improved spinal alignment to a reduced risk of snoring, heartburn, and back pain. **To unlock the full potential of these benefits, you’ll want to also find the right products to support your sleep. Discover the best mattresses, pillows, and mattress toppers for side sleepers!**

clean_body: Support your sleep with our expert top picks | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Best Products for Side Sleepers Not only is side sleeping preferred by 60% of adults, but it is also considered to be one of the healthiest sleep positions. Side sleeping offers many benefits, from improved spinal alignment to a reduced risk of snoring, heartburn, and back pain. To unlock the full potential of these benefits, you’ll want to also find the right products to support your sleep. We need a once-in-a-generation mobilization that prioritizes front-line
communities, combats the climate crisis, and creates millions of
good-paying union jobs. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134054?refcode=em20230424-28642&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=28642%2E1203867%2E8pMoes ]Will you contribute $3 right now
to help us enact a Green New Deal?

The Green New Deal will help our economy transition away from fossil fuels
and dramatically expand existing renewable power sources with the goal of
meeting 100% of national power demand through renewable sources.

The Green New Deal will also provide people across the country with the
opportunity, training, and education needed to participate fully and
equally in a green economy, offering jobs to help rebuild our crumbling
infrastructure. This resolution ensures a just transition for all workers,
low-income communities, communities of color, and Indigenous communities
who are often most impacted by climate change and the climate crisis.

We need to enact policies that match the scale of the crises we face and
the Green New Deal would do exactly that.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134054?refcode=em20230424-28642&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=28642%2E1203867%2E8pMoes ]In order to pass the Green New Deal, we need more progressives in the
House who will fight to pass this landmark resolution. Will you donate
$3 right now to help us elect those leaders?

We’re in a fight for the soul of the Democratic Party — to transform it to
represent regular people, not corporate special interests.

Thank you so much for your support,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1004&akid=28642%2E1203867%2E8pMoes ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1005&akid=28642%2E1203867%2E8pMoes ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230424-28642-footer&t=1006&refcode2=28642_1203867_8pMoes&akid=28642%2E1203867%2E8pMoes

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=28642%2E1203867%2E8pMoes

body:
The Senate must investigate his failure to disclose financial help from a major Republican donor.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62254706/402864855/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230424CT_N_PT_FULL_6_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjYzOGVkMi1mNWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PAKi888cASATfNkJcJT3oT34-v6LmEdrtjS1tFopFP8=)
---
We've recently learned that Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas has repeatedly accepted luxury trips from a far-right Republican donor — and that he sold over $100,000 worth of properties to this same donor. **Justice Thomas did not disclose any of this to the public or to the Court.**

It's enraging that a judge with the power to affect millions of Americans through his rulings would so blatantly flout ethics rules.

[**It's critical that we establish here and now: Supreme Court Justices don't get special treatment and should be held accountable when they violate the public trust. Will you join Jennifer and call on the Senate to launch an ethics investigation of Clarence Thomas?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62254707/402864856/-367804752?ms=EM_PET_230424CT_N_PT_FULL_6_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230424CT_N_PT_FULL_6_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjYzOGVkMi1mNWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PAKi888cASATfNkJcJT3oT34-v6LmEdrtjS1tFopFP8=&emci=0b80ace2-eee2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b6638ed2-f5e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) [Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62254708/402864857/-367804752?ms=EM_PET_230424CT_N_PT_FULL_6_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230424CT_N_PT_FULL_6_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjYzOGVkMi1mNWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PAKi888cASATfNkJcJT3oT34-v6LmEdrtjS1tFopFP8=&emci=0b80ace2-eee2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b6638ed2-f5e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120) We're already at a moment when the federal judiciary has lost the confidence of many Americans. Far-right judges are dismantling our healthcare and rolling back basic civil rights.

**The last thing we can afford is for these judges to now be above the rules that everyone else plays by.**

The Senate needs to hear our voices and know that the American public demands accountability. [**So please, add your name to Jennifer's petition and help us reach 15,000 signatures →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62254709/402864858/-367804752?ms=EM_PET_230424CT_N_PT_FULL_6_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230424CT_N_PT_FULL_6_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjYzOGVkMi1mNWUyLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PAKi888cASATfNkJcJT3oT34-v6LmEdrtjS1tFopFP8=&emci=0b80ace2-eee2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b6638ed2-f5e2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)

Thank you,

name: Team AOC
subject: Goodbye, Tucker Carlson.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This is a big moment.
#
It’s official: **Tucker Carlson is off the air**.
After years of viciously targeting women, people of color, and the LGBTQ+ community, Tucker Carlson was told abruptly this morning that he no longer had a show. Reports say he never saw it coming.
Just yesterday, Alexandria called out Carlson, during an interview on Inside with Jen Psaki, saying he directly incited the violence of the January 6th insurrection. Many people have also come forward over the years to talk about the death threats they received after Carlson targeted them on his show. It’s not clear yet why Fox let Carlson go, but we do know that his dismissal is a hugely positive development for all of us fighting against hate speech.
[There’s still a lot of work to do to fight the right-wing disinformation machine that constantly makes Alexandria their target — donate $3 here to help our campaign in that fight today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230424-2.lI6y9c&refcode=em20230424-4218-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4218%2E2526796%2EIaqkRJ)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230424-2.lI6y9c&refcode=em20230424-4218-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4218%2E2526796%2EIaqkRJ)**
Since getting his own show on Fox in 2016, Carlson has relentlessly spewed hate speech. He said that allowing more immigrants into our country would make the U.S. ‘poorer and dirtier’. He argued that women are ‘extremely primitive’ beings who ‘just need to be quiet and kind of do what you’re told’.
Alexandria directly challenges Tucker Carlson and all the many voices like him that are sadly still on the air. She deftly exposes their hypocrisy, calls out their racism and misogyny, and advances policy that will create the more just, inclusive world they so desperately oppose. And for this, they relentlessly attack her.
Fox News attacked Alexandria 75 times a day, on average, in 2019. Alexandria has been open about the serious impact this has had on her safety and mental health — but she has kept fighting because she knows a better world is possible.
[Will you stand with Alexandria and donate $3? Together, we can take this moment and fuel the movement to fight hate speech in America.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230424-2.lI6y9c&refcode=em20230424-4218-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4218%2E2526796%2EIaqkRJ)
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230424-2?refcode=em20230424-4218-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=22&refcode2=4218_2526796_IaqkRJ&akid=4218%2E2526796%2EIaqkRJ)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230424-4218-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=23&akid=4218%2E2526796%2EIaqkRJ)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=4218%2E2526796%2EIaqkRJ) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=4218%2E2526796%2EIaqkRJ) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=4218%2E2526796%2EIaqkRJ)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=4218%2E2526796%2EIaqkRJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=4218%2E2526796%2EIaqkRJ)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Tammy Baldwin for Senate
subject: what can we say?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=213%2E35263%2EYkjiqa ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Is there anything we can say to convince you to pitch in to our campaign
today, Peter?

What if we told you that Tammy just launched her reelection campaign and
she needs your support to build out her campaign operation for the next
few months?

What if we mentioned that Tammy’s race will be among the most competitive
across the country and if we lose this race, it’s almost certain that
Mitch McConnell would take the Senate majority?

What if we told you that Republicans and their network of super PACs spent
$77 million on the Senate race in Wisconsin last year? And that this time
around, they could spend even more to flip Tammy’s seat?

Or that right now, the GOP is recruiting potential candidates to challenge
Tammy, including several wealthy far-right opponents with millions of
dollars to spare on a campaign?

Well, here’s the thing
Peter: All of this is true. The
GOP understands that the Senate majority could come down to Tammy’s seat.
They’re ready to spend every dollar possible to boost challengers in this
key battleground state.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230424_PM2_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=213%2E35263%2EYkjiqa ]Now that you know that Republicans will be spending millions of dollars
to try and claim Tammy’s Senate seat, will you chip in any amount ahead of
our end-of-month deadline? Your support helps us fight back and protect
our Senate majority.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-launch23.nXYWhk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230424_PM2_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=213%2E35263%2EYkjiqa ]CHIP IN $5 NOW
